name: Chuck Grassley
subject: We get it, Washington doesn’t.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
|
---
Friend,

We understand the need for hard work, dedication, loyalty, and corn on the Grassley farm.

Unfortunately -- too many in Washington, D.C. have no idea just how important these things are for our country. They give out hand-outs, reward dishonesty, and couldn't care less about what goes on in our nation's countryside.

Their ignorance knows no bounds.

Crop rotation helps keep the ground healthy and keeps yields high. Sometimes, you've got to change out soybeans for corn to keep everything running smoothly.

Really -- it's the same thing in government. We've got to change out the Democrats and elect conservative Republicans to bring this country back to greatness.

**[Can you help out? Can you rush your support and help us take back this great nation and bring common sense back to Washington, D.C?](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=9161ec3e44ad4b79b43f8fc285001300&_e=8UESDTbPiYkAbkIZJA0KjF0CJYm6Su3IKIkBxjNw_vyEDRoIWtgq1rhE3TITXrfGjYHUGSfuHKIzOGzOa-ckzM98iapZfEVZPFNky72LCWAuppFfWlrWiAK85tkKsTJOhd2rf8ZM6NokvVvZqsskD9TYcrOlcO3w8z_MjmFdmJt0RoR3vDmym3300FlFEaGoSuRCbEudxaFos4K47R7NRrHuQFwMYlq62Loe0ie9KwH9RgzmOimy45Fc-QottdZIh_W4-mD706x3oFeNJIwNgMpFxcQMCBwEgk74tMr8pM8%3D)

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

Please confirm your standing before MIDNIGHT: Do you stand with President Trump? | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. By joining Team Williams, you will make a difference in your community. | A Note For You, From Roger My commitment to our great state and country is unwavering, and I am grateful to have my wife Patty, our two daughters, and YOU standing beside me on this journey. | Roger Williams Research Team 10 N. Peter,
Earlier this month, my company Heritage Gear announced our special premium flag bags to benefit veterans' mental and physical health. Partnering with [Team Red White and Blue](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=4ac40c2d40&e=b2e0e42b55), we released the bags where 50% of all proceeds go to the critical work this organization does to support our veterans' mental and physical health!
Thanks to you, we’ve raised over $75,000 for Team Red, White and Blue to help veterans!
We even got recognized on Fox News for effort [here](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=1fb7f8192c&e=b2e0e42b55) and [here](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=4c8e2fd23a&e=b2e0e42b55).

Thank you for your support,
Matt Birk

name: Josh Harder
subject: Climate emergency!
body:
Why this is so important

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73561291/438910719/1738685995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTIwZDg2YmYtYTg4NS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T9PUg1wyqBNxxIAjFFzJt02d-zNJj4esxx7FcRDaGio=) | Peter — Did you catch this headline about the state of climate change? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73561292/438910730/1424188937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTIwZDg2YmYtYTg4NS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T9PUg1wyqBNxxIAjFFzJt02d-zNJj4esxx7FcRDaGio=) This report confirms some of our greatest fears about climate change and our future way of life. I truly believe that if we don’t act now, it will be too late to reverse the trend. **That’s why I am not waiting to take action, Peter.** We need every single person and organization involved in fighting back. For my community, that means bringing farmers into the climate solution. **I’m so proud of my Future of Agricultural Resiliency and Modernization (FARM) Act. I’ve worked really hard to get this bill written and it’s one of the few bills in the country with support from the League of Conservation Voters and the Farm Bureau. We can get this done, but we need Congress to actually bring it to a vote!** [_**Will you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of this legislation to help us fight back against climate change?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73561293/438910738/183985157?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTIwZDg2YmYtYTg4NS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T9PUg1wyqBNxxIAjFFzJt02d-zNJj4esxx7FcRDaGio=&emci=8d2c4890-7685-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=e20d86bf-a885-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=6455652) This landmark piece of legislation will bring our farmers into the climate solution. We need agricultural businesses to help us cut carbon emissions. Without them, we’re never going to hit our goals. **To tackle the threat against climate change, we need proactive solutions and support from people like you, Peter. Climate change is not a hoax and we can’t leave it to our kids to deal with. We have to act now.** [_**So, will you add your name to my landmark legislation to help us fight back against climate change?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73561294/438910746/183985157?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTIwZDg2YmYtYTg4NS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T9PUg1wyqBNxxIAjFFzJt02d-zNJj4esxx7FcRDaGio=&emci=8d2c4890-7685-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=e20d86bf-a885-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=6455652) We must meet this moment. — Josh
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. [**Your early investment and support is critical so we can build the grassroots movement we need to win in 2024. clean_body: Why this is so important | = | Peter — Did you catch this headline about the state of climate change? = This report confirms some of our greatest fears about climate change and our future way of life. I truly believe that if we don’t act now, it will be too late to reverse the trend. That’s why I am not waiting to take action, Peter. We need every single person and organization involved in fighting back. For my community, that means bringing farmers into the climate solution. I’m so proud of my Future of Agricultural Resiliency and Modernization (FARM) Act. I’ve worked really hard to get this bill written and it’s one of the few bills in the country with support from the League of Conservation Voters and the Farm Bureau. We can get this done, but we need Congress to actually bring it to a vote! This landmark piece of legislation will bring our farmers into the climate solution. We need agricultural businesses to help us cut carbon emissions. Without them, we’re never going to hit our goals. To tackle the threat against climate change, we need proactive solutions and support from people like you, Peter. Climate change is not a hoax and we can’t leave it to our kids to deal with. We have to act now. We must meet this moment. — Josh *

name: Tom Fitton
subject: NEW Biden WH Cocaine Scandal Details
body:
Biden FBI Abuse Update!

[INSIDE JW]

Documents Suggest that Biden Secret Service Was Set to Destroy WH
Cocaine Evidence

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65875&L=30727&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj16ZlJwRkZHcF9zOCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=50e1c951e965917f4b431370b83cf73b55e4783997f57bb8bc22f05a5d902202]

For nearly two weeks this summer the White House engaged in federal
law enforcement in an investigation of a bag of cocaine discovered in
the West Wing.

We received 112 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65875&L=30694&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3doaXRlLWhvdXNlLWNvY2FpbmUtbm92ZW1iZXItMjAyMy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=707b75065243e8d5a286eaa9593ec79f07a5e7db5f4249fe3a52234b5f752fea]
of Secret Service records from our July 13 FOIA request to the U.S.
Department of Homeland Security (DHS) that include photos and
communications regarding the discovery.

The DHS withheld 34 pages in their entirety under the “foreseeable
harm
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65875&L=30695&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGF3LmNvcm5lbGwuZWR1L3VzY29kZS90ZXh0LzUvNTUyXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=d81bf6e09003cbac61c0a2a75ebc9e43617e359a7bdb236cde891d4cc5ce53dc
standard,
which states “the agency reasonably foresees that disclosure would
harm an interest protected by an exemption ...” and/or the Privacy
Act
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65875&L=30696&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BjbC9wcml2YWN5LWFjdC0xOTc0P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=bc19f23eb8ecfdc038d1fcbd769becbd351d4e56f856d0ea5927c6a689c93302].

Our FOIA request sought records about:

> A white powdery substance found inside the West Wing of the White
> House on July 2, 2023, determined through testing to be the illegal
> drug cocaine.
The cocaine was found in a West Wing phone locker while the Biden
family was away for the Fourth of July weekend at Camp David.

The investigative photos
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65875&L=30697&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3doaXRlLWhvdXNlLWNvY2FpbmUtbm92ZW1iZXItMjAyMy1wZ3MtODAtOTIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=bd845cd7a4e73a5f9dd0349fdf144b152ce01364e03968f422bdd0813aa98b3c]
include the bag of cocaine found near the White House’s West
Executive entrance.

A Secret Service “crime scene examination section evidence repor
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65875&L=30728&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3doaXRlLWhvdXNlLWNvY2FpbmUtbm92ZW1iZXItMjAyMy1wZ3MtNTQtNTUvXXQ/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=22385170636a9f849dd7b2483ed49bf1c33b5d4a828c7796858beb007b6565a3
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65875&L=30698&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3doaXRlLWhvdXNlLWNvY2FpbmUtbm92ZW1iZXItMjAyMy1wZ3MtNTQtNTUvXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=90c0f7bf67aeba8510a22ad20541099b217531da4074e2cdaaf61b2aee549ba1
indicates that the photos were taken on July 2.

The records include a July 2 email

Biden White House cocaine scandal. Few Americans buy that the Biden

ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION COSTS MORE THAN GROSS DOMESTIC PRODUCT OF 15
STATES

The Biden border invasion is dangerous, deadly...and expensive. Our
_Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65875&L=30724&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY29zdC1vZi1pbGxlZ2FsLWltbWlncmF0aW9uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=932376b0ede1e4556707ed98a363911ea33a09c41fdd7f6a1ddb7c76b72b411b]
the
staggering numbers.

> Mass illegal immigration resulting from the Biden administration’s
> open border policies is costing American taxpayers hundreds of
> billions of dollars to provide an unprecedented number of migrants
> with medical treatment, housing, education, and other welfare
> services, not to mention law enforcement. A new congressional report
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65875&L=30729&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ob21lbGFuZC5ob3VzZS5nb3Yvd3AtY29udGVudC91cGxvYWRzLzIwMjMvMTEvUGhhc2U0UmVwb3J0LnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=10d9ef8eed864938b3190aa47a3a5441b13fee15b68c351f771ddad866dd213c]
> that includes federal and state figures reveals the shocking price
> of supporting an estimated 16.8 to 29 million illegal aliens
> currently living in the United States. The “net cost of illegal
> immigration is greater than the annual gross domestic product (GDP)
> of 15 different states,” according to the lengthy report,
> published this week by the House Committee on Homeland Security.
> “Illegal immigration costs every American taxpayer a net average
> of $956—or $1,156 before the taxes paid by illegal aliens are
> factored in.”
>
> Healthcare is among the biggest expenses with Medicaid costs for
> “emergency services for undocumented aliens” exceeding $12.4
> billion in the last two years, according to figures provided to
> committee members by the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services.
> In fiscal year 2022, which ended in September, improper Medicaid
> payouts across the U.S. totaled more than $80 billion with around $8
> billion going to illegal aliens. In New York City hospitals recorded
> about 30,000 visits by illegal immigrants in the past year along
> with approximately 300 births. A Yuma County, Arizona lawmaker
> recently testified before Congress that the maternity ward and
> emergency room at Yuma Regional Medical Center has incurred over $26
> million in uncompensated costs for illegal immigrants.
>
> Housing migrants is another huge expense that is forecasted to reach
> as much as $451 billion, according to figures cited in the
> congressional report. New York City alone is on track to spend over
> $12 billion by 2023 to provide shelter for tens of thousands of
> illegal aliens that have arrived since spring 2022. Chicago is
> spending north of $20 million a month to “house and support”
> illegal aliens and Washington D.C. is doling out more than $52
> million to house the large groups of migrants that have settled into
> the capital area recently. “Because [DHS Secretary Alejandro]
> Mayorkas refuses to follow the law requiring him to detain and
> remove illegal aliens, towns and cities across the country have been
> forced to pick up the costs of housing and providing shelter for the
> hundreds of thousands that have been released into their
> communities,” the report states. “This reality has been
> documented everywhere from small towns thousands of miles from the
> border, all the way to America’s largest cities.”
>
> Education and law enforcement are two other major expenses for the
> U.S. government, states, and local municipalities nationwide. Nearly
> four million illegal aliens attend public schools around the country
> and most receive special services for Limited English Proficiency
> (LEP) costing American taxpayers nearly $59 billion. New York City
> alone is spending around $440 million to educate about 11,500
> illegal aliens who will likely remain in the system next year.
> Police expenditures provided by the National Institute of
> Corrections reveal that illegal immigrants cost states nearly $9
> billion in 2022 with judicial expenses around $3.72 billion and
> prison costs about $6.2 billion. Department of Justice (DOJ)
> statistics cited in the report disclose that 25,000 criminal aliens
> are in federal prisons at an annual price tag of approximately
> $40,000 per incarcerated individual, which means taxpayers are
> doling out nearly $1 billion to lock up criminal illegal aliens.
>
> Other migrant costs include billions of dollars for transportation
> and welfare benefits such as food stamps. In fiscal year 2022 the
> government spent around $5.8 billion to provide millions of illegal
> immigrants with food stamps, according to figures provided in the
> new congressional report. Another welfare program known as Women,
> Infants, and Children (WIC) that gives low-income pregnant women and
> their children up to the age of five nutritious food disperses over
> $1.3 billion in benefits each year to illegal immigrants.
> Transportation costs listed in the document include more than $75
> million in Texas to transfer migrants from the state, around $3.5
> million for dozens of buses that departed Arizona to Washington D.C.
> and $12 million to the Florida Department of Transportation for
> illegal alien relocation. Additionally, the federal government spent
> at least $340 million transporting illegal immigrants into the
> interior last year and $660 million to relocate alien family units
> and minors, which are classified as Unaccompanied Alien Children
> (UAC).

clean_body: Biden FBI Abuse Update! [INSIDE JW] Documents Suggest that Biden Secret Service Was Set to Destroy WH Cocaine Evidence [] For nearly two weeks this summer the White House engaged in federal law enforcement in an investigation of a bag of cocaine discovered in the West Wing. We received 112 pages [] of Secret Service records from our July 13 FOIA request to the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) that include photos and communications regarding the discovery. The DHS withheld 34 pages in their entirety under the “foreseeable harm [ standard, which states “the agency reasonably foresees that disclosure would harm an interest protected by an exemption ...” and/or the Privacy Act []. Our FOIA request sought records about: A white powdery substance found inside the West Wing of the White House on July 2, 2023, determined through testing to be the illegal drug cocaine. The cocaine was found in a West Wing phone locker while the Biden family was away for the Fourth of July weekend at Camp David. The investigative photos [] include the bag of cocaine found near the White House’s West Executive entrance. A Secret Service “crime scene examination section evidence repor [ [ indicates that the photos were taken on July 2. The records include a July 2 email [] sent by a Secret Service public information officer whose name is redacted regarding a “suspicious substance at [the] White House:” A 1" by 1" bag of white powdery substance was found near where pass holders put their phones when going into the [redacted] here. UD [Uniformed Division] Crime Scene tested it for drugs but came back inconclusive. TSD couldn't determine what it was. Closures were made for caution. DCFEMS [DC Fire & Emergency Medical Services] HAZMAT is on scene as of this email. An incident report [] written on July 2 regarding a “suspicious package/incident” details the activities undertaken by the Secret Service Crime Scene Search Unit, the DC Hazmat team and the FBI’s WMD [Weapons of Mass Destruction] Directorate in handling the then-undetermined substance. An additional July 2 incident report [] indicates the investigation lasted 12 days and that “cocaine and sodium bicarbonate were identified within the Item 1-1 powder” and that DNA “test results did not identify an individual responsible for the placement of the item within the West Wing of the White House Complex.” The report states that on July 14 the cocaine was “placed on the property/evidence book for ‘destruction.’” A July 3 email [] from a person in the Technical Security Division whose name is redacted states: Starting time Approx 1745 [5:45 p.m.] UD [Uniform Division] advised of a small ziploc bag approximately less than 1" in by 1" in the cell phone lockers by [redacted] was confident it was drug related thus the phone call to UD CRIME SCENE. A July 10 email [] indicates that no identifiable prints were found on the bag. On July 13, the Deputy Chief of the U.S. Secret Service Foreign Missions Branch sent a report [] to the Uniform Division, indicating that the bag of “unknown white powdery substance” was identified as cocaine by the FBI laboratory. These photos and documents detail the disruption and expense of the Biden White House cocaine scandal. Few Americans buy that the Biden administration can’t figure out who brought this cocaine into the West Wing. Indeed, the lack of documentation about the “investigation” of who was responsible is striking. BIDEN FBI OFFICIALS RUSHED TO RESPOND TO LEAKED MEMO ON ITS TARGETING OF CATHOLICS Along with CatholicVote Civic Action, we just received 131 heavily redacted pages [] of records from the Federal Bureau of Investigations (FBI) showing top officials rushing to craft a public response to the leaked [] FBI intelligence memo that revealed its targeting of Catholics who adhere to traditional beliefs on church issues. The FBI launched a vicious spy effort against Catholics and sought to spy on parishioners as they sat in church pews. These records show top FBI officials were panicked in response about their domestic spying abuse leaking out. The records were uncovered thanks to an April 2023 FOIA lawsuit [] we filed along with CatholicVote [] Civic Action against the FBI and the Department of Justice after their failure to respond to March 2023 requests for records about an FBI intelligence memo targeting “radical traditionalist” Catholics (CatholicVote Civic Action and Judicial Watch, Inc. v. Federal Bureau of Investigations and Department of Justice [ (No. 1:23-cv-01166)). In February 2023, an FBI intelligence document was leaked [] that revealed FBI targeting of Catholics who adhere to traditional beliefs on abortion and other cultural issues. The Catholic News Agency reported [ “The leaked document has been condemned by several federal and state officials, as well as clergy, including Bishop Barry Knestout [] of the Diocese of Richmond, who recently called the memo a ‘threat to religious liberty.’” The newly obtained records include a February 8, 2023, email [] with the subject line “Media Request: FBI Richmond Document cites SPLC” from the FBI’s National Press Office alerting FBI officials regarding media inquiries: We have inquiries from the Washington Examiner and The Daily Signal (Heritage Foundation) about an article written by [redacted]. It references a January intelligence product from the Richmond Field office. After speaking with SC Goodwater, I am alerting all of you so we can get a copy of the actual document and hear any recommendations on how to respond. I am attaching a cut and paste of the [redacted] article. Miriam Coakley of the Office of General Counsel then forwards the email on to other FBI officials, noting, “Adding InTo [Insider Threat Office], SecD [Security Division] and OPR [Office of Professional Responsibility]. The date of the leaked domain perspective appears to be 23 Jan. 2023.” Further along the chain, an official in the Office of Public Affairs forwards the chain to more people, saying, “Adding Pamela Bryon from the DI. [Deputy Asst. Director of Intelligence Pamela Byron [].] Any info on how this product came about would be appreciated.” In a heavily redacted reply [], Byron responds: As mentioned on FBINET, the type of product leaked is a Domain Perspective (DP) – the purpose of DPs is to offer information and/or highlight how a shift or new development in an AOR (domain) related to an environmental variable could impact the threat. Environmental variables include demographic shifts, technology development, economic conditions, special events, social/cultural conditions, etc. In particular the analysis in DPs (as in FBI products in general) is focused on the activity of identified or potential threat actors, not on the environmental variables themselves, and how those threat actors react to shifts in the environment, and the subsequent impact on the threat posed by those actors. In that context, there are a couple of things to note with this situation: [redacted]. We stand by to assist on any other questions. The records include a February 9 email [] with the subject line “Coordination of Draft statement regarding leaked RH intel document” from Office of Public Affairs official Douglas Goodwater to top FBI officials, including FBI Chief of Staff Johathan Lenzner, Asst. Dir. for Intelligence Tonya Ugoretz, Asst. Dir. for Counterterrorism Robert Wells and others: Draft/pre decision, Coordination for media statement – DI/CTD/OGC [Directorate of Intelligence/Counterterrorism Division/Office of General Counsel] Potential statement for review/edits-: [Redacted]. Asst. Director for Public Affairs Catherine Milhoan then responds: All, we have received two new inquiries in addition to the three last night and are making the decision to respond in the next hour. We want to get our statement out before this picks up any steam. DI/CTD/OCG, Please review the draft and let us know if you have any edits or concerns. Later in the email chain, Stanley Meador, Special Agent-in-Charge of the Richmond Field Office, replies, “Looks good. One small suggestion in yellow. I would send it out. It is migrating onto Fox: On February 10, 2023, FBI Chief of Staff Jonathan Lenzner emails [] FBI colleagues with the subject “intel piece that has been withdrawn,” saying, “I don’t know if we are there yet, [redacted].” Lenzner then follows up on February 13, writing, “Looks like at least one religious organization is speaking out publicly: Ryan T. Young, the Executive Assistant Director of the Intelligence Branch replies to Lenzner, “Not a good look ... Real frustrating when it is self-inflicted. I’ll be back in town Wednesday. We can look into next best steps.” “After seven months of delay and more to come, Joe Biden’s FBI remains committed to one thing: covering up their un-American spying on Catholic citizens,” said former Congressman Huelskamp, Ph.D., Senior Advisor to CatholicVote. “By fully withholding more than 200 pages of public documents, the Biden administration is more interested in hiding the truth than ending this unconstitutional witch hunt of Catholics and other faithful Americans.” (CatholicVote.org [] is a community of patriotic Americans who believe that the timeless truths of the Catholic faith are good for America. It makes its mission “to inspire every Catholic in America to live out the truths of our faith in public life.”) ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION COSTS MORE THAN GROSS DOMESTIC PRODUCT OF 15 STATES The Biden border invasion is dangerous, deadly...and expensive. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [] the staggering numbers. Mass illegal immigration resulting from the Biden administration’s open border policies is costing American taxpayers hundreds of billions of dollars to provide an unprecedented number of migrants with medical treatment, housing, education, and other welfare services, not to mention law enforcement. A new congressional report [] that includes federal and state figures reveals the shocking price of supporting an estimated 16.8 to 29 million illegal aliens currently living in the United States. The “net cost of illegal immigration is greater than the annual gross domestic product (GDP) of 15 different states,” according to the lengthy report, published this week by the House Committee on Homeland Security. “Illegal immigration costs every American taxpayer a net average of $956—or $1,156 before the taxes paid by illegal aliens are factored in.” Healthcare is among the biggest expenses with Medicaid costs for “emergency services for undocumented aliens” exceeding $12.4 billion in the last two years, according to figures provided to committee members by the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services. In fiscal year 2022, which ended in September, improper Medicaid payouts across the U.S. totaled more than $80 billion with around $8 billion going to illegal aliens. In New York City hospitals recorded about 30,000 visits by illegal immigrants in the past year along with approximately 300 births. A Yuma County, Arizona lawmaker recently testified before Congress that the maternity ward and emergency room at Yuma Regional Medical Center has incurred over $26 million in uncompensated costs for illegal immigrants. Housing migrants is another huge expense that is forecasted to reach as much as $451 billion, according to figures cited in the congressional report. New York City alone is on track to spend over $12 billion by 2023 to provide shelter for tens of thousands of illegal aliens that have arrived since spring 2022. Chicago is spending north of $20 million a month to “house and support” illegal aliens and Washington D.C. is doling out more than $52 million to house the large groups of migrants that have settled into the capital area recently. “Because [DHS Secretary Alejandro] Mayorkas refuses to follow the law requiring him to detain and remove illegal aliens, towns and cities across the country have been forced to pick up the costs of housing and providing shelter for the hundreds of thousands that have been released into their communities,” the report states. “This reality has been documented everywhere from small towns thousands of miles from the border, all the way to America’s largest cities.” Education and law enforcement are two other major expenses for the U.S. government, states, and local municipalities nationwide. Nearly four million illegal aliens attend public schools around the country and most receive special services for Limited English Proficiency (LEP) costing American taxpayers nearly $59 billion. New York City alone is spending around $440 million to educate about 11,500 illegal aliens who will likely remain in the system next year. Police expenditures provided by the National Institute of Corrections reveal that illegal immigrants cost states nearly $9 billion in 2022 with judicial expenses around $3.72 billion and prison costs about $6.2 billion. Department of Justice (DOJ) statistics cited in the report disclose that 25,000 criminal aliens are in federal prisons at an annual price tag of approximately $40,000 per incarcerated individual, which means taxpayers are doling out nearly $1 billion to lock up criminal illegal aliens. Other migrant costs include billions of dollars for transportation and welfare benefits such as food stamps. In fiscal year 2022 the government spent around $5.8 billion to provide millions of illegal immigrants with food stamps, according to figures provided in the new congressional report. Another welfare program known as Women, Infants, and Children (WIC) that gives low-income pregnant women and their children up to the age of five nutritious food disperses over $1.3 billion in benefits each year to illegal immigrants. Transportation costs listed in the document include more than $75 million in Texas to transfer migrants from the state, around $3.5 million for dozens of buses that departed Arizona to Washington D.C. and $12 million to the Florida Department of Transportation for illegal alien relocation. Additionally, the federal government spent at least $340 million transporting illegal immigrants into the interior last year and $660 million to relocate alien family units and minors, which are classified as Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC). name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Money corrupts—especially in our nation’s capital

body:
Did you know that just eleven members of Congress—out of 435—refuses donations from federal lobbyists?
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=33304%2E3422442%2E6PK7rn)
Derek, did you know this?
Just _eleven_ members of Congress—out of 435!—refuse donations from federal lobbyists.
Well, Katie is proud to be the **only U.S. Senate candidate from California** who’s one of them.
Especially because:
* In 2022, the oil and gas industry spent **$124.4 million** to lobby the federal government;
* Big Pharma spent **$29.2 million** on federal lobbying;
* And just 6 months into 2023, financial firms representing multinational corporations spent more than **$1 million** lobbying against the Inflation Reduction Act’s corporate minimum tax.

Money corrupts—especially in our nation’s capital. And if lobbyists want to meet with Katie, they better bring their ideas—**not their checkbooks.**
**We can win this race without their money, Derek. Because we have one thing our opponents don’t—we have supporters like you.[Chip in $5 today to power our fight to send Katie to the U.S. Senate so she can keep standing up to bad actors and corporate special interests who are fighting against working people.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231117-2?refcode=EMAN23_2_LOB_20231117_V1_F&refcode2=33304_3422442_6PK7rn&akid=33304%2E3422442%2E6PK7rn)**

Onward,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN23_2_LOB_20231117_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=33304_3422442_6PK7rn&akid=33304%2E3422442%2E6PK7rn)**

clean_body: Did you know that just eleven members of Congress—out of 435—refuses donations from federal lobbyists? Derek, did you know this? Just eleven members of Congress—out of 435!—refuse donations from federal lobbyists. Well, Katie is proud to be the only U.S. Senate candidate from California who’s one of them. Especially because: In 2022, the oil and gas industry spent $124.4 million to lobby the federal government; Big Pharma spent $29.2 million on federal lobbying; And just 6 months into 2023, financial firms representing multinational corporations spent more than $1 million lobbying against the Inflation Reduction Act’s corporate minimum tax. Money corrupts—especially in our nation’s capital. And if lobbyists want to meet with Katie, they better bring their ideas—not their checkbooks. We can win this race without their money, Derek. Because we have one thing our opponents don’t—we have supporters like you. Onward, Team Katie Porter Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I’d love to meet you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Be my VIP Guest at my beautiful golf club next month.| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=42a49d17894b48848134723cd4855df1&_e=hLvjp3xgw57NwWpFlEwnXVK0JxngD-3uldQgRvl-62yZvqNRM9EJPUt9PlxKbCd5JdO1DisSryJWmU8LLlYMGLyPWFFBUmtEUayoUxyBbRluXx-3itMeDFvGB-rOkmZF_jON6gVy4nMjHeUvbWkUaiHnlF97P_21YNa-WcR7aYkTsm68Ajf3qFNMe6kwC-LCpgvIBEGY3SjmS3_L3fgDp0Vf12Xu-QOJsk2S2eRKiirFqJmMVN7WklfekomazmhNa1u-IzIj6uHCwUtcZEAmQ304wxMlDqZvzaq-buIgK6ErDEiPjYTheLEuGMwF004_4VG2kVtYT9KkKUV_DMuZjZe_QF8Ybm2oaWwV5jqwjPyJtWg5Q2vhmz5XqZ2x7n0g3SgoYZeKLhkHQYcDHvX25Dss344gDX4hr53k-w2Binzfg5WnUx2j49uL6lIpkIewwrL-7u5wfK3NIVSXHclyUG4MSme6WmPbO5EUCHkqym7qtgIXuVU_pMv1Y9EifhGt)
---
| | Patriot,

---
How would you like to meet your one and only 45th _(and future 47th)_ President?
---
**_Because I’d certainly love to meet YOU!_**

---
In honor of officially crossing the 1-year-out mark from the most important election of our lifetimes, I’m hosting a special reception at my beautiful Trump International Golf Club in West Palm Beach, Florida... _and I’d like YOU to be my_ __VIP GUEST__ _!_

---
With less than a year to go, we’re DOMINATING the primary like no one’s ever seen before (a 60-point frontrunner!), we’re leading Crooked Joe nationally by double digits, and we’re even beating him in all the biggest battleground states that will no doubt decide the 2024 election.
---
But such an important event wouldn’t feel complete without the most critical part of _our_ movement in attendance – grassroots supporters like you, Patriot.

---
Which is why I’m going to fly one lucky winner plus a guest of your choice out to Florida for __FREE__ _!_

---
I’ll cover your hotel, you’ll get to enjoy hors d'oeuvres and refreshments on me, and we’ll even take a photo together so that you can always remember this special moment.

---
_But right now, all you have to do is enter to win!_

---
**[Please make a contribution of any amount to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN and you’ll be automatically entered to WIN – and hopefully, I’ll be seeing YOU very soon!](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=42a49d17894b48848134723cd4855df1&_e=hLvjp3xgw57NwWpFlEwnXVK0JxngD-3uldQgRvl-62yZvqNRM9EJPUt9PlxKbCd5JdO1DisSryJWmU8LLlYMGLyPWFFBUmtEUayoUxyBbRluXx-3itMeDFvGB-rOkmZF_jON6gVy4nMjHeUvbWkUaiHnlF97P_21YNa-WcR7aYkTsm68Ajf3qFNMe6kwC-LCpgvIBEGY3SjmS3_L3fgDp0Vf12Xu-QOJsk2S2eRKiirFqJmMVN7WklfekomazmhNa1u-IzIj6uHCwUtcZEAmQ304wxMlDqZvzaq-buIgK6ErDEiPjYTheLEuGMwF004_4VG2kVtYT9KkKUV_DMuZjXy4kEbNGD0VeAUJI9nDaQ5mp0DdMNPFFqUXX8BnQhIAbdB63IpqFyvh-AQ0LNtXFOVeAcdWZmN_tey3LkfDUXPCroHWHchZyIF8M-zNSNMsNMCoiN0IoeWY1UsmVkNpKNhfZZwINU6RgMXc7KFZQ29LDxHXgrNWUnkzxsoaW09D)**
---

Because I’d certainly love to meet YOU! In honor of officially crossing the 1-year-out mark from the most important election of our lifetimes, I’m hosting a special reception at my beautiful Trump International Golf Club in West Palm Beach, Florida... and I’d like YOU to be my VIP GUEST ! With less than a year to go, we’re DOMINATING the primary like no one’s ever seen before (a 60-point frontrunner!), we’re leading Crooked Joe nationally by double digits, and we’re even beating him in all the biggest battleground states that will no doubt decide the 2024 election. But such an important event wouldn’t feel complete without the most critical part of our movement in attendance – grassroots supporters like you, Patriot. Which is why I’m going to fly one lucky winner plus a guest of your choice out to Florida for FREE ! I’ll cover your hotel, you’ll get to enjoy hors d'oeuvres and refreshments on me, and we’ll even take a photo together so that you can always remember this special moment. [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xsddn-didthutlhu-r/) **TOMORROW** is our final National Day of Action in 2023, and we need you in the fight with us! We are less than 2 weeks away from our deadline to nominate our Republican poll workers for the 2024-2025 elections. Nominating these paid election officials is the best way for Republicans to ensure there is election integrity and security throughout Wisconsin in our next 5 elections! [SIGN-UP TO BE A POLL WORKER](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xsddn-didthutlhu-y/) **Why Be a Poll Worker?** 1️⃣ Protect the Vote: Stand up for election integrity! Register to become a Poll Worker and ensure our elections are safe and secure! 2️⃣ Bank Your Vote: Don't just vote - BANK your vote! Commit to voting early to ensure your vote is cast--don't leave your vote to chance. Pledge to Bank Your Vote here: [wi.bankyourvote.com](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xsddn-didthutlhu-i/) 3️⃣ Organize: Together, we are stronger. Organize and mobilize your community to amplify our impact. Share information, spark conversations, drive positive change, and recruit volunteers for 2024!
# _**POLL WORKER DEADLINE**_
Your dedication is crucial in shaping the future of our community. Thank you for signing up for this vital role. Together, let's make our National Day of Action one that echoes the power of positive change!Team WisGOP | **PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. www.WisGOP.org Republican Party of Wisconsin **|** 148 E. subject: I sat down with Senator Rand Paul and discussed
body:
securing the southern border, COVID tyranny, and the Senator’s latest book.

Contact: Noah Betz; 281-928-2089
[noah@bluestonecreatives.com](mailto:noah@bluestonecreatives.com) Hello patriots!This week, I sat down with Senator Rand Paul and discussed securing the southern border, COVID tyranny, and the Senator's latest book. Our Texas Border is under attack. I joined the Kenny Webster Show to discuss the root cause of the border invasion (it's not what you might think).ALSO, the Huffines Liberty Foundation has released STARTLING new research on how much illegal immigration is costing Texas taxpayers. **Fireside Chat with Huffines and Senator Rand Paul** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-virtiut-yuddtktydi-y/) Senator Rand Paul is an expert on exposing Fauci's lies. Watch our discussion on all things Liberty, COVID tyranny, and more![_Click here to watch my fireside chat with Senator Rand Paul._](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-virtiut-yuddtktydi-j/) **Huffines and Webster on How to End the Texas Border Invasion** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-virtiut-yuddtktydi-t/) This week, I joined The Kenny Webster Show to discuss the root cause of the Texas Border invasion._[Click here to l](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-virtiut-yuddtktydi-h/)_[ _isten to my interview with Kenny Webster._](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-virtiut-yuddtktydi-k/) **NEW HLF RESEARCH: Reducing Illegal Immigration and its Costs in Texas** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-virtiut-yuddtktydi-u/) "Huffines wants Texas to eliminate in-state tuition for illegals, and require proof of citizenship for students and their parents, and require Texas schools to report non-citizens."_[Click here to r](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-virtiut-yuddtktydi-o/)_[ _ead Huffines Liberty Foundation's latest research on reducing illegal immigration._](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-virtiut-yuddtktydi-b/) May God bless you, your family, and the great state of Texas. Our greatest days are coming. See you on the battlefield!For Liberty, Prosperity, and Virtue Always, Don Huffines
_Father, papa, businessman, and former TX Senator_ P.S. name: Your America
subject: The Future of Hearing Aids
body:
This powerful secret weapon against hearing loss is crushing the market

| [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36685%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jab3qACPuR0IENg5usVKZg&sysid=1)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36686%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OwS82I6WFu944RrWL1ag0Q&sysid=1)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they’ve seen in over a decade.

It’s called **Horizon by hear.com.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36687%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EvSyQYeWaTDR%2bFmXeBseFA&sysid=1)
[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36686%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OwS82I6WFu944RrWL1ag0Q&sysid=1)
What makes Horizon so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you’ll completely forget you’re wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It’s not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It’s about speech clarity. And that’s precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36687%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EvSyQYeWaTDR%2bFmXeBseFA&sysid=1)

Your America News
---

[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9506%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=QeqqwGGd5zGrcVS8Jv%2faBw&sysid=1)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: BREAKING - SkyTree Book Fairs challenges Scholastic’s monopoly
body:
Here’s what we’re up against.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674719%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JskHccH1oKDALVvFEDT1mw&sysid=1 "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children’s schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here’s what we’re up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from “Welcome to St. Hell,” a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We’ve censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674710%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wv5l4c3uRCZ608KZlOvncg&sysid=1)[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674710%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wv5l4c3uRCZ608KZlOvncg&sysid=1)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here’s how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674711%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PlK1yxJnWYK4%2f%2fzcZnjQzA&sysid=1)

[Donate](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674712%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aNer0KqXJkiaDBFHupFVhw&sysid=1)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children’s book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here’s the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it’s working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

Friend,

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0vmrq2005aptjjgmjs3qhm7r9cpa9f6gqic3l2g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg6aoj6cdh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9cjdo2rkqjk99pphtbujouo4sbl668h4qclp3e8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg6aoj6cdh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8ec8v15qkfhhl036p5lf9a5q79a6vfgbp30msr0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg6aoj6cdh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjt6hchsvj2tng3lf415kfj3uba79npc25mlkqb0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg6aoj6cdh2bs)
---

The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. name: 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5645p553vdh9mdkve6r974jrbkbu776v7e2l438_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg6aoj6chh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6c7vo43i1q1en6boftricje485dre1o5v198djg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg6aoj6chh2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2ldovrb9gllrp1hkjbibqak6gpqbn0ktq755uu8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg6aoj6chh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgk7k30ji9bkhdt7pmrcc0fg5doc32or7or3elig_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg6aoj6chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---

### _Friday, November 17, 2023_

### _Wednesday, November 15, 2023_
Impeachment is a valuable tool in the Congressional arsenal but it is not to be used for political gain no matter what party is in power. Also, Guns are soon to be back in front of the Supreme Court, and the country needs to understand the cost of bad Criminal Justice Reform. ### _Monday, November 13, 2023_
The Congress is under the last week of the current CR, which if it expires means the Government shuts down. What are the ideas to get the process going and how will it work? name: CPT Sam Brown
subject: I thought I’d taken my last breath…
body:
But straying from God’s plan is a fate far worse than death, Friend.

| |
---
| | |
_**I thought I’d taken my last breath ...**_

But straying from God’s plan is a fate far worse than death, Friend.

This is Afghanistan war veteran Sam Brown -- When a roadside bomb detonated under the fuel tank of my vehicle while serving in Afghanistan, I thought my time on this earth was over.

But God was watching over me and my fellow soldiers that day, as the flames on my body were extinguished.

It wasn’t a twist of fate. It wasn’t a stroke of luck. I know with every fiber of my being that I am only standing here today because of God’s grace.

**[And it’s because of God’s grace that, today, I’m running for U.S. Senate.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36683%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7fJywsWVHW0SHoEJxkBeJg&sysid=1 "And it’s because of God’s
grace that, today, I’m running for U.S. Senate.")**

Friend, God has saved me in more ways than one -- _**and I won’t take the new life he’s given me for granted.**_

Since that day, I’ve met the woman of my dreams. I’ve had 3 beautiful children. I started a business working to get veterans the critical medications they need. And my dedication to making this country better for my family and every American has never been stronger.

Though I’m new to the ugly game of politics, I’ve never feared stepping into the political arena -- no matter how many millions of dollars Chuck Schumer commits to destroy me & my campaign.

_**NOTHING**_ will change my decision to fight for you -- because the truth is, the call to serve is one I had to answer.

**People say I’m not a politician. They tell me I don’t stand a chance. **

I’m used to being an underdog & that’s exactly why I’m the **ONLY** one who knows what it means to truly fight with everything I have for **YOU.**

**[Do you have a minute today to support me in the biggest battle I’ve ever faced?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36684%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XtyWk10eAqgwZCoODfbqbA&sysid=1 "Do you have a minute today
to support me in the biggest battle I’ve ever faced?")**

Duty First,

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36695%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7PPqwhxD6ljYCLq5e3Eh5g&sysid=1)
---

CPT Sam Brown, USA, Ret.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: BREAKING - SkyTree Book Fairs challenges Scholastic’s monopoly
body:
Here’s what we’re up against.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z072jh6p40m1pfqvupfefbfnl9j0h4iroddmbgf8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z186g1qujo91okunn7kltp2n862jc0j9gr04l0eg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs)[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zht5m28of2dt7cl3ljda2u5r7lt3u37e3l0ldbj8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo42hroboevsk8bu7qjpmsnm0bmj0lq7i8coi5o0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs)

[Donate](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z17vi6j5lrpqfpqnc18rjd2145sq8cuvofokeq0o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

[Donate $10 >>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znejebi1akim5ilpornhbokhl81rt8qhomna86tg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z97hv2kcsjbf4qinv7g9p3pgcc1dkistqmir93lg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zll52vkt2l9qqo90fdm69k3fumq2oe69ch1avhjo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9ckqp1etg5sggqt2i97c1hjfv7me1t42la18k30_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpl3ie08fah87btp887j74k7iuhie6cf8sh8sebo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z00e24ra3l0gkipi5q1cimat7b2990j7i7c4jbl8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlgrmd0uhhi7bbkedrnk5bseh8kl6gv4nv49uc2g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1uosck60itrfcvjnipf6a5ofulgha6idvj4pke0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs)

Let's bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

It's not complicated! It's what you and I grew up with.

Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic!

God bless,

Kirk Cameron

P.S. Scholastic's monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation.

I've partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic.

[Help us raise $100,000 to fund book fairs this spring semester at schools. Click here to donate >>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjc1qoesaikg023hdbk5e18gshdanr7803et6ng8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs)

A reminder of what we're up against:

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zko62n760950cqeqaantsfqbk1cfentla2365lk0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs)

It's time to fight back.

You and I cannot afford to do nothing and let the woke mob indoctrinate millions of children.

[Click here to donate and help SkyTree change the world.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqn1h15u7a8rc2bs6ko2d3opgqp7ni0kqthba0c0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8tei7d1fn8nofrrd88l6l83l0hr8h59s6sfm4a0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o72c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuac0i23jptnu4kubimdd5jjkhq132rkd6cvp9v8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o72c1h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp59jhj4gce4i3iadjqibp9ks2bpmmn3ejgcam20_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o72c1h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb1pivp22j2tneifvr90ljlsh1vv6rv71seje3k0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o72c1h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvqpj13d6uhufmagh3osqctotngfhc5hskqe18rg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqa0ls3b9j7327a5td01mt3puikg37auc9u9g940_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9fnphiai1ttrrj6h6ogaq2p9jr45a5fc1kfuom8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs)

name: CPT Sam Brown
subject: I thought I’d taken my last breath…
body:
But straying from God’s plan is a fate far worse than death, Friend.

| |
---
| | |
_**I thought I’d taken my last breath ...**_

But straying from God’s plan is a fate far worse than death, Friend.

This is Afghanistan war veteran Sam Brown -- When a roadside bomb detonated under the fuel tank of my vehicle while serving in Afghanistan, I thought my time on this earth was over.

But God was watching over me and my fellow soldiers that day, as the flames on my body were extinguished.

It wasn’t a twist of fate. It wasn’t a stroke of luck. I know with every fiber of my being that I am only standing here today because of God’s grace.

**[And it’s because of God’s grace that, today, I’m running for U.S. Senate.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674746%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dZ2N0Riwdvz5M5Ab1%2fZcOw&sysid=1 "And it’s because of God’s
grace that, today, I’m running for U.S. Senate.")**

Friend, God has saved me in more ways than one -- _**and I won’t take the new life he’s given me for granted.**_

Since that day, I’ve met the woman of my dreams. I’ve had 3 beautiful children. I started a business working to get veterans the critical medications they need. And my dedication to making this country better for my family and every American has never been stronger.

Though I’m new to the ugly game of politics, I’ve never feared stepping into the political arena -- no matter how many millions of dollars Chuck Schumer commits to destroy me & my campaign.

_**NOTHING**_ will change my decision to fight for you -- because the truth is, the call to serve is one I had to answer.

**People say I’m not a politician. They tell me I don’t stand a chance. **

I’m used to being an underdog & that’s exactly why I’m the **ONLY** one who knows what it means to truly fight with everything I have for **YOU.**

**[Do you have a minute today to support me in the biggest battle I’ve ever faced?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674747%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f2BB5V%2beoHOV5Bbc8nKJdA&sysid=1 "Do you have a minute today
to support me in the biggest battle I’ve ever faced?")**

Duty First,

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674748%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TgnkxhZqx2nt03zwxH4Wag&sysid=1)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhpf6eo0cmpgkel1goujp0g01597ia4t1n6uhph8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk30b7na7j7tdm8ttljog00k9dbivmbsvd3p7tl0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zln6ddbnr8j9qgrhvqnshf7gv9angsqaogtt750o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpg61o76c3h2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Your America
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36694%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8gVK07Dd4gcFzI6GqdqRxA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36605%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bWIALGYhaYaFIHegzqJY1Q&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36606%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AwDozHAEqDSkKrVc7aRnjw&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36607%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KlSXOTR%2faAiOVn6CWt6fUw&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America News
