clean_body: C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That’s why we produced “” which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z13i6hq02tse1qbpvukrnmr4c0748nc8nq3ge1l0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpi64ob2chh2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z962ko80ja9baebj9jlgskl159auvfj8ke3mhg08_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpi64ob2chh2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5hc12ke0en1q87peug2hh7cgaenl7l946mc24q0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpi64ob2chh2bs)**

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcmcgksvsuosueotjiheoa331ubd1jvnmil533dg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpi64ob1cph2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp98s7e2ug6fgeiv008kc2g68b2rvoli66e9ug30_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpi64ob1cph2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmq1h41vdosv8sdq6cifjqrr5flprfmfbidm40t8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpi64ob1cph2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkqdi8oleust17qou4uk768kofrg1she9pa89ia8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpi64ob1cph2bs)
---

body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW3NX6AidN

Next November, with me as your nominee, we will defeat Joe Biden
and END the culture of losing

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW3NX6AidN

Friend,

On
November 7th, nationwide, we saw yet another election day where
the Republican party lost. We cannot continue to accept this. Our
moment to choose winning-to choose success over decline, to
choose freedom over control-is now.

Allowing Joe Biden to continue to run our country in 2024 would
mean continuing to watch gas prices soar, woke corporations to
take advantage of consumers, and woke indoctrination to run
rampant in our schools. The precedent we're allowing to take root
is dangerous.

Friend, I need your support to ensure that an outcome like we saw
this election day does not prevail next November.

SEND IN $25 OF SUPPORT NOW

We've got to nominate a winner. And I am stepping up to lead. We
showed that we CAN get this done when we turned a swing state
into a red state one year ago. We not only won the greatest
Republican victory in a governor's race in Florida history, but
we also helped elect a record number of Republicans up-and-down
the ballot.

Outside of a few states, Republicans have consistently
underperformed over the past few election cycles. The time for
excuses is over.

Next November, with me as your nominee, we will defeat Joe Biden
and END the culture of losing that has infected our party. It's
time to fight, win, and lead, and with your help, there will be
nothing standing in our way. We need to come together, Friend.

PITCH IN
$25

PITCH IN
$47

PITCH IN
$75

PITCH IN
$100

PITCH IN
$150

PITCH IN
$250

The
time to act is now. The time for leadership is now.

I
am humbly asking for your support today, Friend. Join me, and we
will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the
Republican party. We will keep the woke indoctrination away from
kids, the way we live our lives, the curriculum taught in
schools, and the consumer choices we make. I promise you: this
nonsense, this culture of losing, does not go beyond 2024.

Yours in Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

Ron DeSantis comes from
blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to
him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the
Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate
degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was
so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered
to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a
life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and
now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting
to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in
this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every
turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and
consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his
life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and
3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that
this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents
face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political
agenda down the throats of children.

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has
promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected
bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to
children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by
immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our
southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the
mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring
our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on
track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record
speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment,
politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the
legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his
leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has
stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next
President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill
for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for
President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the
decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for
another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act
is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqtf77bpeq6j2huo9l0r9a9jj4nnk5e1t1rujam8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpi69or2cph2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdn3d252buvbjopurvunsgd4epfmvbgg0jttr88o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpi69or2cph2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg4avkomahrek8529sc45sdjuiffa96avtijkba8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpi69or2cph2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z424lg4k81cumphrlo1748f2a0uj6ijq86fjjuq8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cpi69or2cph2bs)
---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Protect an American national treasure on our public lands![_Sign the petition now!_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2129055?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** The Chaco Canyon region in New Mexico is home to _**1,000-year-old**_ rock engravings and ancient houses of Indigenous Pueblo and Navajo communities. This land remains deeply valued by Indigenous communities and also contains vital water resources. **More than 91% of available lands in the Greater Chaco area are leased for fracking!** Every day, fracking rigs _**shake the ground, spew pollution,**_ and produce _**contaminated wastewater**_ in this special place. With the help of activists like you, we successfully pushed the Department of Interior to declare a temporary moratorium on oil drilling within 10-miles of Chaco Canyon. Now, [_**we need your help to permanently protect the Greater Chaco region and ensure Tribes are given co-management of the lands! Please, Friend, help amplify Tribal demands and protect Chaco Canyon from greedy companies! >>**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2129056?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2129057?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Fracking spills, leaks, and explosions happen daily** – and Indigenous people feel the impacts disproportionately due to their unique relationship to the land and water. In Chaco Canyon, their historically and culturally important sites can be damaged by fracking.
For more than a century, the federal government has treated the Greater Chaco region as an energy “sacrifice zone,” dumping fracking leases onto these lands at the expense of local communities. [_**Will you help us reach our goal of 691 more signatures from your area and tell the Department of Interior to protect Chaco Canyon and meet Tribal demands?**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2129058?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2129057?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Senior Fossil Fuel and Lands Campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**

## TikTok Trend Praises bin Laden Letter
TikTok came under heavy fire this week for allowing users to post videos linking to a [letter written by Osama bin Laden](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80DFu6zAMgOHTyJsCkbRsZ9DwFm95a0eDtuiEjWwFDpG2ty_aA3T-hx_43i7ThbXofv3PmyRb68SL6Uumoi9Z9XMC8DB4pKltclpFUKiRBH0IBLHrsbkliIR5jusSe6bIMg_dGbIgR6ZIBI0mDEgAMECI59idzvOaZ44SMPd9i7Nrg2S1epzeq-52k7V81Zccp6VuTUk3s8fT0T-Ho8PRdJOf4HDsiDocgsOxPnljP-vuC2fZfREzObxVz5scurA3vVu9OxybI-XHh5aiz653bbhurOX3ZH8DfAcAAP__A-dfiw) justifying his Sept. 11 attacks on America. The videos have racked up more than 14 million views. The bin Laden letter originally appeared in the Guardian newspaper 20 years ago, and the Guardian [pulled it off its website](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLGupCAUQL9GOwwXQbSg2MZutt3SXOQ63h2ECRLd_fuXeR_wupOc5uT8eSwP5Mjp-RsPcnXLC66VL1oiX7TxvwVAwChUv-g2uI1IUd-SAytlD2awqt2dnEB7PclhNKrX4De7DiOEYbKjBkNDy05J1QPACNJMZugmvwWPhqQK1mrlGy0pcM2l-5s51Z22-D9fVLo1H210e63vs-l_NWpu1Hzfd5f8mug-P75R8wcbNecTDxSek4gYKIlItVIRNQs8qPCKovKr5pfY8dwrPkWhI18UxMUFo7g4UD5FWROCMqbXbXHhfXOMfA620fJ5IMfvpPrzqa8AAAD__9dAb0M) this week. TikTok deleted its Osama bin Laden hashtag, but many users continue to quote the letter favorably. TikTok, already under scrutiny by Congress, was criticized by 9/11 family groups, as well as in a call between [TikTok executives and Jewish celebrities](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kDuSqzAQRVcDmVzqBvEJCF5C5pdOSAnUQm0LRKEef3Y_5VnAhPee5NT5uk5Xy5H39b_daBCfJrsIP2iK_CDPrwlAQaewmurSDZ4IqSppgFbrCkzTYhkGmI3zjfEG6x6gtX1nejQWm043DpwueUCNFQB0oE1vmks_ezdbQxpd29Y4F7Umx5LOyy3xLoF8fKcHnZclbWUcgsiRi-pfgWOBowQKHOOHFTgeKfLy_ty0hD3FtH5GXYHRiOpGT85BLRRpPlmYsvo-V3JK-C7pruhFS1aSlHXupJyV3YUzbSycN5V2dYS0k1psjAWO5Tm448kxcm7aotbrZvnXo5S_0_0EAAD__4pAdXs). The executives reportedly acknowledged the problem but said there was no simple solution.
## Haley Moves Into 2nd in New Hampshire
Nikki Haley has [moved into second place ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LtuwyAUgOGnwRsW4GsGhi7e0rWjdWwO8am4CUgcv33VPkDnf_n1fd3XO5Cj8PgEj7rauMJe6YWroxdaeq9Scjlz1a19Y7RFVNg1qOUkRCeHcVLNoc0IqjPztMEuJQybmW8jWlSDBez7fWxIK6E6KeUsxXAbxva2WbPBgEKZaerVxnqBhmrM7XekUA-07oovzO0efeP0UWsqrPtgamFqOc-ztfEd8Cy_naklRUeV9sLUcoDDi2cqWPj2rLzmp088owcKhZvoKUCoHCG7iz9i4iljIYOhEjieMnnIF0_RuSZrk05yjso4sV48PJD7G6r_O_0EAAD__208clY)in New Hampshire in two new polls and, for the first time, closed the gap a bit against Donald Trump, who maintains his solid lead with the state's primary just ten weeks away. A University of New Hampshire poll shows Trump getting 42% of the vote against Haley's 20%, the best she's done in the state. In a Monmouth University survey, Trump has 46% support against Haley's 18%. The [Monmouth poll ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LtuwyAUgOGnwRsRHF9wBoYu3tK1o3UMh3AqLpZNk-btq_YBOv_DL30ft_WGnLjc3zGTbaGu6Bo_aE38oMDfq9ZSzxL6dei8DURAfUdWG6V6PU4GumgRB70FP3vjlJ8wILqgiK5Am8PZu44tKOi11rNW43WcLtct-A1HUuCNGWATgyLPrR6Xz8qlRQrpVR90XFzNXbKxtf0U_ZuARcDSIkVO6bcJWGLNVOh5Clgc5h35XgQsQ68Ho3vZjq-8S18zFyxNFnrKiHk_Ix8kIyZ6yZNcLV7uNSUBS3dYvz85JT4nIwZ1z8h_q679r_MTAAD__-DJbMo)has Chris Christie in third with 11%, Vivek Ramaswamy at 8%, and Ron DeSantis coming in last at 7%. Those are clustered within the margin of error, which is 4.5%.
## Las Vegas Grand Prix Ready to Roar
Formula 1 racers are ready to speed through the first-ever Las Vegas Grand Prix tonight. This year's [dominant F1 driver, Max Verstappen](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80DFzhCAUBOBfgx0OIIgWFGnsLm1Khzse-jIoDrxo7t9nLkXKlDvbfLsft_nmMeG-vPsNHMU8-wfhCXPCEyJ-z1JyOXDVzboJLgIo6Bpw0grRSdNb1axOyNEq0ek4yDAaabQcfK-tfQiIMerYoFNCdVLKQQozmr4d7zHcvQGhgrVa3ZkWEJByaT8z7rRCTM98QmkfeWuSW4mOyro3piampuu62gJfBKW-eqameuRClalpy5QL_4shb7j7nfgJpZI_Dth5AR-ePGS-YuW04r7wExZf-YvIX2sNU1NTXDguTAlrb5kWy-Yx_Wro_5N-AgAA___6xGzP), is looking for his 53rd career victory to become third on the all-time win list. The street race gets underway tonight at 10 p.m. Las Vegas time on ESPN, despite Thursday's [first practice being called off](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kLHSnCAUhZ8GOxy4iGhhkYbuT5vSQbi4N2HFAaLZt8_szqRNc5pziu98P77WL0eJjv27e-LSYl6db3ThmujCSH9WKbmcOKh16MISEQFVh4s0QiipRwPdYxlnIdQ8RDFN6NzgdByl3rRRPoRtmENHCwhQUspJCj3rsZ-3GDanUUAwZoCNDQIDtVz6n5mO9sCYXvnC0vv87NLyaO2sTH1jYBnY-757rOfxLhnY4jwdOwMbJQNbWy4vBnZlYCkwsGqapZmN_gy4d4fHVHmkUhs_y_usR55c5RfurvLwG3nKuf7LUBwd3L9heCvO_-rKEs6bUqI6GjaI_ekofTjb__X9DQAA__-szHUd) because a loose drain cover damaged a Ferrari chassis. Las Vegas transformed its famous strip for this event, the [most expensive Grand Prix ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL1yqzAUBp8GOnmkA0iooLiNO982JaOfT-YkMjBIg523zzgPkHJnm539uM03x5nX-3_3wFTTNrtQ-cSc-UTi16yUUKOgbu7bOCWA0LWYlJGyU4M21C6Tts7Ad3EE0hikG722kFYOcfBwWrc8kaROKTUqOdhBX6xP0bsBkqIxPfmml4hct-PyufFaF6T8vZ04LmF7tHlaat1L0_1r6NrQ1e0rnuWt3nBUDhkNXZMS2RVx4u6KwGvHWviEqBy-UItYtopcRKkH78LCWYw6StUHsl77YCiOkEZbAkXfHlPcn5wzF22aXt4fjvNvTP370U8AAAD__yDZbHA)on this year's calendar. Hotel rates soared, but reports indicate the city may have overestimated demand. Tickets are still available at discounted prices.

The videos have racked up more than 14 million views. | | | | | | Saturday, November 18th, 2023 ---|--- Welcome to the weekend! On this date in 1928, a new animated movie star hit the silver screen when Mickey Mouse debuted in "Steamboat Willie," the first Disney cartoon distributed with synchronized sound. (.) Sorry about that! | TikTok Trend Praises bin Laden Letter TikTok came under heavy fire this week for allowing users to post videos linking to a justifying his Sept. 11 attacks on America. The videos have racked up more than 14 million views. The bin Laden letter originally appeared in the Guardian newspaper 20 years ago, and the Guardian this week. TikTok deleted its Osama bin Laden hashtag, but many users continue to quote the letter favorably. TikTok, already under scrutiny by Congress, was criticized by 9/11 family groups, as well as in a call between . The executives reportedly acknowledged the problem but said there was no simple solution. Haley Moves Into 2nd in New Hampshire Nikki Haley has New Hampshire in two new polls and, for the first time, closed the gap a bit against Donald Trump, who maintains his solid lead with the state's primary just ten weeks away. A University of New Hampshire poll shows Trump getting 42% of the vote against Haley's 20%, the best she's done in the state. In a Monmouth University survey, Trump has 46% support against Haley's 18%. The Chris Christie in third with 11%, Vivek Ramaswamy at 8%, and Ron DeSantis coming in last at 7%. Those are clustered within the margin of error, which is 4.5%. Las Vegas Grand Prix Ready to Roar Formula 1 racers are ready to speed through the first-ever Las Vegas Grand Prix tonight. This year's , is looking for his 53rd career victory to become third on the all-time win list. The street race gets underway tonight at 10 p.m. Las Vegas time on ESPN, despite Thursday's because a loose drain cover damaged a Ferrari chassis. Las Vegas transformed its famous strip for this event, the this year's calendar. Hotel rates soared, but reports indicate the city may have overestimated demand. Tickets are still available at discounted prices. name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want you to know the truth
body:
Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1a625bc3face4c019cc5db4eb173d271&_e=jpQd1gxunRtMWlZXu7rzraCoy6vnsEJngnQqiwbFt9sBI8ssl2uPJa3fSU_fDGObn1Xe5hLTG6x2ttxC7kEoX9V3JBnspxwdmPf87o2BStxoYqq-KcTz3dQ5nyep0ggUNywIfjfnovOJ2rzfTMy80r18qP145RBGy9CuOomLaW757vAurLcxba2E8e8JqZvgege_xHd2gCgCgeaeCwgZsl1y_zB-ZieTRVmw2LIrniz5FygBBLtvIiq9bjfblEv--y1dpgHQIcPVKKAjPgm95cQOS_mzg1SuxVg4v7uorO5UlZ9dRqXygQn9WvOKBiWPfbQrrzw62F2ABbsxbAF_UObH4TEhGx_ky_mBAsLp5EHYZY1Lm7B2EDHvuMCV7x1POWqI45MSykRkP5PSS9PT-fzlUvuUqUSVAH9cWeWUlsqKoYNpnIm3X8TKy4--SS1lpofs5dgis1lYuriIYq7_rFSF6EjnQPm4ok8BVa_bvIyS9t87nJwkHhHZXuAAZ1IrWFjqgd_YmnyWyyBxmUqf4wnbDZb6nk4EQ5CqV_85cfOC0FQjUMrkXMvUb9yfaNEbK-K2Hccpsp4nJODpMgDDjqs1GzS2G0gO7jHjk8PO8CG_Y0uJPQIoU4Z5qjUXqYGqVxBXcOT2nDoCM2rDx15wvw%3D%3D)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1a625bc3face4c019cc5db4eb173d271&_e=jpQd1gxunRtMWlZXu7rzraCoy6vnsEJngnQqiwbFt9sBI8ssl2uPJa3fSU_fDGObn1Xe5hLTG6x2ttxC7kEoX9V3JBnspxwdmPf87o2BStxoYqq-KcTz3dQ5nyep0ggUNywIfjfnovOJ2rzfTMy80r18qP145RBGy9CuOomLaW757vAurLcxba2E8e8JqZvgege_xHd2gCgCgeaeCwgZsl1y_zB-ZieTRVmw2LIrniz5FygBBLtvIiq9bjfblEv--y1dpgHQIcPVKKAjPgm95cQOS_mzg1SuxVg4v7uorO5UlZ9dRqXygQn9WvOKBiWPfbQrrzw62F2ABbsxbAF_UObH4TEhGx_ky_mBAsLp5EHYZY1Lm7B2EDHvuMCV7x1POWqI45MSykRkP5PSS9PT-fzlUvuUqUSVAH9cWeWUlsqKoYNpnIm3X8TKy4--SS1lpofs5dgis1lYuriIYq7_rFSF6EjnQPm4ok8BVa_bvIyS9t87nJwkHhHZXuAAZ1IryLYzU85T_rEfV_WLUxUI9-now5sib_zweUCcpdtUw7r32JCWZb9LGD5Twrwi5YawV8dCZ3guFQHIktgMQiuZ69NFkt2HESsNzJov1udS8Q2B7S24fYFtdkyVVERQTM5I6ldxRFw5tFB7uKjapDGG4w%3D%3D "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1a625bc3face4c019cc5db4eb173d271&_e=jpQd1gxunRtMWlZXu7rzraCoy6vnsEJngnQqiwbFt9sBI8ssl2uPJa3fSU_fDGObn1Xe5hLTG6x2ttxC7kEoX9V3JBnspxwdmPf87o2BStxoYqq-KcTz3dQ5nyep0ggUNywIfjfnovOJ2rzfTMy80r18qP145RBGy9CuOomLaW757vAurLcxba2E8e8JqZvgege_xHd2gCgCgeaeCwgZsl1y_zB-ZieTRVmw2LIrniz5FygBBLtvIiq9bjfblEv--y1dpgHQIcPVKKAjPgm95cQOS_mzg1SuxVg4v7uorO5UlZ9dRqXygQn9WvOKBiWPfbQrrzw62F2ABbsxbAF_UObH4TEhGx_ky_mBAsLp5EHYZY1Lm7B2EDHvuMCV7x1POWqI45MSykRkP5PSS9PT-fzlUvuUqUSVAH9cWeWUlsqKoYNpnIm3X8TKy4--SS1lpofs5dgis1lYuriIYq7_rFSF6EjnQPm4ok8BVa_bvIyS9t87nJwkHhHZXuAAZ1Ir57e08CPo4gU5tnP1cA8-XwEQ4qpPKRnXeA6j3ptQ8sJzTb1PPTp3TUEuXHvpo7i58v_ewomroDMRProQLaihBR4aGADUzF0E1SL4T9emwZxym04XOkpjFTNy174JRN4XEEV030Jg9PajNa2KdgXdRw%3D%3D)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1a625bc3face4c019cc5db4eb173d271&_e=jpQd1gxunRtMWlZXu7rzraCoy6vnsEJngnQqiwbFt9sBI8ssl2uPJa3fSU_fDGObn1Xe5hLTG6x2ttxC7kEoX9V3JBnspxwdmPf87o2BStxoYqq-KcTz3dQ5nyep0ggUNywIfjfnovOJ2rzfTMy80r18qP145RBGy9CuOomLaW757vAurLcxba2E8e8JqZvgege_xHd2gCgCgeaeCwgZsl1y_zB-ZieTRVmw2LIrniz5FygBBLtvIiq9bjfblEv--y1dpgHQIcPVKKAjPgm95cQOS_mzg1SuxVg4v7uorO5UlZ9dRqXygQn9WvOKBiWPfbQrrzw62F2ABbsxbAF_UObH4TEhGx_ky_mBAsLp5EHYZY1Lm7B2EDHvuMCV7x1POWqI45MSykRkP5PSS9PT-fzlUvuUqUSVAH9cWeWUlsqKoYNpnIm3X8TKy4--SS1lpofs5dgis1lYuriIYq7_rFSF6EjnQPm4ok8BVa_bvIyS9t87nJwkHhHZXuAAZ1Ir6s0ceMPdiZw_HW_OU4AHrVWT_6I1eVW3eAxHIY_D6A0OjkkkQjbrIVBV7GJ2MdiP7Ioq-PQSCmGFo_MJVWi9MtxR9d9jUeyHdxMppMp-AUVdxcPVqN22pp8kU2i7EYH6O4e1CKNtWM1Js4HXvf9CMw%3D%3D)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1a625bc3face4c019cc5db4eb173d271&_e=jpQd1gxunRtMWlZXu7rzraCoy6vnsEJngnQqiwbFt9sBI8ssl2uPJa3fSU_fDGObn1Xe5hLTG6x2ttxC7kEoX9V3JBnspxwdmPf87o2BStxoYqq-KcTz3dQ5nyep0ggUNywIfjfnovOJ2rzfTMy80r18qP145RBGy9CuOomLaW757vAurLcxba2E8e8JqZvgege_xHd2gCgCgeaeCwgZsl1y_zB-ZieTRVmw2LIrniz5FygBBLtvIiq9bjfblEv--y1dpgHQIcPVKKAjPgm95cQOS_mzg1SuxVg4v7uorO5UlZ9dRqXygQn9WvOKBiWPfbQrrzw62F2ABbsxbAF_UObH4TEhGx_ky_mBAsLp5EHYZY1Lm7B2EDHvuMCV7x1POWqI45MSykRkP5PSS9PT-fzlUvuUqUSVAH9cWeWUlsqKoYNpnIm3X8TKy4--SS1lpofs5dgis1lYuriIYq7_rFSF6EjnQPm4ok8BVa_bvIyS9t87nJwkHhHZXuAAZ1IrmCs4BIL2YkB06YiBp6Wiow7I_tJtVZGstR-SgvXd1Oq-ZfBUCp2rfvLH19c-WUvK95zpThVWhAgs5lwbm3FrtRB4YfoJbQN4W9qbnX7foWAYUMfmIXB5b5I-dH5na-_lBL8SCrMJwfZEzXxu5eBamg%3D%3D)
---

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. | | | | | | Friend, Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future. Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>" Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the of OUR movement?" | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, "I need your help – starting right now. " Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Defend The Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1f1591ef8134cf2adb4febe4df2e435&_e=qVF-kHhlWxWIP_z9HOOjrJgRTLDkGloQcMKQgBMRCyyzlDHXcaJ6qrshGzfr9QwigqhHGXOcyFr5gf3nGZlTuNBVvPZzq1Y4SKguL11ZsTFjYDCxNNQs3Hvc-HrxfzFLI8fnaHhQ9dB2CkYlzdwZVy-LX2l-PtkN5i9bQbk_IVMGfFSMDTiqhjiVpeH05lqDf_MZMb5O1zQVI61DiEILmnk6PsZyaEq5BxG5r2EHCpDpNS-gs4yeQCm8sv_wI_4dEhEVO8DQZ1m7zcfVxcxu6TAL9D1v63xsBUEKVi-GIJuxRgyQ6_183V1sB7FrH0fA41OiAe4zHREviLmKqheO6D9eS4xA2jJRopmAn3LNh4z70dQU1tfm7iknhdHBQZbVQx2VihE0uz7lydsKMqdNvR_M9OwlGHRYs4USnv8nFa3GcJUaSHNOJ-r01haYaAUi)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1f1591ef8134cf2adb4febe4df2e435&_e=qVF-kHhlWxWIP_z9HOOjrJgRTLDkGloQcMKQgBMRCyyzlDHXcaJ6qrshGzfr9QwigqhHGXOcyFr5gf3nGZlTuNBVvPZzq1Y4SKguL11ZsTFjYDCxNNQs3Hvc-HrxfzFLI8fnaHhQ9dB2CkYlzdwZVy-LX2l-PtkN5i9bQbk_IVMGfFSMDTiqhjiVpeH05lqDf_MZMb5O1zQVI61DiEILmnk6PsZyaEq5BxG5r2EHCpDpNS-gs4yeQCm8sv_wI_4dEhEVO8DQZ1m7zcfVxcxu6Xk7JkpFAdGr2yxnWyEeKaNglwa0IZ9E8_lE8kGio2sakioRgvcWpHc7srWgJ3YnLWgJUVW5jqZd3eXYbMvkh0zAgxfrcTQUxR8gPn6RvyEzZ0tYHXUN5j0D4Q-RznZLcfbUmJB4v1dPdUkES7ddm3J_V5SatB0_Sn2ePrbAH2T9)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1f1591ef8134cf2adb4febe4df2e435&_e=qVF-kHhlWxWIP_z9HOOjrJgRTLDkGloQcMKQgBMRCyyzlDHXcaJ6qrshGzfr9QwigqhHGXOcyFr5gf3nGZlTuNBVvPZzq1Y4SKguL11ZsTFjYDCxNNQs3Hvc-HrxfzFLI8fnaHhQ9dB2CkYlzdwZVy-LX2l-PtkN5i9bQbk_IVMGfFSMDTiqhjiVpeH05lqDf_MZMb5O1zQVI61DiEILmnk6PsZyaEq5BxG5r2EHCpDpNS-gs4yeQCm8sv_wI_4dEhEVO8DQZ1m7zcfVxcxu6Q8u3gYPe0Ojo9n93QC8CTYk80a6ZKuopcNqbaXv0iuoew-seer3jQ4jaeSBdSgoUTBwI_7mzFuRRjS-rg9u9T3NsGEGlKO0bvC3o233ctbXDwjMEnbXfZIFtSQGvsIfYZM4STlNU2q6yJFN34bghU0aAn4IHB44KRgXp2nJdm-w)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1f1591ef8134cf2adb4febe4df2e435&_e=qVF-kHhlWxWIP_z9HOOjrJgRTLDkGloQcMKQgBMRCyyzlDHXcaJ6qrshGzfr9QwigqhHGXOcyFr5gf3nGZlTuNBVvPZzq1Y4SKguL11ZsTFjYDCxNNQs3Hvc-HrxfzFLI8fnaHhQ9dB2CkYlzdwZVy-LX2l-PtkN5i9bQbk_IVMGfFSMDTiqhjiVpeH05lqDf_MZMb5O1zQVI61DiEILmnk6PsZyaEq5BxG5r2EHCpDpNS-gs4yeQCm8sv_wI_4dEhEVO8DQZ1m7zcfVxcxu6TGc5rnKJl9icFVOsivbyt0FGvcAA_69-XDL-1JXBu0bhfwKMwM4p5r7gcz-XxVTpBUldDGS9qxXjfY8oRilEEbYVyo1p9fo8SsBYrUdSyi6p1F_AhgeICbBdVGcyMJto2XCAz3HOLhFIj2AujJQ8cp2D5VKLnM9vQjGiD8wzl6i).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

| | | This sponsored message from Defend The Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1f1591ef8134cf2adb4febe4df2e435&_e=qVF-kHhlWxWIP_z9HOOjrJgRTLDkGloQcMKQgBMRCyyzlDHXcaJ6qrshGzfr9QwigqhHGXOcyFr5gf3nGZlTuNBVvPZzq1Y4SKguL11ZsTFjYDCxNNQs3Hvc-HrxfzFLI8fnaHhQ9dB2CkYlzdwZVy-LX2l-PtkN5i9bQbk_IVMGfFSMDTiqhjiVpeH05lqDf_MZMb5O1zQVI61DiEILmnk6PsZyaEq5BxG5r2EHCpDpNS-gs4yeQCm8sv_wI_4dFlAAHuxWySN4QJiVddNtUArrJSKCud4SfsO41aqKFYmkdHo-wBFJqq2ClOZDnikm3Aa9qcenDiWpWnxaAHFBM2vk0tQ0OfG5S8tTb52v5VDalKEakSmlngZKyMICnBcaOxAkKpuawXcPY7zWpDvX_GKweGB_HprFbeMxjJEoc2egF9lpnVrzIrH5oJuS_ygk)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1f1591ef8134cf2adb4febe4df2e435&_e=qVF-kHhlWxWIP_z9HOOjrJgRTLDkGloQcMKQgBMRCyyzlDHXcaJ6qrshGzfr9QwigqhHGXOcyFr5gf3nGZlTuNBVvPZzq1Y4SKguL11ZsTFjYDCxNNQs3Hvc-HrxfzFLI8fnaHhQ9dB2CkYlzdwZVy-LX2l-PtkN5i9bQbk_IVMGfFSMDTiqhjiVpeH05lqDf_MZMb5O1zQVI61DiEILmnk6PsZyaEq5BxG5r2EHCpDpNS-gs4yeQCm8sv_wI_4dFlAAHuxWySN4QJiVddNtUFWWX5AitKT8Ib1kKCbc7Tv5fFkQb0st4hTPYOVznnoX2AeodREB5QpxtLUQXvOoftfEfr2nozw_dpOTvU4vMEbugWaghER130zsgnptgznkTLtjJ7WKtCGnAEu4Mu9taEw3iUfAi2vZEh-5IU2dtUP2UoIKTtu6scZeQy7BILPr)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1f1591ef8134cf2adb4febe4df2e435&_e=qVF-kHhlWxWIP_z9HOOjrJgRTLDkGloQcMKQgBMRCyyzlDHXcaJ6qrshGzfr9QwigqhHGXOcyFr5gf3nGZlTuNBVvPZzq1Y4SKguL11ZsTFjYDCxNNQs3Hvc-HrxfzFLI8fnaHhQ9dB2CkYlzdwZVy-LX2l-PtkN5i9bQbk_IVMGfFSMDTiqhjiVpeH05lqDf_MZMb5O1zQVI61DiEILmnk6PsZyaEq5BxG5r2EHCpDpNS-gs4yeQCm8sv_wI_4dFlAAHuxWySN4QJiVddNtUM3c410-35ymW5vVAnaYklg74tfRxSG5rVb1HYmeO4Bs7-bJ_SiH4T9lQf5z40e1ry8O4ylRlQfvmkpO84NFPpyHmiFWPwOmkETJTRFhvSDrS94Vq4z3cvzyhh4jMaA6xko31Cwo3jnFGswqNmOKLkgVtdcyqsT-MsNWyOARdbdw)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1f1591ef8134cf2adb4febe4df2e435&_e=qVF-kHhlWxWIP_z9HOOjrJgRTLDkGloQcMKQgBMRCyyzlDHXcaJ6qrshGzfr9QwigqhHGXOcyFr5gf3nGZlTuNBVvPZzq1Y4SKguL11ZsTFjYDCxNNQs3Hvc-HrxfzFLI8fnaHhQ9dB2CkYlzdwZVy-LX2l-PtkN5i9bQbk_IVMGfFSMDTiqhjiVpeH05lqDf_MZMb5O1zQVI61DiEILmnk6PsZyaEq5BxG5r2EHCpDpNS-gs4yeQCm8sv_wI_4dFlAAHuxWySN4QJiVddNtUGn511JenNbZXsywzrV4Av44tCVVPoXotrK0mlJ-8sdwJa-uLmuKgrOnh1X8NO32m9oRGOZc1sTx7UWi1KPyLDtyVsPM7fnJqe6-gdwDLa1kzZ_RYh0Se9UI1fbhgZ_2DTDmRQuIOjj37j_WYQYC79hHEycTopkdgQvV-BghgjDY).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ebb9ca01016f472790346c69a4628dff&_e=Gcpy7WqtmeQEDbsaTwER2dDyx-_CNpZ07Ws0EyjRy90ys8cW7CGwB5Vdt0vsT8Qn_HTSw06M9cDDaKbOcklbt6e8vu3KkxUJm73gcM6KaN__-lshFPwU-O-bL1M2DwaKx5Bidk48nu6SbCS2oMljFL52a2_jqMphbcfT8Wq73PCU9r4lJ4YQwMSk5ZtuCRu5ct5qk05Mt3HNnOVgCiOpBjfjrc5073DLVqPnB59cdQyGP6qH6k1mg6R6Qx-j5wvhgpOMZ9S0kx9JKs5_34vADwySPlmydaDECyNkvLz89hlDWc0mxfPeBvBiZDLARlm4) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ebb9ca01016f472790346c69a4628dff&_e=Gcpy7WqtmeQEDbsaTwER2dDyx-_CNpZ07Ws0EyjRy90ys8cW7CGwB5Vdt0vsT8Qn_HTSw06M9cDDaKbOcklbt6e8vu3KkxUJm73gcM6KaN__-lshFPwU-O-bL1M2DwaKx5Bidk48nu6SbCS2oMljFFSr2B5Gkm5lN1Pf8gswjKdH9y_iu56ufSOijGH9ZdccekywgH4t8RoBBT_VRhJ9w3PHeBAkW7afo6IbWrI2iIsB_DoiA4uTHCmI6eQrfJEwA4STEtSls-1WgfkBkU4SPrYofIilwRD0ShBEQkJ43T_lbnxJ7-ycCq0uLVgfSmuu) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. | Friends,
We would not have a country without our men and women in the military who risk or sometimes sacrifice their life for freedom. Thank you!
"Veterans for America First is proud to endorse John McGuire for Virginia's 5h Congressional District. VFAF reaches over 1 million people across all social and network media outlets on a daily basis. John McGuire is an America First Candidate, a Father, Navy SEAL, and Business Owner seeking to take a stand for all Virginians against the liberal agendas our nation is plagued with. We need candidates like John McGuire in Congress to Save Virginia and Save America. With Trump since he came down the escalator, no gimmick and No nonsense Conservative Soldier."
-Vlad Lemets, [VFAF](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H58jYbY_4zDkkyTeDPFsz4bmjRUw2COtEn_z5NdU_sNcWt64_Ozmm2UvpWimr4flm3b0ylRK1M1NX_AcCekTix1n27yl1pNkeYE7RhfxsEwhVpF06nbBCNwey1l1WnRpBSanqChCqmE=&c=fUF7qbRdGFKgLsMOWJWqyCaHuPceUqDfT-W8zdwyOa9zpebM-HesCQ==&ch=NKY3ASl8FLFJAcFlaTFPuUd4-qB3_0OQ5tDjiGHOufVfXROQXulk_Q==) Founding Member
Our best days are still ahead of us. I'm running for Congress to help Trump Save America from radical Marxist policies that put America last. I've been all over the district and unlike my opponent Congressman Bob Good who abandoned our president Trump and endorsed a different candidate, I can tell you my fellow veterans love President Trump and his America First Agenda!
I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!

Biden Admin Granted 34,000 Special Visas To Refugees After Botched
Afghanistan Withdrawal

The State Department has granted tens of thousands of visas to Afghans
who aided the U.S. government following the Biden administration’s
withdrawal from Afghanistan in 2021, according to a Thursday report
from the lead inspector general to the United States Congress.

CEO Of AI Titan Ousted By Board

OpenAI’s board of directors ousted CEO Sam Altman for not being honest
in his discussions with them, the company announced in a blog post on
Friday. The company behind the popular AI chatbot ChatGPT is replacing
him with Chief Technology Officer Mira Murati, who will immediately
serve as interim CEO, according to the blog post.

body:
This past July, banks across America made a disturbing change.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | | | Dear Reader, This past July, banks across America made a disturbing change. It handed the Federal Reserve DIRECT control over how money comes into and out of your bank account. Very soon, you could wake up to discover your money has been frozen ... or even confiscated. It's happened to innocent people before, and I don't want you to be next. That's why I've put together [these three simple steps you can use to protect your money.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/IpvP4aj8xzHPEBq6a0eoRQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnO04eP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud3FiM3l0cmsuY29tLzNXQlo4Ri9DMldCRDgvP2NyZWF0aXZlX2lkPTE4NjQmc291cmNlX2lkPXdycG9wYTExMDEyM2Emc3ViMT1STS1ST04tMjAyMzExMThXA3NwY0IKZVVEpFhlUd9hjlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Once you put them in place, you can rest easy at night. You won't be helpless to the Federal Reserve's power. And, because of an odd "quirk" to how this works, you could stand to actually make more money. [Click here to find out how.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/IpvP4aj8xzHPEBq6a0eoRQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnO04eP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud3FiM3l0cmsuY29tLzNXQlo4Ri9DMldCRDgvP2NyZWF0aXZlX2lkPTE4NjQmc291cmNlX2lkPXdycG9wYTExMDEyM2Emc3ViMT1STS1ST04tMjAyMzExMThXA3NwY0IKZVVEpFhlUd9hjlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Best, Eliza Lasky

name: Mike Rogers
subject: Fidelity. Bravery. Integrity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
"no planted evidence, no cheap shots"

| |
---
| | | **" I don't like the FBI, but I respect the FBI."**
Friend,

Those were the words said to me by a dangerous South Side Chicago mob boss who I spent some time with during my career as an FBI Special Agent.

His offenses included racketeering, conspiracy, and tax fraud, but even he admitted that the FBI gave him a fair shake with "no planted evidence, no cheap shots" as he was sentenced to two centuries in prison.

**Friend, how things have changed.**

Nowadays, public trust in the FBI has diminished. And with an Inspector General's report that found **OVER 200,000 ETHICS VIOLATIONS** committed by FBI officials, I can't say that mistrust isn't warranted.

Friend, I'm running for the U.S. Senate because I remember the days when the FBI commanded respect -- **[and I know we can bring those days back.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=935e6cea605a44d9bf18c243ea0266ab&_e=dJjPJ9V2iBk0eO_618wfVZ2qZVDpb9iV4e4kezJIaqojmtVXBIkN9_b-FJYBoa5YROn3jcr2Dy-AT3M34d6lHeY_1M_qjEhBpMIgwN-hjZ5h2_uJzbvC4UImrhCj81pvgFtMW3nfKJ7oBY2C7TkjcvvWWYIyQfCPNQda43uJCCSSjPpQo5_o14zNsMpkn1-ucO0ZPfF-pUdXd7-Zb7CLChgCTa-90xxk47g9dy_jhDdFNwTsRBq83MwsV4FcIgn01fJsrUv7Gg9VGMRETdC8duz55iI25xiY2aneUj_chgYwADKkiWXWI1YnaZX_sd1Pfm-rFdIyY4w6z8fWmKlUMrkxCjJUoiHSNTkaVlP5KqoeTjnLLVXvmbei5ooJEAzDZjtdCcWCSepxraCs0-phoQ%3D%3D "and I know we can bring those days back.")**

Every American deserves to be able to trust that law enforcement will keep them safe and treat them fairly. As a Senator, I'll work my hardest to get rid of unethical behavior and make sure the FBI lives up to its motto: **[Fidelity. Bravery. Integrity.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=935e6cea605a44d9bf18c243ea0266ab&_e=dJjPJ9V2iBk0eO_618wfVZ2qZVDpb9iV4e4kezJIaqojmtVXBIkN9_b-FJYBoa5YROn3jcr2Dy-AT3M34d6lHeY_1M_qjEhBpMIgwN-hjZ5h2_uJzbvC4UImrhCj81pvgFtMW3nfKJ7oBY2C7TkjcvvWWYIyQfCPNQda43uJCCSSjPpQo5_o14zNsMpkn1-ucO0ZPfF-pUdXd7-Zb7CLChgCTa-90xxk47g9dy_jhDdFNwTsRBq83MwsV4FcIgn09PwYQVA-SDql_yyOompMm7oxkVyhXkiTfZiNDStn4tb-l2qhXdDDSpTL9VNw52RD15X2RJetiTOZaQfpaa_cx-tyc5s_SdCNroGHlh4lU5EXSG4AVzjmfcQaup2PO28-y3qSe5yPtQGzmq8iJ7-i4g%3D%3D "Fidelity. Bravery. Integrity.")**

**[Can you chip in today and help me in my next mission?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=935e6cea605a44d9bf18c243ea0266ab&_e=dJjPJ9V2iBk0eO_618wfVZ2qZVDpb9iV4e4kezJIaqojmtVXBIkN9_b-FJYBoa5YROn3jcr2Dy-AT3M34d6lHeY_1M_qjEhBpMIgwN-hjZ5h2_uJzbvC4UImrhCj81pvgFtMW3nfKJ7oBY2C7TkjcvvWWYIyQfCPNQda43uJCCSSjPpQo5_o14zNsMpkn1-ucO0ZPfF-pUdXd7-Zb7CLChgCTa-90xxk47g9dy_jhDdFNwTsRBq83MwsV4FcIgn0kkAZ7cC0GWIcP2Bhj745Bc0nAW4-Z3dNFtADUQMwYZ2ARtHHQV7akhQ7Z7RsI6JN3xRmuECkXGrF9MKo3QgpcqcNLg0xDe48jh58b4VxYUvn7JqlMzqae08o8lMcqHE_t9K3gTeX1K5HhFP6r7OYbw%3D%3D "Can you chip in today and help me in my next mission?")**

clean_body: "no planted evidence, no cheap shots" | | | | | " I don't like the FBI, but I respect the FBI." Friend, Those were the words said to me by a dangerous South Side Chicago mob boss who I spent some time with during my career as an FBI Special Agent. His offenses included racketeering, conspiracy, and tax fraud, but even he admitted that the FBI gave him a fair shake with "no planted evidence, no cheap shots" as he was sentenced to two centuries in prison. Friend, how things have changed. Nowadays, public trust in the FBI has diminished. And with an Inspector General's report that found OVER 200,000 ETHICS VIOLATIONS committed by FBI officials, I can't say that mistrust isn't warranted. Friend, I'm running for the U.S. Senate because I remember the days when the FBI commanded respect -- "and I know we can bring those days back." Every American deserves to be able to trust that law enforcement will keep them safe and treat them fairly. As a Senator, I'll work my hardest to get rid of unethical behavior and make sure the FBI lives up to its motto: "Fidelity. Bravery. Integrity." "Can you chip in today and help me in my next mission?" Thanks for your support. Sincerely, Mike Rogers | | Paid for by Rogers for Senate P.O. Box 132 St. Joseph, MI 49085 | Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5060471d5cc14beb8e7a7b26d56b6dfb&_e=dr_njnvzvpmmxMCcZ8W1zIgu-4WZAjLi-nSxT2cEwjd2sRurN-ulp7M-fLCu_EUp46M5G_tDumO-igvmCXEexfTJsHLHNIiTEEJaEhFmPhlEL3GYQ5Y4wP0D9ZemGB9yz2LeQ9HCVV4W2f3owrNcAxLIJEWgEwltAg9wFs0-5OoCJAvR5-z1j332-zzGgb4BMUlB-yU1-eMYxxLtwdRcFPMmKXJNCuk6hAUgQIt8PSi0lvk28hqLjwMeBGhDVHgB5No3QjjysTod2CJA0JfH1PfLcDrVItv3hWbNmck4sNCvpC9buwjPenFeOM25pZ3r). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5060471d5cc14beb8e7a7b26d56b6dfb&_e=dr_njnvzvpmmxMCcZ8W1zIgu-4WZAjLi-nSxT2cEwjd2sRurN-ulp7M-fLCu_EUp46M5G_tDumO-igvmCXEexfTJsHLHNIiTEEJaEhFmPhlEL3GYQ5Y4wP0D9ZemGB9yz2LeQ9HCVV4W2f3owrNcAwFBXavlTRHp0tvtvN-yaZJ500OjTepvmrYf5N6H5BNVWhTObyy_OdY6L9ZUA_3T9PZVKuJHY6QIhc_J7VGlmoL7BP3fyA8zS_ZCwSbcq-0TS_peHDS8aqXETDzmxhY5tuS7Ghw6lsT1vuWA9o4KDY3B7bhFBE1p4Vpg4XNyPlql) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5060471d5cc14beb8e7a7b26d56b6dfb&_e=dr_njnvzvpmmxMCcZ8W1zIgu-4WZAjLi-nSxT2cEwjd2sRurN-ulp7M-fLCu_EUp46M5G_tDumO-igvmCXEexfTJsHLHNIiTEEJaEhFmPhlEL3GYQ5Y4wP0D9ZemGB9yz2LeQ9HCVV4W2f3owrNcA_ZjGAjITIqO-_i_N7LlbkUi7VzFHOdtPjWZvvw7ceu5jbh-XTPm2Vs1xSm9hmk2j0pbxuuR7vBLqGZ20z7zT7JHXIuw147dzlyt9H0CozVCxOTxodOcD6d0H3iwmUKuUbFsqcRvfD7VnFTNdeXST3HWlbNJuFGhkhjJP0RChNej) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7902a1b2b204421bf5982138d442ad4&_e=dVQZS-ZTVnKyZfGPQ_FYEUaO89EWuBu2mFBYtAaT89jD6F1jaRo6DQkW1POIdxRYpdhBLLAHAdDi3t9X6nKR5_hwO5DTqDv4Ocobmfq-aMWZDly4MbhhN82sFFnDRN825uHtG_9kE29Eav00lSCqE2_i67zLZAGOIf8nFOI_xxlRvrcyPxT_V7z-U1ui4AIVaPPcCFQRFaCVcz1p3LN65eyGsEHJRrXmpHgdHhYHNxTyAyploescK38Yq5-et86qep-FS9se4my8tp1eulE8zW2IPE8fwTjIxX2cRLvsWtvS-IR4P1Ctal_0O9RvUQwQ-5Qt5s6nyiYp5Qb9-q9fCPvfKPAnq23x4KRS7wNCE3ikxf6F1Y3wfZkyjYZ9MBlSkLodXYKYbOxfRfiD4GaAjhNcFr5PyUCM8DPxwx_teCoDIuzK_4HbCnF-kt0vp_SU)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7902a1b2b204421bf5982138d442ad4&_e=dVQZS-ZTVnKyZfGPQ_FYEUaO89EWuBu2mFBYtAaT89jD6F1jaRo6DQkW1POIdxRYpdhBLLAHAdDi3t9X6nKR5_hwO5DTqDv4Ocobmfq-aMWZDly4MbhhN82sFFnDRN825uHtG_9kE29Eav00lSCqE2_i67zLZAGOIf8nFOI_xxlRvrcyPxT_V7z-U1ui4AIVaPPcCFQRFaCVcz1p3LN65eyGsEHJRrXmpHgdHhYHNxTyAyploescK38Yq5-et86qep-FS9se4my8tp1eulE8zRroSrRG0_k1f1-2T9QveMs5u_0GeAY_SrrKF-eqU42VC7viQIP0UwSa5bPQjaVFOqybIgAUnGsQ9RzyE0U05Nf150F9F1bzSwkMTTuNQSDRrAcTDm_ejtyfUrzksswI-CwmIyiIAAFQGy1yPnF2QAE0qDWfsJ8FhwKbpxyz72JG)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7902a1b2b204421bf5982138d442ad4&_e=dVQZS-ZTVnKyZfGPQ_FYEUaO89EWuBu2mFBYtAaT89jD6F1jaRo6DQkW1POIdxRYpdhBLLAHAdDi3t9X6nKR5_hwO5DTqDv4Ocobmfq-aMWZDly4MbhhN82sFFnDRN825uHtG_9kE29Eav00lSCqE2_i67zLZAGOIf8nFOI_xxlRvrcyPxT_V7z-U1ui4AIVaPPcCFQRFaCVcz1p3LN65eyGsEHJRrXmpHgdHhYHNxTyAyploescK38Yq5-et86qep-FS9se4my8tp1eulE8zbOK2R1oEESEAgCYuQ8ONnBDV0DCv1SsT1_WsRkNkm7FextTmv5M4wvL5T8kUHqzJg7JscCyDq8H4t0cJ3ATO2JgqyF3zUBxNe0_GZ3RovsJr3DgKtSLFRoiiYS1Bnhb8zqBCZySflB5d4HvIr_glKg4HOe-07ZSRPuPy8lYSy4z)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7902a1b2b204421bf5982138d442ad4&_e=dVQZS-ZTVnKyZfGPQ_FYEUaO89EWuBu2mFBYtAaT89jD6F1jaRo6DQkW1POIdxRYpdhBLLAHAdDi3t9X6nKR5_hwO5DTqDv4Ocobmfq-aMWZDly4MbhhN82sFFnDRN825uHtG_9kE29Eav00lSCqE2_i67zLZAGOIf8nFOI_xxlRvrcyPxT_V7z-U1ui4AIVaPPcCFQRFaCVcz1p3LN65eyGsEHJRrXmpHgdHhYHNxTyAyploescK38Yq5-et86qep-FS9se4my8tp1eulE8zcHAfUduP1UDNvFdtVfTLt77KtQwiVbw3dHNPxJCXVLS4rTVXudgDCBfIotdkbZC8LNJGnLl0XbActFnvOFcXzrEgR9Y69A_qVP5HQfaqk3BuzSdfJnkZayAeE23gU_MxDbpoU92jpmJAzmcX3WUlk7MHZOmSYhCS54bwuYnAscz).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

Peter –
This week, I explored the deeper, troubling reasons behind a dangerous new trend on TikTok in which people are actually celebrating Osama bin Laden. Yes, you read that right.
I also continued to call out the radical pro-Hamas movement that is continuing to gain strength on the progressive left and called on Congress to strike a deal with the White House for additional measures to secure our southern border.
Our elections in Texas start early next year and we are gearing up for what is going to be a busy campaign season. My re-election campaign is impossible without the dedicated support of loyal patriots like you. If you're willing and able to contribute a small donation to my campaign, I would greatly appreciate it so I can continue fighting for you in Congress. You can donate at this link:

| There is a dangerous new trend circulating on TikTok right now in which people are promoting Osama bin Laden's "Letter to America," justifying the horrific 9/11 terrorist attacks.
This trend exposes two deep-seeded issues that must be taken seriously:
1\. There's a growing problem with our education system when all it takes is one letter from a terrorist to "totally change the perspective" of countless young people regarding the killing of thousands of innocent Americans at the hands of Bin Laden. It tells you that our education system is failing to give young Americans the proper context through which to view this atrocity. It also is indicative of a generation that has been conditioned to sympathize with those who wish to destroy America and her institutions, out of some misplaced sense of justice against "oppression" from the United States.
2\. This is also another reason why TikTok poses a serious threat to the United States and the young people who are addicted to this app (which, again, is controlled by the Chinese government). As I said during a congressional hearing with the TikTok CEO, the app has the ability to warp the minds of millions of Americas and perpetuate an anti-American sentiment among an entire generation of our citizens. Dangerous trends like this one spread like wildfire on TikTok, and the damage is hard to undo once thousands upon thousands of American TikTok users begin to sympathize with Osama Bin Laden.

| More evidence continues to emerge of the atrocities committed by Hamas terrorists against innocent Israeli citizens, including video circulating this week of brutal sexual violence committed on October 7.
Yet in light of these atrocities and the overwhelming, undeniable evidence that continues to emerge, we continue to see a pro-Hamas contingent on the progressive left masquerading as a "Free Palestine" movement.
Let's be clear: You need to do some serious soul searching if you continue to march for and chant "Free Palestine" in the wake of the horrific video evidence of the brutality of these terrorists against women, children, and innocent civilians.
Just this week, radical members of this "Free Palestine" movement engaged in violent demonstrations outside the Democratic National Committee headquarters in Washington, D.C. They injured Capitol Police officers and decried their own party for supporting Israel in their war against Hamas.
This is a serious, sickening problem on the progressive left and it is only growing stronger.

| THE ONLY IMMEDIATE DEAL TO SECURE OUR SOUTHERN BORDER

| [CLICK HERE TO WATCH MY REMARKS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wYYZKrsU42SpKOFUW6oNXBL2eSiqibTSeHI4735K0f45SWGxQ5Z9anlt4FfBiHTmJ0swUfYWuwOTRwTTNDMkjqg6cBJwIhtD4G3-nGPEKuiYfH8TlUgnQ-fhNLwvf8ctIutxM5z5mw7kfHyErAN6uTaeWTajIvCPGpfSaf9t394jp9EOWKhg-g==&c=xndmxZPJg9RivjXKpZKRHDajycaeHyhT10Lx5FzcjKneO-uz-xRMVQ==&ch=JYAEKr21GxsBsv-HAHw4ElChH34jgqu2rAxonc1ahJltBq2uvS3fuQ==)
