| There is only one, immediate deal on the table in Congress to secure our southern border: tying any additional aid for Ukraine with substantial policy changes to curtail illegal immigration.
Right now, there are negotiations underway in the Senate to pair meaningful reforms - like addressing abuses in our asylum system that encourage illegal immigration - to Ukraine aid.
This is something I have been calling for in Congress, because it is our only leverage point to force the White House to actually sign border security policies into law.
Republicans must understand that this is the only way we will get meaningful border security, which we badly need. This is our one chance.
The White House desperately wants to provide additional aid for Ukraine, which we can use to our advantage in leveraging new measures to secure our own border. Our message is simple: no aid to Ukraine without meaningful policy reforms to stop the illegal immigration crisis.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter – This week, I explored the deeper, troubling reasons behind a dangerous new trend on TikTok in which people are actually celebrating Osama bin Laden. Yes, you read that right. I also continued to call out the radical pro-Hamas movement that is continuing to gain strength on the progressive left and called on Congress to strike a deal with the White House for additional measures to secure our southern border. Our elections in Texas start early next year and we are gearing up for what is going to be a busy campaign season. My re-election campaign is impossible without the dedicated support of loyal patriots like you. If you're willing and able to contribute a small donation to my campaign, I would greatly appreciate it so I can continue fighting for you in Congress. You can donate at this link: | | | == | Now, here's your campaign brief: | | | | | | | | A DANGEROUS NEW TIKTOK TREND | | == | | | There is a dangerous new trend circulating on TikTok right now in which people are promoting Osama bin Laden's "Letter to America," justifying the horrific 9/11 terrorist attacks. This trend exposes two deep-seeded issues that must be taken seriously: 1\. There's a growing problem with our education system when all it takes is one letter from a terrorist to "totally change the perspective" of countless young people regarding the killing of thousands of innocent Americans at the hands of Bin Laden. It tells you that our education system is failing to give young Americans the proper context through which to view this atrocity. It also is indicative of a generation that has been conditioned to sympathize with those who wish to destroy America and her institutions, out of some misplaced sense of justice against "oppression" from the United States. 2\. This is also another reason why TikTok poses a serious threat to the United States and the young people who are addicted to this app (which, again, is controlled by the Chinese government). As I said during a congressional hearing with the TikTok CEO, the app has the ability to warp the minds of millions of Americas and perpetuate an anti-American sentiment among an entire generation of our citizens. Dangerous trends like this one spread like wildfire on TikTok, and the damage is hard to undo once thousands upon thousands of American TikTok users begin to sympathize with Osama Bin Laden. | | | | | | | | THE "FREE PALESTINE" MOVEMENT EXCUSES THE ATROCITIES OF HAMAS | == | More evidence continues to emerge of the atrocities committed by Hamas terrorists against innocent Israeli citizens, including video circulating this week of brutal sexual violence committed on October 7. Yet in light of these atrocities and the overwhelming, undeniable evidence that continues to emerge, we continue to see a pro-Hamas contingent on the progressive left masquerading as a "Free Palestine" movement. Let's be clear: You need to do some serious soul searching if you continue to march for and chant "Free Palestine" in the wake of the horrific video evidence of the brutality of these terrorists against women, children, and innocent civilians. Just this week, radical members of this "Free Palestine" movement engaged in violent demonstrations outside the Democratic National Committee headquarters in Washington, D.C. They injured Capitol Police officers and decried their own party for supporting Israel in their war against Hamas. This is a serious, sickening problem on the progressive left and it is only growing stronger. | | | | | | THE ONLY IMMEDIATE DEAL TO SECURE OUR SOUTHERN BORDER | | == | There is only one, immediate deal on the table in Congress to secure our southern border: tying any additional aid for Ukraine with substantial policy changes to curtail illegal immigration. Right now, there are negotiations underway in the Senate to pair meaningful reforms - like addressing abuses in our asylum system that encourage illegal immigration - to Ukraine aid. This is something I have been calling for in Congress, because it is our only leverage point to force the White House to actually sign border security policies into law. Republicans must understand that this is the only way we will get meaningful border security, which we badly need. This is our one chance. The White House desperately wants to provide additional aid for Ukraine, which we can use to our advantage in leveraging new measures to secure our own border. Our message is simple: no aid to Ukraine without meaningful policy reforms to stop the illegal immigration crisis. | | | | | | | | == | | | == | My custom eyepatch is back in stock - with options for left or right eye. Durable, strong, and comfortable. It's the same eyepatch I wear everyday. | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | == | == | | | | | | | | NEWS | POLITICO: == NATIONAL REVIEW: == WALL STREET JOURNAL: == | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thank you for reading and staying informed. | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | | | | | | | | == | Was this email forwarded to you? == to get the latest updates on the fight in Washington direct from me. Any questions, comments, or concerns? Simply reply to this email or give Team Crenshaw a call at 281-888-4016. These updates are only possible with the generous gift of supporters like you! If you'd like to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. | | | == == == | | | | | | PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS | | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Coalition for Education Freedom rallies in Jackson
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-11571393?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Parents, children, teachers and lawmakers gathered in Jackson this week to call for education reform in Mississippi at an event we hosted. **
---
|
---
_Corey DeAngelis meets students from the Redeemer's School_
| **In states that have education freedom, each child is entitled to an Education Savings Account, into which the state government pays around $8,000 – $9,000 annually. Mom and dad are then able to spend that money sending their child to a public, private, church or charter school.** Families are even allowed to allocate the money to pay for things like extra tuition, if that is what is right for their child.

When will we see education freedom in Mississippi?

**School choice evangelist, Corey DeAngelis, spoke at our rally about the education revolution empowering parents in half a dozen states across America.**
---
|
---
| **Last week, Mississippi Republicans won a super majority.** Mississippi has a Republican Governor, Lieutenant Governor and Attorney General. Both the House and Senate have solid Republican majorities. **It would be super exciting if conservatives used this super majority to achieve lasting change to improve our education system, on top of past gains.**
---
|
---
_Education Freedom is for everyone!_
| Arkansas recently passed the LEARNS Act, which gives families education freedom. I was especially pleased that Arkansas state representative, Aaron Pilkington, came to our event to explain how Arkansas Republicans have used their super majority to give every family in Arkansas control over their child’s share of tax dollars.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a8428cee61&e=5703353baa)
---
_Aaron Pilkington explains how Republicans in Arkansas delivered to everyone_
| Arkansas Governor, Sarah Huckabee Sanders and Rep Aaron Pilkington are great advocates for conservative education policy! They show how it should be done.

**Imagine for a moment if every Mississippi family had an Education Savings Account, with the state government paying in say $8,000 – 9,000 a year.**

Some would be perfectly happy with the way things are and continue to send their child to the local public school. Others might decide to use some of their $8,000 annual allowance to pay for a few extra tutorial lessons to help prepare for the SATs. Or perhaps to fund lessons in Spanish, instead of French.

Some may decide that with $8,000 – 9,000 extra money to allocate, they could send their kids to a private school or a church school. Others might opt for micro schools or home schooling.

**The key point is that with mom and dad controlling where that money goes, we would see a whole range of options for each individual child.**
---
|
---
_Shad White with friends_
| **_I can see why socialists oppose school choice. Having listened to parents and teachers, I find it hard to understand why anyone else would not support it! _**

Let’s make education freedom happen in Mississippi! There is growing momentum for change. Join us in being part of it!

Have an awesome weekend!
---

Douglas Carswell

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: REVEALED: What school book fairs are teaching children
body:
Here's what we're up against.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a1163d7d267437abe561654d1abbf5d&_e=nacSk_Sm1w3yRvhBYIhPTgWZa514j7sgdK__GRNAA9A9OwIAdc0UKAjbBBjTZkP-wHmC8wOVJV-B_vAgl4GikTdg2W2e7DWIyQLBVaE-4KQ3fIypAcClD_1RhIVx76EOlF0e2qlbaLZJX4_aG21SEPOwQxvuYfgg-FRZZ3shYL6hdqv9QuYgDZPdNGo0xcmKO-k9s1PzRwi-dZl6t7dp3YB5G6lRHVUcfJtuJg443_36os_KyjBPGbPvnWAmVupp "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a1163d7d267437abe561654d1abbf5d&_e=nacSk_Sm1w3yRvhBYIhPTgWZa514j7sgdK__GRNAA9A9OwIAdc0UKAjbBBjTZkP-wHmC8wOVJV-B_vAgl4GikTdg2W2e7DWIyQLBVaE-4KRGRiV7Akm0aNBHjqhZnMCbGaNjAQDji-4l2ru0Rw16FTTthdLwWJcDJe1AydiooA1zahvkGc6yrGJtPirmuUUDW0-BiuqGMfQ8fvJqC_H3Xwaoqom22BmVOi8OT3A4UcoEoxBgX3KjLBF4XB_Nutjp)[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a1163d7d267437abe561654d1abbf5d&_e=nacSk_Sm1w3yRvhBYIhPTgWZa514j7sgdK__GRNAA9A9OwIAdc0UKAjbBBjTZkP-wHmC8wOVJV-B_vAgl4GikTdg2W2e7DWIyQLBVaE-4KSVnyUKXA6BV4lEbMzs1HEyWFbbwSdcZ8h5t1nfJRDA4zKr4KHN1E2e_ODNExXS3ADfBeTi-i1eHM-Tff6vlYVm1p01X-5b3xDbhVN9t1HXSvTszLsnx2mJZQ-VeNCSZd2fxG3295HOXp3sBeZ3_pTZ)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a1163d7d267437abe561654d1abbf5d&_e=nacSk_Sm1w3yRvhBYIhPTgWZa514j7sgdK__GRNAA9A9OwIAdc0UKAjbBBjTZkP-wHmC8wOVJV-B_vAgl4GikTdg2W2e7DWIyQLBVaE-4KQIYsaX2VmGmqEg0YEH5iutjTCbtNI4ODcBjZrH0_i_a5vuwifHE_16tJLrFw_yVGYxeH7tzlytQHMmWtWAxe2dsZcUKbJ3wOcKUBpuxeshg8bc1SB5M0FWnEuTDxmL-PHK9i18OakkJyrNlT_rvv0E)

[Donate](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a1163d7d267437abe561654d1abbf5d&_e=nacSk_Sm1w3yRvhBYIhPTgWZa514j7sgdK__GRNAA9A9OwIAdc0UKAjbBBjTZkP-wHmC8wOVJV-B_vAgl4GikTdg2W2e7DWIyQLBVaE-4KR_N51ZRV9BnLtBiotgJHajBdInedl-15yeiwR62wvogPF5d654nV_D3KW0VdomK4jnl1dUiR9YKTEcx8krhtZ6Jk8omc02p1UGiNLISef8i7gxMOm5jqnSXjzQJYxGZrqKhR-3O4hdIJr6j-ZrG96n)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

[Donate $10 >>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a1163d7d267437abe561654d1abbf5d&_e=nacSk_Sm1w3yRvhBYIhPTgWZa514j7sgdK__GRNAA9A9OwIAdc0UKAjbBBjTZkP-wHmC8wOVJV-B_vAgl4GikTBgHwICNW8NhHdD9JfpL9_QA1bCo3SDR7uXzRH6iReZyxFDbUEC9bmSxUodoKMZVi_-N6OgCb8m2PDMrs4Vb7lyDh5GlUqs1S69Onn_TsSyOJBikgdwGZByfj76RWtPRN4gO7cg3hwFYdjn2n8nBzBM2Kh6pzjf_Cbx8snObCg9)

[Donate Any Amount >>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a1163d7d267437abe561654d1abbf5d&_e=nacSk_Sm1w3yRvhBYIhPTgWZa514j7sgdK__GRNAA9A9OwIAdc0UKAjbBBjTZkP-wHmC8wOVJV-B_vAgl4GikfInvhPPpbZI3gHfyK1dehMfNIdBNuIWltvuCteL48qByT_lPm0o1WhDDYz64GF-Plj0SzXxk5lXVSsAxcpW6UvcOXDJT2ILX0yMSZeHEDk-T1CQRjXJL7XIpx9icQBR53eSnFeJ8uH_ztAPsMel6BXbQeYHKOhf4U-cp4MEiN-i6ExPYWLdOO56t4_w095wGw%3D%3D)

It's not complicated! It's what you and I grew up with.

Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic!

clean_body: Here's what we're up against. "SkyTree Book Fairs" Friend, SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries. Here's what we're up against. These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material): Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda. Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children. Here is the solution: SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda. Here's how you can help. SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic. And it's working! SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA! No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character. SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!! We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country. Let's bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. It's not complicated! It's what you and I grew up with. Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic! God bless, Kirk Cameron P.S. Scholastic's monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation. I've partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic. A reminder of what we're up against: It's time to fight back. name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true. _What we see today didn 't happen overnight. It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan - then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I've dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** - and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I'm asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=11a3155a634a45b2b1b0cccd3ca8b328&_e=qQOjfIKdyQEYpTcT-lmr4KW3txch8GelcUVUDpOIjeFkfJuxsVhWF9wsdijBE6ysAcRdJdIhWfnWsVoQBOKwaazsdK65QFywm3O-QdzmwMC7zRefxOR0GGdf1j1XuGm8nm9mRo-QK3hl4kM1pdfJMoKVWuC1xgAC9b4DzWj6QzykiD0pbROgQAw4JXj-GzHX4x3ttZamaU7yXuDXEMETXuI8ujkRTmnOBJXb2KX1R7i9xMgA-B80W_hxpzFAoyAdvqXX4YzVCKC0X57W4XAMcU5BQm6EIgivP-mgIKyUfFuEChT7mxWLvK7u_eu2VUKMS0_l6GofanZf3GWru0JJyX-tWS48QUO5ckEY4QtsMCGZGqNAi14rPeLNU-xVzJu0lajRykRN6KLl9CV5fqxzVQ%3D%3D)** When you think of "the enemy within" you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making - but most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. **That 's why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state - and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... "A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza "_The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin "David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We've reached the point in our history that will decide our future - and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That's why I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left's evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=11a3155a634a45b2b1b0cccd3ca8b328&_e=qQOjfIKdyQEYpTcT-lmr4KW3txch8GelcUVUDpOIjeFkfJuxsVhWF9wsdijBE6ysAcRdJdIhWfnWsVoQBOKwaazsdK65QFywm3O-QdzmwMC7zRefxOR0GGdf1j1XuGm8nm9mRo-QK3hl4kM1pdfJMoKVWuC1xgAC9b4DzWj6QzykiD0pbROgQAw4JXj-GzHX4x3ttZamaU7yXuDXEMETXuI8ujkRTmnOBJXb2KX1R7i9xMgA-B80W_hxpzFAoyAd0RYdwoCGDYZWggMafrry54k2-39AdnL31UFR4AvkRSBDJSZb48ELqJLW1nBtyR78VmH7OcEAwvJUh-4D8O3f6snxr2UjYUqyzq8qEWXQoA4oh-vARMGX6ohXVPY46YT8mM5zjAPeiqvqvSLT_10hsw%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make our country better - they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform" America. **And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it's up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I'll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=11a3155a634a45b2b1b0cccd3ca8b328&_e=qQOjfIKdyQEYpTcT-lmr4KW3txch8GelcUVUDpOIjeFkfJuxsVhWF9wsdijBE6ysAcRdJdIhWfnWsVoQBOKwaazsdK65QFywm3O-QdzmwMC7zRefxOR0GGdf1j1XuGm8nm9mRo-QK3hl4kM1pdfJMoKVWuC1xgAC9b4DzWj6QzykiD0pbROgQAw4JXj-GzHX4x3ttZamaU7yXuDXEMETXuI8ujkRTmnOBJXb2KX1R7i9xMgA-B80W_hxpzFAoyAdqj-6L8DOIC5jPZTJ74UrcFGdQrq5RQH2YPM8E8ygcpNiHVv3X6P9m3xIQJBiLoLEAGZxK6UlCG-VGyAcHNXDkr5r5Sedkwu8mlGz8eNyUuyyaYHs4R3tuskuNHLPYfTYuJbr0xHM-fZ-wCXhBW87YQ%3D%3D)**

Stacey Abrams’ Brother-In-Law Arrested On Human Trafficking Charges

The brother-in-law of former Democratic gubernatorial candidate Stacey
Abrams was arrested on human trafficking charges, Florida authorities
said. Jimmie Gardner, 57, allegedly met a 16-year-old girl in a Tampa
hotel and attempted to pay her for sex, according to a Friday release
by the State Attorney’s Office for the 13th Judicial Circuit.

Wallace held in her 102-page ruling Friday that Trump is not an
“officer of the United States” disqualified from holding office under
section three of the 14th Amendment, ordering Colorado’s secretary of
state to place Trump [...]

Republican Rep. James Comer of Kentucky on Friday said attorneys for
James Biden “signaled” that he will cooperate with a probe into the
Biden family’s business dealings. Attorneys for President Joe Biden’s
brother indicated he would cooperate with the probe by the House
Oversight Committee, Comer said during a Friday appearance on “Just
The News, No Noise” on Real America’s Voice.

James Comer Says Biden’s Brother Has ‘Signaled’ That He Will Cooperate
In House GOP-Led Probe

Republican Rep. James Comer of Kentucky on Friday said attorneys for
James Biden “signaled” that he will cooperate with a probe into the
Biden family’s business dealings. Attorneys for President Joe Biden’s
brother indicated he would cooperate with the probe by the House
Oversight Committee, Comer said during a Friday appearance on “Just
The News, No Noise” on Real America’s Voice.

This Supreme Court Term Will Have Big Implications For The First
Amendment

The Supreme Court is hearing a handful of cases this term with
significant implications for free speech, particularly on social
media. One of the major themes emerging for the 2023-2024 term,
alongside challenges to the administrative state, is the justices’
interest in clarifying First Amendment law as it applies to social
media and questions of government action.

Y’all, Here are three facts you need to know about the fight to hold the U.S. Senate for Democrats:
1. Joe Manchin announced he isn’t going to run again in West Virginia. **Now, Republicans are all but guaranteed to flip that seat in the Senate.**

2. In total, **the GOP needs to gain just two seats to take control of the Senate.** Those are incredibly small margins to begin with. Holding the Senate may come down to the Republican-held seats we can flip.

3. **So defeating Marsha Blackburn just got that much more important.**

I’m in this race because Marsha Blackburn is a bully and a puppet for billionaires and greedy corporations. Our state deserves so much better — and I know we can win this thing with the help of supporters like you. But I also know that the outcome of our election has implications far beyond Tennessee’s state borders. We’ve got to keep the Senate majority out of the hands of extremist MAGA Republicans. It’s not going to be easy — Marsha Blackburn relies on political insiders and corporate PACs for her funding. clean_body: Especially if I have anything to say about it | Y’all, Here are three facts you need to know about the fight to hold the U.S. Senate for Democrats: 1. Joe Manchin announced he isn’t going to run again in West Virginia. Now, Republicans are all but guaranteed to flip that seat in the Senate. 2. In total, the GOP needs to gain just two seats to take control of the Senate. Those are incredibly small margins to begin with. Holding the Senate may come down to the Republican-held seats we can flip. 3. So defeating Marsha Blackburn just got that much more important. I’m in this race because Marsha Blackburn is a bully and a puppet for billionaires and greedy corporations. Our state deserves so much better — and I know we can win this thing with the help of supporters like you. But I also know that the outcome of our election has implications far beyond Tennessee’s state borders. We’ve got to keep the Senate majority out of the hands of extremist MAGA Republicans. It’s not going to be easy — Marsha Blackburn relies on political insiders and corporate PACs for her funding. On the other hand, my campaign is powered by grassroots donors like you — who give $5, $15, or $50 at a time — to power our campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Gloria = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

Just about one year ago, I emailed patriots across the country about my client, Jesus Rivera.

Jesus is a Marine combat veteran and patriot.

On January 6, 2021, Jesus peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

He didn’t protest.

He didn’t attack police or use harsh language.

He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids, and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies, even outright fraud.**

Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

His wife asked for the warrant several times, but didn’t receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home.

**Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by FBI thugs.**

Then leftist District Judge Colleen Collar-Kottelly sentenced Jesus to 8 MONTHS in federal prison!

(Let me tell you, she’s the absolute worst judge I’ve appeared before in 45 years.)

Well, Jesus is out of prison now.

And I’ve filed a NEW class action lawsuit for him and each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent update.

**This crucial new lawsuit can PROVE that the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. Their convictions can be THROWN OUT. Their prosecutions can be THROWN OUT.**

I’m Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 41 years.

You’ve seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I’m proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime.**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And let me tell you, my critical new lawsuit can be a game changer.**

Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS ... and I can PROVE it in court!

This shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can’t be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can put an innocent Marine veteran in prison for 8 months, they can do it to you and me, our families and friends, and our fellow Americans.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**[Friend, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxkz70OmzAQB_CnOTaQfYf5GBjaUipV6pislbGPYBVjZEwi3r4iirp0_d_vvrTfFjedHdRfAXF2dgdEoC-AeCS669vtVzzz79vP_Ie64-Mq4jdATOfG_-RnSMFeu-VK6z6zXYlaTibjTtZCkFSoRDZ3JE0rSbZG2qYVFUpNjaa6olZJJFtnrkOBJKVsJJU1qkLQODbKtDyphtVEUIr3omKKzGl26x-OVrvlLEzw2dLNKW37-7ABcLiQDf6lk5mLyM9nYQLg4HV0K-cn65jrKXHM_ZgHDzQcyf_ewxENA_X_McDqAp6tOzxQH_wnMdpv2j3Wq2n8ZInjZaZkJWClfTjWBNSjymJnt5dbFrdXNZTi8f7HBP83AAD__xGzfIA)**

Please give what you can right away!

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Friend, my NEW class action lawsuit can PROVE that the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots.** Their convictions can be THROWN OUT. Their prosecutions can be THROWN OUT.

clean_body: | I've got a lot to say -- but let me start by saying THANK YOU for all the support you've given me over the past few weeks. Stepping out of the newsroom and into the rough, brutal world of politics was never an easy decision. Thankfully, all the people I've met along the way have made it all worth it. The donations that I've received have helped me launch an election-winning campaign, and we're just getting started. Without my grassroots supporters, we would never be able to keep fighting. I can't do this without you; that's why I hate to ask you again, but there's just too much on the line in 2024. Can you help me reach my November fundraising goal? November will officially be the first full month since I announced my campaign. My radical opponents have already taken notice of my campaign, and they're calling in leftist operatives from across America to try and beat me next year. They're willing to try everything and ANYTHING to stop me -- I wouldn't put anything past them. I 'M HUMBLY ASKING FOR YOUR HELP The only way we're going to Save America is by Taking Back the Senate, and STEP ONE to achieving this dream is by meeting EVERY ONE of our fundraising goals. Can you contribute anything to my MONTH ONE fundraising deadline by donating below? | Thank you so much for your help. I'm counting on your support. Best, Kari Lake Candidate for U.S. Senate in Arizona Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate If you'd like to donate by mail, -.

**We begged you...
We pleaded with you...
But we FAILED to hit our Ad Campaign Goal.** If **Jamie Raskin** saying the Electoral College is “hazardous to democracy,” **Pete Buttigieg** saying it’s “undemocratic” and **Barack Obama** saying it’s a “vestige” of older times doesn’t convince you...

What else can we say to get you to chip in to fully fund our Abolish the Electoral College Ad Campaign?? **We can’t stop Trump and save Democracy without you!** We’re giving you one last chance: There’s too much at stake to sit this out. [**Chip in $7 before our extended midnight deadline to fund our ads and support our work »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/33585?t=7&akid=20420%2E4449941%2EhyRTmR) | [$3,874 LEFT TO RAISE: CHIP IN $7 BEFORE OUR MIDNIGHT EXTENDED DEADLINE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/33585?t=8&akid=20420%2E4449941%2EhyRTmR)

fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=20420%2E4449941%2EhyRTmR). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=20420%2E4449941%2EhyRTmR).**

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Brass tacks: Why $5 means so much to our campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=824%2E135344%2EidEltz)

Good morning.
We're writing today to ask if you can make a $5 contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for Senate.
Why $5, specifically?
$5 because Michigan has the only competitive open seat in the country, and will therefore be one of the most expensive and competitive Senate races of the cycle.
$5 because there are now three credible Republican opponents in this race, and big-money donors are preparing to throw their full force behind the eventual nominee as they try to flip this seat red.
$5 because the DeVos family has already contributed $46,200 to one of our Republican opponents -- and we know that more money from GOP megadonors is definitely on the way.
$5 because, although we’re not facing a real FEC deadline this month, we closely track (like hawks!) our fundraising progress to ensure we have the resources to win down the line. We then use our internal benchmarks to guide key strategic investments.
$5 because political experts are pointing to Michigan as a must-win state to win the presidency and protect the Senate majority.
It may not seem like $5 can make a huge difference in one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races in the country, but by the time you get to this point in the email, a few folks have already made their donation.
Now, we're asking you to do the same to help us keep pace with our internal fundraising benchmarks. [**Please use this link to contribute $5, or whatever you can manage today, to help Elissa Slotkin keep this Senate seat in Michigan blue for Democrats.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231118-1-tt&amount=3&t=2&akid=824%2E135344%2EidEltz)**

Team Slotkin

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Asking you for $10
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Yep. Just $10.
#

Subject line says it all, Peter.
$10
Yep. Just $10. That’s what I’m asking you to chip in to my campaign today.
$10 because as the weather gets cooler, this race is heating up. We’ve seen several polls drop in Arizona over the last couple weeks. And one thing you learn in politics is that if polls are dropping, attack ads are sure to follow. We have to be ready for that.
$10 because in most of those polls we’re neck and neck — or even behind — Kari Lake. Arizona will be the most competitive, hardest fought race in the country. Senate control will come down to this race, so we can’t afford to come up short.
And yes, $10 because the holidays are right around the corner. We’re a bit behind where we need to be going into Thanksgiving week. We really need to catch up.
So, how about it, Peter. Can I count on you to chip in that $10? If you’re with me, use this link:
[**https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/10-on-18**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231118-1-f&t=1&akid=1452%2E734936%2E_gYn_q)

name: Michelle Ngwafon
subject: 100% rating from NARAL and Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73572951/438960340/1232224838?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjA1NGFmYi0xYzg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UUUiPbJx39p5uj_C1mL0PNxz94zQRsMXglVP8Z1ZOtE=&emci=d2f8c9cf-9785-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=c6054afb-1c86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25681160) Peter, Congressman David Trone has a proven track record of fighting for abortion access, ending the maternal mortality crisis in America, and expanding critical medical research in Congress. From cosponsoring legislation to strengthen abortion rights to serving on the Black Maternal Health Caucus and working to pass landmark legislation to support the mental health of children and parents, David Trone has always been a steadfast advocate for Maryland women. David’s record in Congress speaks for itself:
* Member of the Black Maternal Health Caucus.
* Co-founder of the Bipartisan Mental Health and Substance Use Disorder Task Force, which advocated for historic mental health programs for children and parents.
* 100% rating from NARAL.
* 100% rating from Planned Parenthood. A perfect voting record from Planned Parenthood three terms in a row. Endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund for re-election in 2022.
* Directly supported the opening of a new abortion clinic in Western Maryland, an abortion desert along the border of West Virginia.

**On Saturday, December 9th, Congressman David Trone is hosting a roundtable discussion on Women’s Health in Montgomery County** where experts and advocates will speak on a range of issues, including maternal mortality, abortion access, and the disproportionate impact of rising prescription drugs and healthcare costs on women of color across Maryland. clean_body: | Peter, Congressman David Trone has a proven track record of fighting for abortion access, ending the maternal mortality crisis in America, and expanding critical medical research in Congress. From cosponsoring legislation to strengthen abortion rights to serving on the Black Maternal Health Caucus and working to pass landmark legislation to support the mental health of children and parents, David Trone has always been a steadfast advocate for Maryland women. David’s record in Congress speaks for itself: Member of the Black Maternal Health Caucus. Co-founder of the Bipartisan Mental Health and Substance Use Disorder Task Force, which advocated for historic mental health programs for children and parents. 100% rating from NARAL. 100% rating from Planned Parenthood. A perfect voting record from Planned Parenthood three terms in a row. Endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund for re-election in 2022. Directly supported the opening of a new abortion clinic in Western Maryland, an abortion desert along the border of West Virginia. body:
| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=e3c3f5b46aca4694aa280196ea35ea02&_e=iypsXNFKssV4O-QE-vZsR4xf2brtSxABIXM9DkNpCAGknKccE0678JUzuK0ZvcJlKsS4R5dAcMNjzv-_84-7GkxaT0WeJWua8NaR8K-_DFQy3ACSy66lBGkr_4xrsyu19J2QF17Av1q3tiDqd98a_vc6UFk7h8ZaWhm2kNWwPuqoPJ-01vygc0TEr_DnBrFvkxojUA03NEjh3gbGPDbEAeaIa3S26Shk7fE_HCAywQer1eCquBCGGgdwug7R6vZOTw-m6nbZKd-Bt0jlR5uKnAyTMdknfEYs8MSAtZZLonajlUpclcIj4KGAHuIsY2w3qL1oq0hH4CR1DeMY7zJN0MrLuDIiV6WbJ6UvR8I2PUhxv-jpDSYprnBlU-mbscnQ8IFJ6A5XS4QVb7_7sFluVAf5wS3TMuSdMHcrEfywS78nb4ZpBQOqifXSEOhwfziRJ0heTAh32HorknzLaVgtl1SEbBLah-NRxATDjLRgUlI%3D)
---

Friend,

The reason I ran for office in the first place was to represent the people of Iowa and to try and solve issues to the best of my ability.

We’ve got more issues than you can shake a stick at going on in our country right now. I don’t want to take up too much of your time, but I would love to know which is most important to you.

So, if you could, would you mind taking the one question survey below to let me know what issue is most important to you, and what issue I should focus my efforts on **IMMEDIATELY?**
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=e3c3f5b46aca4694aa280196ea35ea02&_e=iypsXNFKssV4O-QE-vZsR4xf2brtSxABIXM9DkNpCAGknKccE0678JUzuK0ZvcJlKsS4R5dAcMNjzv-_84-7GkxaT0WeJWua8NaR8K-_DFQy3ACSy66lBGkr_4xrsyu19J2QF17Av1q3tiDqd98a_vc6UFk7h8ZaWhm2kNWwPuqoPJ-01vygc0TEr_DnBrFvkxojUA03NEjh3gbGPDbEAeaIa3S26Shk7fE_HCAywQer1eCquBCGGgdwug7R6vZOTw-m6nbZKd-Bt0jlR5uKnAyTMdknfEYs8MSAtZZLonajlUpclcIj4KGAHuIsY2w3qL1oq0hH4CR1DeMY7zJN0OjyUZJndmynCcVLA-yffxkywpsjqS4EytlpSZDAveobaN5hPmtCf7CE3Vd-aBEVX_agBdAtxGQZZYuS_npzBi_thJw6OnAisILRX2X9gjwJFhIxIbDktfn3HTeElleNQVnRaGqHrnOeUqob-yLtSDY%3D)
---

I’m going to fight for you and for solutions to all these issues, but I just want to know where to focus my energy the most right now.

Thank you for letting me serve you.

God Bless,

subject: The tank is running low...

body:
We spent down our reserves pretty considerably over the last several months.
#
Derek,
We spent the last couple days raising money for a good man, Eugene Vindman, to help him get his campaign off to a strong start.
Thousands of VoteVets supporters chipped in. It really helped.
But now we’ve got to get back to refilling our own war chest. We spent down our reserves pretty considerably over the last several months.
We spent several hundred thousand dollars running ads online and on TV pressuring Tuberville and the GOP to get our officers the promotions they’ve earned. There’s still resistance there, but we’ve made a ton of progress. We will finish that fight.
We also spent a few hundred thousand dollars in Virginia, supporting candidates directly and funding advertising that helped flip the House and hold the Senate. We had big wins there earlier this month. That’s worth celebrating.
But now, we’re turning our attention to 2024. Trump is openly embracing the same language and tactics used by fascists ahead of World War Two — guys like Mussolini and Hitler. He’s plotting to rip out 50,000 career public servants and replace them with MAGA loyalists. He’s made no secret that he’ll weaponize the Department of Justice and the Military against protestors and political opponents.
We’ve got our work cut out for us. VoteVets is ready. Are you with us?

subject: They say this is a sleeper race...

body:
But let me tell you what I think. | | | Peter, The Left-wing media reports the Virginia U.S. Senate race is a “sleeper race” with a guaranteed Democrat victory. _I’m here to tell you it’s not._ We have seen incredible momentum since we first launched our campaign, and that momentum hasn’t shown any signs of slowing down. The people of Virginia are sick of the same, swamp entrenched, Democrat establishment leadership. The voters told us this by electing Republican Gov. Glenn Youngkin just two years ago. Now, I think Virginia is ready for a fresh new conservative face in the U.S. Senate who isn’t afraid to put in the work and make tough decisions. I’m ready to be that leader, but I need your help. **If you haven’t already, will you pitch in now with the link below and become a founding donor for our U.S. Senate campaign?** [**https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=3e80793009d3462aad0e6888cb4861fa&_e=CMJEPcuVg1i9cahedxkpbUVrSxQ78TszJCy3PHOon1eRLD970cNen5BJiuYchOpu1ELomaGTQ_8oNiTqP1syJAZb0TDOfcuyTid8D4oZDE9BoiMvTTEuDsx50AletsCjIX_VDhz5wwF2R0YlGD2ngCiLn15uv5MBF-c1h0lKeDFPXP3Hr0dk2wlB-L9amO1fv2W3DhFi_1JfogcsA_Z_z5FmddB2XA0cZR_8orZ0yzwBJK-siLp6mjufi3aqec7K_-dEI5T6_SDbE6xHRrl0aTAlhGUGbTZcv2fFoueFYYF5nC4JferEVoJBDMc4o05Pj9Pv-B5u8LEVaxXtUe9zX-6OyXTlerpQAPbwbGldiex4UMhs6V80xiGVBKqrlNgw) **With your help, I know we can SHOCK the D.C. establishment and carry this race to victory. ** In Liberty,

clean_body: But let me tell you what I think. | | | Peter, The Left-wing media reports the Virginia U.S. Senate race is a “sleeper race” with a guaranteed Democrat victory. I’m here to tell you it’s not. We have seen incredible momentum since we first launched our campaign, and that momentum hasn’t shown any signs of slowing down. The people of Virginia are sick of the same, swamp entrenched, Democrat establishment leadership. The voters told us this by electing Republican Gov. Glenn Youngkin just two years ago. Now, I think Virginia is ready for a fresh new conservative face in the U.S. Senate who isn’t afraid to put in the work and make tough decisions. I’m ready to be that leader, but I need your help. If you haven’t already, will you pitch in now with the link below and become a founding donor for our U.S. Senate campaign? With your help, I know we can SHOCK the D.C. establishment and carry this race to victory. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 Hung knows the American Dream is worth saving - because he’s lived it. Now, he’s running for Senate to defend it from the next generation. Hung Cao came to America with little besides the clothes on his back, and after his 25-year career in the Navy, he’s not done fighting for our future. If you’re on board for our fight for Virginia, and become a supporter today! | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0a11577468c4a9da86743dc1de22bb0&_e=JisbzcVCDGN_8xkqHzM6Mpw6bTKqV6j-DM_bCpkOEo5v-Of1E2c0QyXC9ZREipTRnGTmRX21eIeQ-HyylqZyR_gmEm3X85Up_0ZUjB6FtcaD53b15Ob8F1tk6WRqspgjitQ3bs54j7J-KiHfQ3sQeSAhdIEyn_qt_b6KJTKRS-5nU-sCZx-V7Ymi4uZGg3s6kbrzXsx1qJnRWFyUTExCmc9xdYNh7P8yFd2kTKDs9mP6Y0ZZH4udogGwWaq2jQQ3gpmIYnlI6ai2YJMoBryv-DmeTE5x2cWT_1R5r8BIrUY80N12_oTfyVyco6AOJT1stHITjAg-ubuXvCfXZb8MRMhZUM-XWjUkZG47PUZ3d-zIUvQgWwxUJ3lZSQWBlZYbgtq9HAPZt8EBGfFTCzKkDsyj0K91JvLplTYKzyITA6AgFolvzuJ5_ZDdK3RqDJMs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0a11577468c4a9da86743dc1de22bb0&_e=JisbzcVCDGN_8xkqHzM6Mpw6bTKqV6j-DM_bCpkOEo5v-Of1E2c0QyXC9ZREipTRnGTmRX21eIeQ-HyylqZyR_gmEm3X85Up_0ZUjB6FtcaD53b15Ob8F1tk6WRqspgjitQ3bs54j7J-KiHfQ3sQeSAhdIEyn_qt_b6KJTKRS-5nU-sCZx-V7Ymi4uZGg3s6kbrzXsx1qJnRWFyUTExCmc9xdYNh7P8yFd2kTKDs9mP6Y0ZZH4udogGwWaq2jQQ3gpmIYnlI6ai2YJMoBryv-HijO6HXfG4W2pYJzneYDdKEv1Wr6-GUXbLXLDkaLQx1J_-FB5-Qpf8SAF1AIFvl48dhtECSFIu0KZ6__NqSOypH3s0AfGOxQq5FgRl8ZIg1HdIwMTt1dEYCqB1G-LmIUOd6cZxBWwbhSnze4ATYJMttmMVdmFP_ykA6Nz2B7flG)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0a11577468c4a9da86743dc1de22bb0&_e=JisbzcVCDGN_8xkqHzM6Mpw6bTKqV6j-DM_bCpkOEo5v-Of1E2c0QyXC9ZREipTRnGTmRX21eIeQ-HyylqZyR_gmEm3X85Up_0ZUjB6FtcaD53b15Ob8F1tk6WRqspgjitQ3bs54j7J-KiHfQ3sQeSAhdIEyn_qt_b6KJTKRS-5nU-sCZx-V7Ymi4uZGg3s6kbrzXsx1qJnRWFyUTExCmc9xdYNh7P8yFd2kTKDs9mP6Y0ZZH4udogGwWaq2jQQ3gpmIYnlI6ai2YJMoBryv-PVqNAz-BgvnDP0Kv4AOcecXn-eYExae0qe2oi_J3XAssZX6jmkpdL9yvSvP9KM5TMf0EeeQvKwsGERP1fIAmnSCIK2FOPtO-P8eRJ4XknATTKa89yzWsrbCjYbtM8Pk3ARKx5e1420RqVg1cT0pOorTK_jWR3WTp8XACUkJ0Lxh)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0a11577468c4a9da86743dc1de22bb0&_e=JisbzcVCDGN_8xkqHzM6Mpw6bTKqV6j-DM_bCpkOEo5v-Of1E2c0QyXC9ZREipTRnGTmRX21eIeQ-HyylqZyR_gmEm3X85Up_0ZUjB6FtcaD53b15Ob8F1tk6WRqspgjitQ3bs54j7J-KiHfQ3sQeSAhdIEyn_qt_b6KJTKRS-5nU-sCZx-V7Ymi4uZGg3s6kbrzXsx1qJnRWFyUTExCmc9xdYNh7P8yFd2kTKDs9mP6Y0ZZH4udogGwWaq2jQQ3gpmIYnlI6ai2YJMoBryv-IRFo96K2SD5LPYZIgq2KkWCL_rOyY92Tkkb49voSC9BVYvMTcwbrAyprq7_POCBqrHUs_Fb1ysbmvi4h8ARyn0hKjnh_XRa3Nmxhvi2dYY_UDGMuxRhwkcb70kRlSzPNrUKCx5cFmhu3I21_lyspvyRLiS1OA9L3Z0hqK052xp7).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Freedom Nation Today

Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

subject: Rick Scott's Navy hat

body:
this is what Rick Scott doesn't want you to know
| | |
---
Look, Rick Scott is a fraud.
He proudly wears his Navy baseball cap at every opportunity: photo ops, interviews, and even in his new attack ad. **But the truth is that Rick Scott made a FORTUNE while his company defrauded the health insurance provider for _millions_ of active duty service members, veterans, and their families.**
Rick Scott resigned from his role, pled the Fifth, walked away with zero consequences, and used the massive fortune he made to jumpstart his political career.
And that's just the tip of the iceberg. Rick Scott has made a political career out of lying to voters while getting richer and richer behind the scenes.
He _claims_ to support working families, but he wrote the plan to end Medicare and Social Security. He _claims_ to be a proud American, but he's undermined our democracy by pushing Donald Trump's Big Lie about the 2020 election. **He _claims_ to be a public servant, but he's shown us time and time again that, in reality, he only serves himself. **
**In 2024, we have the chance to defeat him: Democrat Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is fighting to flip this seat blue and a poll shows that this race is already a tie![But Rick Scott is ready to shell out millions to retake the lead, so Debbie needs grassroots donors like you to stand with her. But the truth is that Rick Scott made a FORTUNE while his company defrauded the health insurance provider for millions of active duty service members, veterans, and their families. Rick Scott resigned from his role, pled the Fifth, walked away with zero consequences, and used the massive fortune he made to jumpstart his political career. And that's just the tip of the iceberg. Rick Scott has made a political career out of lying to voters while getting richer and richer behind the scenes. He claims to support working families, but he wrote the plan to end Medicare and Social Security. He claims to be a proud American, but he's undermined our democracy by pushing Donald Trump's Big Lie about the 2020 election. He claims to be a public servant, but he's shown us time and time again that, in reality, he only serves himself. In 2024, we have the chance to defeat him: Democrat Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is fighting to flip this seat blue and a poll shows that this race is already a tie If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

| | Late last month, Georgia’s Supreme Court allowed the state’s draconian six-week abortion ban to remain in effect. As more and more anti-abortion laws pop up in state legislatures across the country, and as a surge of disinformation targets young voters and people of color, we’re fighting back. Some of the same forces restricting abortion rights are also targeting the freedom to vote. So we’re continuing to invest in voter education, engaging content, volunteer mobilization, and our online platform for civic engagement: _Civics for the Culture_. This digital civics curriculum web series helps ensure that young Black and brown voters have the information they need to participate in our democracy and make lasting change. **For Season 4, we’re partnering with Free & Just, a campaign focused on reproductive justice, to feature activists, personal stories, reproductive healthcare experts, and allies to help educate and prepare young people for 2024’s policy battles.** Previous seasons have covered topics like early voting, redistricting, and the importance of state and local elections. In its first two years, _Civics for the Culture_ garnered over 300 million impressions across social media. That’s huge! **Simply put:_Civics for the Culture_ is engaging a young, diverse audience — and we need your help to get the next season in front of as many people as possible.** [**Will you make a $20 donation now to fund _Civics for the Culture_ ’s fourth season, along with other pro-democracy and pro-voter programs to engage, educate, and advocate for voters across the country in 2024 and beyond?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73578658/438981448/539625839?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20231118_f_civicculture_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjVmY2Q1NS0yNDg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_iR-jsMSAln5t5NC8r8HubKumTLEXrCUptl1TI7C68=) Thank you for all that you do, The Fair Fight Action Team | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73578659/438981449/-941136302?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20231118_f_civicculture_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjVmY2Q1NS0yNDg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_iR-jsMSAln5t5NC8r8HubKumTLEXrCUptl1TI7C68=)

name: Bob Casey
subject: We’re against Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked candidate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I hope I can take just a moment of your time to talk about our 2024 campaign.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1160%2E552475%2Ed2vEmw)
Hi Peter,
I hope I can take just a moment of your time to talk about our 2024 Senate campaign.
Mitch McConnell's hand-picked candidate is running against me, and they're going to stop at nothing to defeat our campaign. We expect them to spend an unprecedented amount of money to flip Pennsylvania.
**[I need your help to fight back. Can you send $10, $15, $25, or whatever you can today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231118-1?refcode=em20231118&recurring=true&refcode2=1160_552475_d2vEmw&akid=1160%2E552475%2Ed2vEmw)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ [Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231118-1?amount=15&refcode=em20231118&recurring=true&refcode2=1160_552475_d2vEmw&akid=1160%2E552475%2Ed2vEmw) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231118-1?amount=25&refcode=em20231118&recurring=true&refcode2=1160_552475_d2vEmw&akid=1160%2E552475%2Ed2vEmw) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231118-1?amount=50&refcode=em20231118&recurring=true&refcode2=1160_552475_d2vEmw&akid=1160%2E552475%2Ed2vEmw) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231118-1?amount=100&refcode=em20231118&recurring=true&refcode2=1160_552475_d2vEmw&akid=1160%2E552475%2Ed2vEmw) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231118-1?amount=250&refcode=em20231118&recurring=true&refcode2=1160_552475_d2vEmw&akid=1160%2E552475%2Ed2vEmw) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231118-1?refcode=em20231118&recurring=true&refcode2=1160_552475_d2vEmw&akid=1160%2E552475%2Ed2vEmw)
---
With your support, we'll be able to protect this seat and defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.
**[If you can chip in any amount right now, it will make a difference. Thank you.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231118-1?refcode=em20231118&recurring=true&refcode2=1160_552475_d2vEmw&akid=1160%2E552475%2Ed2vEmw)**
With gratitude,
Bob

We expect them to spend an unprecedented amount of money to flip Pennsylvania. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. With your support, we'll be able to protect this seat and defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority. With gratitude, Bob To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. name: Adam Schiff
subject: I’ll always stand with labor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| For decades, I’ve championed pro-worker legislation — because it’s what the hard-working people of California and across the country deserve.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4500%2E5257348%2EXK7grr)
Derek — Our campaign is a movement of, by, and for workers.
I launched my Senate campaign at the IATSE Hall, just as I did when I first ran for California State Senate.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202311-labor-petition.QIjcCO&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231118_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4500%2E5257348%2EXK7grr)
I’ve joined picket lines across California this year, including the WGA strike and Teamsters 630.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202311-labor-petition.QIjcCO&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231118_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4500%2E5257348%2EXK7grr)
I’m proud to be endorsed by nine statewide labor unions.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202311-labor-petition.QIjcCO&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231118_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4500%2E5257348%2EXK7grr)
For decades, I’ve championed pro-worker legislation — because it’s what the hard-working people of California and across the country deserve.
That’s why in the House, I introduced legislation with Representatives Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Donald Norcross to protect striking workers’ wages and benefits.
People fighting for better working conditions on the picket lines should not have to sacrifice their paychecks or their health insurance.
As we’ve seen in the past few months, when unions stand up for good-paying jobs — writers, actors, and autoworkers — we all win.
Our legislation protects workers, plain and simple. And I’ll always fight alongside the labor movement for fair wages, good benefits, and dignity for all.
[**If you support our legislation, the _Empowering Striking Workers Act_ , please add your name today as we call on Congress to pass this into law.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202311-labor-petition.QIjcCO&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231118_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4500%2E5257348%2EXK7grr)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202311-labor-petition.QIjcCO&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231118_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=4500%2E5257348%2EXK7grr)
---
Derek, I’ll always stand with labor. Thank you for joining me in supporting our workers.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3227?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231118_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=4500%2E5257348%2EXK7grr)
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1807?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20231118_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=4500%2E5257348%2EXK7grr)
---

name: Hill Harper
subject: Just for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
I want to take this moment to personally thank you for being a part of this movement.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231118&t=1&akid=585%2E62735%2EtN7rBG)
Peter, for me the month of November has always been a month to step back, pause, acknowledge, and give thanks.
**That’s why I want to take this moment to express my heartfelt gratitude to you today.**
When I first thought about running for Senate, it wasn’t an easy decision. As an already busy single father and small business owner, this would take even more time away from being present with my son.
There’s been some tough moments during this campaign because of that. As any parent — single or not — knows, it can feel impossible to be everything that your kids need.
**However, during those tough times, I’ve always had this team to rely on.**
Whether you’ve been with me since day one of our campaign, or just joined our email list today, I want to extend my heartfelt thanks for being a part of this team.
Supporting our movement for a better Michigan goes way beyond just donating to our campaign (_although that helps a whole lot too_), it’s about not only wanting but fighting for a better future for us, our kids, and our kids’ kids.
This campaign is all about building grassroots support and it really goes a long way to have you here with me, Peter.
I hope as we quickly approach the end of the year that you feel not only the urgency but also the power driving our work. **Together we can make 2024 be a turning point in politics.**
**In 2024, we can usher in a new era in politics that centers everyday working people.** That’s a future I look forward to, and I hope you do too.
I can’t wait to see what else we achieve together.
With gratitude,
Hill
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20231118&t=2&refcode2=585_62735_tN7rBG&akid=585%2E62735%2EtN7rBG)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=585%2E62735%2EtN7rBG)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=585%2E62735%2EtN7rBG)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

name: Cecile Richards
subject: Peter, I need to be blunt with you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
This is important:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7cd88b80-7f0c-4396-819d-5e6fea8cc389/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T315c862f-3be2-495b-9773-0cb767902377/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, During my time as president of Planned Parenthood, I watched Republicans attempt to pass horrific laws to control women's bodies. But now, with Roe v. Wade no longer the law of the land, I need to be blunt with you: Anti-choice extremists are attacking abortion access like never before. In states across this country, Republicans are doing everything in their power to restrict reproductive freedom – and Mitch McConnell and his allies have threatened to pass a national abortion ban if they take back Senate control. Political analysts say that the future of the Senate could all come down to Nevada – just like it did last year – which is why I’m reaching out today: My friend, Sen. Jacky Rosen, is running for reelection. I’m working hard to help her win this fight, and I’m asking you to join me. The GOP knows the importance of Nevada, so they’re zeroing in on Jacky as a top target for defeat. She’s facing an uphill climb and won’t be able to defend her seat without grassroots support from people like you. [So please, Peter, I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $10 – split between Jacky’s campaign and Blue Amp Action’s – to keep Nevada blue, defend the Senate, and restore reproductive freedom nationwide?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T67fcebe9-83d6-4b60-9e79-ab08ed8efdca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9191558a-27d2-4735-a853-b25dde5e8bb1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f2de205-f9e6-40ff-95dd-7a6d9ccb8e1c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T328dd8f5-6f80-40ce-8a1f-49e3f420f8a3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8863603a-6a41-406f-990b-a075799159ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | Last year, the GOP flooded Nevada’s Senate race with a staggering $55 million – and their handpicked candidate came within less than 8,000 votes of winning. That’s a SLIM margin. There’s no question that Jacky’s race will be just as close – and likely even more expensive. That’s why she urgently needs grassroots resources as early in the election cycle as possible. So please, Peter, can I count on you to join me in supporting Jacky today? [Donate $10 now – or however much you can spare – to keep both Nevada and the Senate blue. This race couldn’t be more pivotal in the fight to protect reproductive freedom in America.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb14ef3e6-f0ff-4d14-9ad6-a36615c85a20/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Cecile Richards
---
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c0868a4-9e77-43ee-a4ce-67c6ac030834/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/yyz_em_fr_90do_rosen_richards230827copy1-n_copy1_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tabe61d3c-317b-4b2f-a60b-0bd6052d5a11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: if Texas Democrats can reach undecided voters, Ted Cruz's career is O V E R

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_cruz2?refcode=091423_3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_cruz2?refcode=091423_3]
Ted Cruz is a lot of things.
✅ One of Trump’s most pathetically loyal lap dogs.
✅ The errand boy of his super rich mega-donors.
✅ A gun-worshiping NRA puppet who doesn’t give a damn about the lives of Americans.
But our favorite thing about Ted Cruz?
He’s up for re-election in 2024. And he’s more vulnerable than he’s EVER been.
Cruz’s likely opponent is polling within five points of him , and Texas is FULL of independent and undecided voters.
If Democrats can reach those voters - it’s lights out for Cruz.
Will you chip in to help Texas Dems reach persuadable voters and get rid of the disgrace that is Ted Cruz once and for all? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_cruz2?refcode=091423_3]

body:
#

Hey there -
[**Today, we’re asking you to make a $5 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231118-1-30&t=1&akid=6905%2E3935704%2EMovi01)
Yes, $5.
Here’s why:
Earlier this month, Virginia voters turned out to successfully flip the Virginia House of Delegates and maintain the gun safety majority in the Virginia Senate. These results are a big deal, and they make it clear that gun safety will be a winning issue in the 2024 elections.
We’ve already begun our work to support gun safety champions in key House and Senate races next year. We’re also putting in the work to ensure we reelect President Joe Biden so he can continue implementing his gun safety agenda nationwide.
There’s still so much more we need to do before next year’s elections to make sure we win up and down the ballot. [**Can we count on you to contribute $5 to GIFFORDS PAC and help us take back our gun safety House majority and maintain our Senate majority? A gun safety majority means elected officials who stand up for their constituents and support commonsense gun legislation.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231118-1-30&t=2&akid=6905%2E3935704%2EMovi01)
