name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Hawley’s greatest achievement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
It’s definitely not something he’d tell you about himself.
#
Peter,
Josh Hawley’s greatest achievement during his time in the U.S. Senate isn’t what you’d expect — and it’s definitely not something he’d tell you about himself.
So before we ask you to **[add a donation of any amount toward our campaign to replace him,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39305?refcode=em20231118-4209&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4209%2E614464%2EjyCz5c) please let explain:**
**[DEFEAT HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39305?refcode=em20231118-4209&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4209%2E614464%2EjyCz5c)**
Since Josh Hawley was elected to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat in 2018, he’s been a champion of the out-of-touch culture wars too many politicians use to distract us — all so he could do things like block wage increases for working Missourians and refuse to vote for any investment into our state without much blowback.
Then came January 6th, 2021. That’s the day Hawley showed all of us who he really is — just a coward who will raise his fist when he thinks it’ll get more power for himself, then cut and run the moment things get real.
**After that day, Hawley’s support base started to crumble.** His former mentor, three-term GOP U.S. Senator Jack Danforth, said supporting Hawley in 2018 was _“the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life.”_ One of Hawley’s longtime mega-donors even called him “undemocratic” and a “political opportunist” who “should be censured by his Senate colleagues.”
And this year, a flood of public approval polling proved that Hawley is the most unpopular U.S. Senator up for re-election in 2024 — with ratings _even worse_ than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida!
So here’s Hawley’s greatest achievement: **Solely based on his own actions and record, he’s made himself the most vulnerable GOP Senator up for re-election.**
**We have a real chance to defeat Hawley and elect a real warrior for working people to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat next year.[So if you’re ready to help us get it done, will you please rush a donation of any amount toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39305?refcode=em20231118-4209&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4209%2E614464%2EjyCz5c)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39306?refcode=em20231118-4209&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=4209%2E614464%2EjyCz5c) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39306?refcode=em20231118-4209&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=4209%2E614464%2EjyCz5c) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39305?refcode=em20231118-4209&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=4209%2E614464%2EjyCz5c)
---
Hawley knows he’s vulnerable. So he’s spent the majority of this year desperately trying to convince voters that he’s different now by creating confusion about his positions on abortion, workers’ rights, Citizens United, and so much more.
But Missourians know the truth. Hawley is just a fraud and a coward who will do and say whatever it takes to get more power for himself.
**That’s why polls are already showing Hawley in a neck-and-neck race with Lucas Kunce.** Missourians are ready to take back their power from corrupt politicians like Hawley and put everyday people in charge of our country.
**[So Peter, will you rush a donation of any amount to help us replace Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat? Our campaign isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs or shady mega-donors, so anything you can afford to give really does make a big impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39305?refcode=em20231118-4209&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=4209%2E614464%2EjyCz5c)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39306?refcode=em20231118-4209&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=8&akid=4209%2E614464%2EjyCz5c) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39306?refcode=em20231118-4209&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=9&akid=4209%2E614464%2EjyCz5c) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39306?refcode=em20231118-4209&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=10&akid=4209%2E614464%2EjyCz5c) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39306?refcode=em20231118-4209&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=11&akid=4209%2E614464%2EjyCz5c) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39306?refcode=em20231118-4209&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=12&akid=4209%2E614464%2EjyCz5c) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39306?refcode=em20231118-4209&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=13&akid=4209%2E614464%2EjyCz5c) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39305?refcode=em20231118-4209&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=14&akid=4209%2E614464%2EjyCz5c)

Thank you,
Team Lucas Kunce

clean_body: including this news! | | Hi team, We’re so excited to announce that the Fairness Project is headed to Texas in March for SXSW! Our team is hosting a panel on ballot measures and what they mean for progress nationwide. This panel is filled with heavy hitters including Kelly Hall , our Executive Director, Prentiss Haney of Ohio Organizing Collaborative, Luz Maria Henriquez of the ACLU of Missouri and Chris Love of Planned Parenthood Advocates of Arizona. = = We’re looking forward to educating folks about how ballot measures can fire up voters, break through the partisan gridlock, and create much-needed change. Because that's what we do. Most recently, we saw our work pay off in Ohio, and we’re excited to continue to empower people nationwide to help build democracy-powered movements. And it’s how since our founding we’ve won over 30 ballot measures across the country to pass paid sick leave, fair wages, and protect voters’ power at the ballot box. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks y'all! — Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won over 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. | | | | I've been so impressed |

Fellow Patriot,
As a former journalist, I’ve heard every story imaginable, and I’ve talked to every type of person imaginable – so it can be pretty tough to impress me.
But Rep. Kat Cammack is as impressive as it gets.
She grew up homeless – yet in 2020, **she was the youngest conservative woman elected to Congress****.**
In her first two years, the Democrats held the majority in the House, so needless to say she was at battle every day for the American people.
But she’s been so effective as a conservative, that now she has a target on her back.
I’m going to do everything in my power to help her, and I’m writing to you today to ask you to do the same.
Kat Cammack’s reelection campaign depends on the support of patriots like you, Fellow Patriot. Can she count on you to step up?

Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: | | | | I've been so impressed | Fellow Patriot, As a former journalist, I’ve heard every story imaginable, and I’ve talked to every type of person imaginable – so it can be pretty tough to impress me. But Rep. Kat Cammack is as impressive as it gets. She grew up homeless – yet in 2020, she was the youngest conservative woman elected to Congress. In her first two years, the Democrats held the majority in the House, so needless to say she was at battle every day for the American people. But she’s been so effective as a conservative, that now she has a target on her back. I’m going to do everything in my power to help her, and I’m writing to you today to ask you to do the same. Kat Cammack’s reelection campaign depends on the support of patriots like you, Fellow Patriot. Can she count on you to step up? | | | | | | So many politicians in Washington are only looking out for themselves – so Kat’s relentless selflessness is both refreshing and much-needed. And trust me – it isn’t just her constituents that benefit from her presence in Washington... It’s any American who values life, liberty, and freedom. 2024 is going to be an uphill battle – Kat is going to need every penny she can get. That’s why it’s so important that you give your absolute best contribution TODAY – so that she’s prepared for what comes next. Thank you, | | Rep. Maria Salazar Congresswoman FL-27 | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Maria Salazar 5200 NW 43rd St., suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL \- =

Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73584229/439001062/1946303967?refcode=ddp_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTFiZjI4Ni0yYjg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MSsSKiNW5NhqE9vReNdu6cnwT6XlOjuB4x6pcWCIsPc=)

| | Today, I proudly endorsed my friend Abigail Spanberger to serve as the next Governor of Virginia. Since we first campaigned together during the 2018 cycle, I’ve had the privilege of seeing Abigail’s energy, determination, and unwavering commitment to public service up close. In Congress, she passionately defended our democracy when it was threatened, and fought to protect the rights and freedoms of all Americans. Virginia is facing complex challenges, but Abigail is no stranger to a tough fight. As Governor, she’ll be the steadfast leader Virginia needs — and ultimately, build a stronger, freer, and more prosperous Commonwealth. Team, your support helped us elect Democrats across Virginia this year. Now, Defend Democracy PAC is gearing up for the next fight – **and I sincerely hope you’ll join us.** [**If you can, will you chip in $25 to Defend Democracy PAC today? clean_body: | = | | Today, I proudly endorsed my friend Abigail Spanberger to serve as the next Governor of Virginia. Since we first campaigned together during the 2018 cycle, I’ve had the privilege of seeing Abigail’s energy, determination, and unwavering commitment to public service up close. In Congress, she passionately defended our democracy when it was threatened, and fought to protect the rights and freedoms of all Americans. Virginia is facing complex challenges, but Abigail is no stranger to a tough fight. As Governor, she’ll be the steadfast leader Virginia needs — and ultimately, build a stronger, freer, and more prosperous Commonwealth. Team, your support helped us elect Democrats across Virginia this year. Now, Defend Democracy PAC is gearing up for the next fight – and I sincerely hope you’ll join us. = | | | = Thank you all so much, Elaine Luria | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Letitia James
subject: Can you fill this out by 11:59 p.m. tonight?

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73584937/439003181/-1997846888?code=jtk1261-su-nd&refcode=jtk1261-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2IwMWEzNS0yYzg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OtoOU9STwVZiKlnZI7JhNP9mjJrMnl_3lMgPSBttePo=)
---
Peter, this Election Day, people from all around the nation came together to declare that our rights are _not_ up for negotiation.
In Virginia, Democrats swept the state legislature – proving to far-right lawmakers who were campaigning on anti-abortion promises that our reproductive freedoms are something we will _fight_ for. The same resounding message was heard in Ohio – where voters enshrined reproductive rights into their state constitution.
Peter, I'm incredibly encouraged by this year's election results – but the truth of the matter is that our fight for progress is _never_ over, especially with the 2024 election right around the corner.

Peter, highlighting and uplifting the voices of everyday, working Americans is a _key_ part of my work – and I wanted to share more about why your response is so important to me.

I didn’t grow up with power or privilege.
I was born and raised in a working-class family in one of Brooklyn’s many diverse neighborhoods. Throughout my entire childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were _directly_ affecting me and my family.
So when I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed that – _no matter what_ – I would be a voice for the voiceless and speak for those who had been silenced for so long.

Good morning, Team, Last Year, the Supreme Court’s right-wing majority overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , threatening the fundamental freedoms of tens of millions of Americans. Since then, the fight to protect access to abortion has played out in statehouses, governors’ mansions, courts, and voting booths all across the country. As we head into campaign season, we want to give you an update on where things stand on abortion access — **and what we need to do to protect it.** Let’s get to it >> **ABORTION RIGHTS IN MICHIGAN** >From Governor Gretchen Whitmer down to the grassroots, we’ve fought like hell to protect and expand access to abortion. **We’re very proud of the fact that not a day has gone by this last year where Michiganders could not access abortion care** — and truthfully, this is all thanks to supporters like you. When abortion access was on the ballot in Michigan in 2022, millions of Michiganders went to the polls to make their voices heard and sent a resounding message to MAGA extremists that we will _not_ allow them to touch our fundamental freedoms. You also worked extremely hard to re-elect Governor Whitmer and give Democrats full control of the state legislature so that they could take the fight even further. Thanks to your efforts, Governor Whitmer was able to sign legislation that repealed an extreme 1931 law that banned abortion without exceptions for rape or incest and criminalized nurses and doctors for doing their jobs. And in just a few days, she will be signing the _Reproductive Health Act_ , doing even more to protect access to abortion and our fundamental freedoms. **Michigan has served as a model for the rest of the country on how to protect our fundamental freedoms** — and thanks to the hard work of Governor Whitmer and people like you, millions of Michiganders across the state can make their own decisions about their bodies. **ABORTION RIGHTS AROUND THE COUNTRY** After the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , many state legislatures passed some of the most restrictive and draconian abortion bans imaginable. But tens of millions of people came together, in red and blue states alike, and stood up to fight like hell against the extreme MAGA Republicans who want to rip away our fundamental freedoms. In blue states like California and Vermont, voters overwhelmingly **approved** ballot measures that would enshrine abortion rights into their state’s constitutions. In red states like Kentucky, Ohio, and Montana, voters **rejected** ballot measures written by MAGA extremists that would have ripped away their fundamental freedoms. And it’s not just limited to ballot measures. We’ve seen a surge of grassroots enthusiasm around electing Democrats who fearlessly campaigned on defending abortion access for all. In Virginia, voters turned out to give Democrats full control of the state legislature to safeguard abortion from MAGA extremists like Glenn Youngkin and Virginia Republicans who campaigned on severely restricting abortion access. And in Kentucky, voters re-elected Governor Andy Beshear in his race against a candidate who supported banning abortion **with zero exceptions.** The fight to protect abortion access will continue into 2024, but based on the results thus far it’s clear that **momentum is on our side.** It’s not rocket science: abortion rights is a salient issue that will motivate voters to turn out in every election. **ABORTION RIGHTS IN 2024** Team, our fight for abortion rights is not over. President Biden and Vice President Harris will — almost certainly — be running against MAGA extremist Donald Trump. This is the guy who has repeatedly said that there’s no person in the country more responsible for the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ than he is. We don’t disagree. But it’s not just the presidency we need to win. **Democrats are currently facing one of the most challenging Senate maps we’ve faced in years,** threatening our ability to sign pro-choice legislation _and_ appoint federal judges who will defend our fundamental rights. In the House, new Speaker of the House Mike Johnson has long supported banning and criminalizing abortion with **zero exceptions for rape, incest, or the life of the woman.** This is who House Republicans elected to lead their conference, and we’re going to fight like hell to flip it back to a Democratic majority. **GRASSROOTS SUPPORT IS THE KEY TO WINNING IN 2024** It’s going to take us knocking on doors. It’s going to take us making small-dollar donations. And it’s going to take us talking to our friends and family about what’s at stake. The rights we once thought were guaranteed will be taken away if we don’t step off the sidelines and get back into the fight to win next year. Your support today is key to building the campaign infrastructure we need to win across the country in the future. We can’t do any of this without you. **[If you support Governor Gretchen Whitmer and Team Fight Like Hell PAC’s work to bring abortion rights to the forefront of our turnout efforts, can you rush a $10 donation today? Your support directly impacts our ability to speak with and organize as many voters as possible ahead of Election Day 2024 to elect Democrats up and down the ballot>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73585199/439004036/432809736?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231118_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTNlMWZiYjctMmM4Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WkUUUxA-egvpGb15YD4dZVW-07CUSUZhUKp17j7rJCY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73585200/439004037/432809736?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231118_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTNlMWZiYjctMmM4Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WkUUUxA-egvpGb15YD4dZVW-07CUSUZhUKp17j7rJCY=)

name: Sam Brown
subject: My soul was saved that day
body:
It started in 2008, while serving in Afghanistan, when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle. | |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=3a2640badce1456f8a6117c935696efc&_t=ZqbR6TtKPVjWtMNoqRmC99A62jakeSh8qpvW3YfB5WS1HhfWEyezRRqetbk7rg4I2-zR5usBtDWuPD9Ux9mm_2z0rZi2UfHdntC422ne0Uc%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=3a2640badce1456f8a6117c935696efc&_t=ZqbR6TtKPVjWtMNoqRmC99A62jakeSh8qpvW3YfB5WS1HhfWEyezRRqetbk7rg4I2-zR5usBtDWuPD9Ux9mm_2z0rZi2UfHdntC422ne0Uc%3D)

|
Friend,

It started in 2008, while serving in Afghanistan, when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle.

I was certain my time on this earth was over.

Until I faintly heard the words "I've got you" from my fellow soldier as the flames on my body were extinguished.

That experience taught me this: Service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable.

But it didn't take a near-death experience for me to know with every fiber of my being that serving this country was all in accordance with God's plan for me.

**[That's why I'm counting on your help in my campaign for U.S. Senate.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3a2640badce1456f8a6117c935696efc&_e=B7Fa4iaOXxj89l3CenNSnQfJ8IegUDixh2EXcnn7oSSLXhwgGntjnriz8yKe9CwYTa3nC1DBgiddviPeXwrwhdlNxHKAkAQZ2rIZEssCLavEJDSH-VHFy0BieV2_BitIeErRLqaVuZUhzROe9S3dc8erhh57__a1rDRW2Fu7mgRc1erCAMnT_1JcqNb50dVKVftpkOXUc0Dl1itzu--YMepm29jozJD4Nj2XHBArbhjxPhyTdr0_2i6Afk0-NOW4AS4MBoDS-8HNFjnnzS5UJtJWE3fvBxs3LoZNcOsykV10gtXlErK-TmU5BCbaQSGoAJF2X8SSh8WazLaE4ibKcA%3D%3D "That’s why I’m counting on your help in my campaign for U.S. Senate. ")**

I don't have decades of political experience under my belt.

I don't have wealthy coastal elites bankrolling my campaign.

But what I do have is a love for this country that is unmatched and the understanding that we can't afford to let our nation slip away any further than it already has.

**[Today, my heart is filled with a passion to save this country before we lose it forever. And I know yours is too, Friend!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3a2640badce1456f8a6117c935696efc&_e=B7Fa4iaOXxj89l3CenNSnQfJ8IegUDixh2EXcnn7oSSLXhwgGntjnriz8yKe9CwYTa3nC1DBgiddviPeXwrwhdlNxHKAkAQZ2rIZEssCLavEJDSH-VHFy0BieV2_BitIeErRLqaVuZUhzROe9S3dc8erhh57__a1rDRW2Fu7mgRc1erCAMnT_1JcqNb50dVK-n64gGGA5NDOU4bXq8XeAZauo_nL1JkVm741lDwuxMOzhPXdnshD1AllsSHWw5nSRqdsRyfXJ9Mjv1B8FtDWPP4C2eKuClYr3ypcdiiIMvXSrkcn5sTmtzqvZ-gy71s4MlUuv2_z0yar1R5z_q-_Gw%3D%3D "Today, my heart is filled with a passion to save this country before we lose it forever. And I know yours is too, Friend!")**

I always knew it wouldn't be easy.

The radical left is targeting my race because they know I won't play their games. They've already raised $30+ MILLION to try to end my campaign..

Since that day in 2008, I've met the woman of my dreams. I've had 3 beautiful children. I started a business working to get veterans the critical medications they need every day. And my dedication to making this country better for my family and every American has never been stronger.

That's why when everything is on the line, I'll never stop fighting for you.

**[It's truly up to us to ensure our children and grandchildren inherit a patriotic, safe and sane country.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3a2640badce1456f8a6117c935696efc&_e=B7Fa4iaOXxj89l3CenNSnQfJ8IegUDixh2EXcnn7oSSLXhwgGntjnriz8yKe9CwYTa3nC1DBgiddviPeXwrwhdlNxHKAkAQZ2rIZEssCLavEJDSH-VHFy0BieV2_BitIeErRLqaVuZUhzROe9S3dc8erhh57__a1rDRW2Fu7mgRc1erCAMnT_1JcqNb50dVK4hmPgNKJP4BYSSaXtthP24fA1cn14kafUrMVAqUySWmcldQh9gm4YmVbyu73xxp1yVqcCHDys1r6qu8WZJFyTIQxt1eD6h9B52f0uv0AHV2DNIqc-NayqlIJD2Wliupg-cFIFa5CmCwRkhRn_h2OgA%3D%3D "It’s truly up to us to ensure our children and grandchildren inherit a patriotic, safe and sane country. ")**

So from one fighter to another, would you take 2 minutes to support a conservative combat veteran get to Washington?

---
| | [SUPPORT SAM](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3a2640badce1456f8a6117c935696efc&_e=B7Fa4iaOXxj89l3CenNSnQfJ8IegUDixh2EXcnn7oSSLXhwgGntjnriz8yKe9CwYTa3nC1DBgiddviPeXwrwhdlNxHKAkAQZ2rIZEssCLavEJDSH-VHFy0BieV2_BitIeErRLqaVuZUhzROe9S3dc8erhh57__a1rDRW2Fu7mgRc1erCAMnT_1JcqNb50dVKDocyg5srlAGhjpOSA4Yeq4PXb4MvyoRP9YVvkDDDeDCFDpEbcMI60hJwRDUjVOrxonOA62Y6EH82FFo63fNnnEaVjZKYVJr-7IuH6JgBDt3HVEpp79KFZOhqNcGUGLaAOD1gfgysr-4eymJdXhMRbg%3D%3D)
---

Duty First,

CPT Sam Brown, USA, Ret.

subject: What Jamie Raskin just said >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Only a few signature spots left!
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57247?t=6&akid=11807%2E878179%2EV1iNRP) From standing up to Donald Trump to averting the disastrous GOP shutdown to demanding Republicans get back to work for the American people, **Rep. Jamie Raskin is a HERO!**

[**As one of our top supporters, we’re giving you an exclusive chance to sign our letter thanking Rep. Jamie Raskin for his amazing work! SPOTS DWINDLING QUICKLY: Add your name before midnight! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57247?t=7&akid=11807%2E878179%2EV1iNRP) | [88 SIGNATURE SPOTS REMAINING: Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57247?t=8&akid=11807%2E878179%2EV1iNRP)
---
TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: You’re a hero! **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for being one of the top defenders of our democracy!_**

First, your heroic work on the January 6th Committee EXPOSED Donald Trump and the MAGA mob’s deadly insurrection!

Then, you stood up to the GOP’s selfish government shutdown plot, averting a TOTAL disaster for the American people!

**And now, you’re REFUSING to put up with MAGA Speaker Mike Johnson and his chaotic caucus, demanding they get back to work!**

[**I know Republicans are plotting their revenge by placing a HUGE target on your seat. So today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to put the MAGA mob in their place and keep electing amazing Democrats like you! » **](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57247?t=9&akid=11807%2E878179%2EV1iNRP) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57247?t=10&akid=11807%2E878179%2EV1iNRP)

| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11807%2E878179%2EV1iNRP). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11807%2E878179%2EV1iNRP).**

name: Dr. Cornel West
subject: Our first in-person campaign rally is happening
body:
Join Dr. Cornel West's first official rally in Utah this Monday.

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=psQUkJGc26u6Wi0imicX-00jZnUVaZYVu06OFU-xtOc&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=utah_rally&n=1)
---
Peter -
---
Join me for a monumental appearance as we launch the first official in-person rally of the Cornel West 2024 presidential campaign. This historic event will unfold at the University of Utah, this Monday, November 20th. **RSVP[here](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/utahrally?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=utah_rally&n=2)**.
---
[ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/utahrally?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=utah_rally&n=3)
---
We are building a movement of ordinary people, a symphony of voices united in the working class struggle. In this moment, we stand together, arm in arm, to envision and fight for a world where truth, justice and love reign supreme. Our campaign is pleased to announce that joining us in this grand endeavor is Michael Valentine, an independent mayoral candidate whose heart beats in rhythm with the needs of the people and aligns with our collective vision to abolish poverty and homelessness. We shall speak, we shall sing, we shall celebrate the power of our united purpose with local leaders and organizations in Salt Lake City, Utah. Let us come together to be the change, to be the light in these trying times. Bring your energy, your passion, your unyielding hope. Let us fill the air with our dreams for a future where every person is valued, every voice is heard, and every community thrives. The time is now, my beloved brothers and sisters, to rise up, to speak up, to show up! In the spirit of love and justice, Dr. Cornel West
---
| [](http://www.cornelwest2024.com/volunteer?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=utah_rally&n=4 "VOLUNTEER") [VOLUNTEER](http://www.cornelwest2024.com/volunteer?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=utah_rally&n=4)
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=utah_rally&n=5 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=utah_rally&n=5)
---
Cornel West for President · 420 N McKinley St, Ste 111-512, Corona, CA 92879, United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · [Unsubscribe](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/unsubscribe?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=utah_rally&n=6)

body:
| Hovde is gearing up to jump into the race against Tammy any day now.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1548%2E35263%2EAARXcD)
Peter — Here’s what we already knew about Eric Hovde, the California megamillionaire who’s expected to enter Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate race:
1. Anti-abortion extremist
2. Mitch McConnell and the national GOP’s #1 pick to run against Tammy
3. Totally out of touch with working Wisconsin families

**But earlier this month, Hovde showed his true colors even further by sponsoring a Tucker Carlson event in Wisconsin and propping up his dangerous conspiracies — ranging from Carlson’s election denial to horrific antisemitism.** It’s clear that the far-right wing of the GOP has embraced Hovde with open arms, and this could _just be a preview_ of what's to come as he prepares to jump into our race. With Hovde’s massive personal fortune, he would have enough resources on Day One to take on Tammy — and we expect that day to come at any moment. Make no mistake, Peter: it won’t be easy facing off against a candidate with a virtually unlimited warchest and the full support of the far-right GOP behind him. But we’ll never stop fighting to keep Wisconsin blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority from right-wing extremists like Hovde. **[Will you make a contribution to help us reelect Tammy and protect the Senate? name: Team Jayapal
subject: Investing in climate action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila knows that the time to take action is right now and not after the next climate disaster.
#
Peter, we need to invest in our climate resilience efforts _now_.
That's why, last month, Pramila introduced the Climate Resilience Workforce Act to make bold investments that would prepare our workforce to take on the climate crisis.
From creating millions of green jobs to investing in workforce development programs and climate resilience action plans — Pramila knows that the time to take action is right now. We can't sit and wait until after the next climate disaster.
While the chaotic GOP continues to waste our time with their questionable ethics and people-over-politics "leadership," **Pramila is in Congress fighting for the issues that truly impact us all.**
[**If you stand with Pramila and her efforts to fight for working families and communities most affected by the climate crisis, please contribute $3 to our movement today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47529?refcode=em20231118-3178&t=1&akid=3178%2E420207%2E9-h6Yn)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47529?refcode=em20231118-3178&t=20&akid=3178%2E420207%2E9-h6Yn)**
Together,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231118-3178-footer&t=21&refcode2=3178_420207_9-h6Yn&akid=3178%2E420207%2E9-h6Yn)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Friend, I have incredible news in my race to defeat Sen. Rick Scott here in Florida — and I wanted you to hear it from me:
A new poll already shows this race in a statistical tie!
I’ve always believed that we can reach our dreams if we work for them. That’s what’s so great about this country. I came to this country at 14 and worked for minimum wage at a doughnut shop, so I know the value of hard work. I know that with hard work, determination, and the grassroots support of people like you — we’ll elect someone who’s proof of the American dream as Florida’s next U.S. senator.
But I need to be frank about what’s ahead of us: Rick Scott has already sunk millions of dollars of his own money into his campaign. I simply will not be able to compete without grassroots resources. That's why my team and I have set a weekly $50,000 goal to ensure we can fight Scott’s wealth, build our campaign, and win.
With grassroots support of the utmost importance, I checked your donation record to see where things stand. Could you please chip in?
Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Progress to Goal: 74%
Suggested Gift: $25 to flip FL blue
The harsh reality is that my opponent is one of the richest senators in Washington — he spent $64 million of his own fortune to buy this seat last time. If we don’t keep up with key goals this early in the election cycle, we'll never be able to make up the gap and stay competitive.
This is our best chance to flip Florida blue. And with control of the Senate at stake, we cannot let ourselves be outspent. That's why I am personally asking: Please, will you split $25 or more between my campaign and Serve America to help us hit our weekly goal and stop Rick Scott from buying this seat? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]

A new poll from Reuters shows that nearly 70% of Americans and 80% of Democrats want an immediate ceasefire to protect civilian lives in Israel and occupied Palestine. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvbgo_Ye6S2soB9ehTQ3d38qoQwGYgbQqZXKPLP-f3nK9A-aOxkOmKA8P9LZCqRHTM_giWMPjCuy6_JeGymD1187ylBW2s19M1sdUfRus-s0ATl_7UMuGA9GcFs3f1ubqKz5ADoZvVddiz87oM2GK2raVd4LEgJEUUXgynJ7snGYDCvPkEZIf6s3Wqh7gblinHJqSuAnehRWG7OCWt40AgKQ/41e/vN0-GwL9Q5uHCOD86L9PPg/h0/1XZ2CEWBHHEWr7PfFV4MhZluOG8JY4aQxMWENMHwgb4)

This incendiary weapon is literally melting children’s faces in Gaza. In recent weeks, Israel’s government has also illegally dropped white phosphorus bombs on civilians in Lebanon. [**Join me and our allies in calling on President Biden to demand Israel ban the use of white phosphorus in military operations, and push for an immediate ceasefire.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk4wHTn5vb2ybkfx5v80X3YOSkHsPNdOx5bm5FkJ67chYm9wwx0xDfJBuU_2i5I1CHWUpoZq-sXMrwPVgBH2dQ8g-2a6s7yYe6hGXHC1e-5NGDOrMzvW8mk_DDxm8qrfYTvUyQ0nQwx06tKHTlV3BlMzTJ-1xOmSAk5Tzo6Qv-JNMF1pHbfp9E7dV3Ko90KFL9E6sgky6c5sa8fcEXOlYEMfGY2scSyIgdvnfv9VZevEqwBnpNdcVrP4b-_iROcZCTtKUZf1-j_7IYrB8xaJDWmqn_jkuSmJpMnFcqferhPya-cBmnXk9lBfoEszJ-Wkg5g_AHqi27dG1jwTcE0qgSVhpo74xgNUSrU0k01zO47IRCoor-GqvcHQ3LuRHjkMlzLOInCoPfpvQnNp_OAis2kkh6UsUPwzJoxCaVbVo3hCNae6IIzI96mCi48fendzp90elwEYh6uK6n-vY_7vdHL/41e/vN0-GwL9Q5uHCOD86L9PPg/h2/rbvy_cLM1Gf1QeMfFPSdtHYcKN9XMb3-n7Vs2lEcJiY) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk4wHTn5vb2ybkfx5v80X3YOSkHsPNdOx5bm5FkJ67chYm9wwx0xDfJBuU_2i5I1CHWUpoZq-sXMrwPVgBH2dQ8g-2a6s7yYe6hGXHC1e-5NGDOrMzvW8mk_DDxm8qrfYTvUyQ0nQwx06tKHTlV3BlMzTJ-1xOmSAk5Tzo6Qv-JNMF1pHbfp9E7dV3Ko90KFL9E6sgky6c5sa8fcEXOlYEMfGY2scSyIgdvnfv9VZevEjEQcZytXPWppdONxwpyCJNVuKjBs2gxk5h90tE4cXSq1IQ4_gzSKIoTc9PwLa9tAdJmtTYGceeh6jTEqNkf46FL5-zKS8BZFvdUDWqD7f8EONXpPi5Y1Uh12iJ2oJsOS4PDWrM3vbfsg23rjfgceSLyjjBAm6rxX1b9v_aLwggs92HVRkN2mt6nAFMB17dA3X9BdiceVzcweWtcR-YNd-0Oy_oygkMQekuoPPkffowV/41e/vN0-GwL9Q5uHCOD86L9PPg/h3/wnp4UzzytLoYKePVLSQHwEah65k6SFTxLEQIYDcDS90)
---
Each year, the United States provides billions of dollars of aid to the Israeli military, without any restrictions on how the money is used.
On top of this, the U.S. House recently authorized an additional $14 billion U.S. taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military without conditions. **We cannot let our tax dollars fund this horrific genocide of Palestinians, which has already killed more than 11,000 people―the majority of whom are children.**
A new poll from Reuters shows that nearly 70% of Americans across the political spectrum want an immediate ceasefire.3 Only a handful of members of Congress are listening to their constituents and demanding a ceasefire, **but pressure is building to end the violence.**
This past week alone:
* Dozens of rabbis joined me in DC to support our Ceasefire Now Resolution.
* Thousands of Jewish peace advocates risked arrest in civil disobedience actions for a ceasefire in Chicago, Oakland, Boston, LA, and DC.
* More than 500 officials in Biden’s administration sent the President a letter demanding a ceasefire.
* Palestinians and human rights organizations sued President Biden for unconditionally supporting the Israeli government’s genocidal actions.
* And, just yesterday, Americans across the country rallied, marched, and held sit-ins in a National Day of Action for Palestine.

We see the human rights violations the U.S. government is enabling, and we are saying: No more!
[**Join me and allies in calling on President Biden to immediately demand Israel ban white phosphorus and push for a ceasefire now!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk4wHTn5vb2ybkfx5v80X3YOSkHsPNdOx5bm5FkJ67chYm9wwx0xDfJBuU_2i5I1CHWUpoZq-sXMrwPVgBH2dQ8g-2a6s7yYe6hGXHC1e-5NGDOrMzvW8mk_DDxm8qrfYTvUyQ0nQwx06tKHTlV3BlMzTJ-1xOmSAk5Tzo6Qv-JNMF1pHbfp9E7dV3Ko90KFL9E6sgky6c5sa8fcEXOlYEMfGY2scSyIgdvnfv9VZevEq78esRWdsjpDNhc9OANUJatdY4UHpOHsYpI89905MBjItgR7VYGBy8Cb-LHQk9UTEOOyUy-H4kX8365rryC2RVo2apZ63GyZH_XRSyGrB-w6v9lNqev8lghyhwy1cXL9NYEtTKv2fCLvyUqR5Dkvi7aPliWu1nRvQVefFCw19QIN-8S-5P953bK9z5CoruTkveqaTbQeBxSSGniZxa5ZtkxPchOWESgYpDEwXfdIiEI/41e/vN0-GwL9Q5uHCOD86L9PPg/h4/i7cKiQfvnbU8btqGYVoEnrwGOwhhRc8l94PsOcWmFSg)
Together, we will keep building a world with freedom, safety, dignity, and equality for everyone.

clean_body: A new poll from Reuters shows that nearly 70% of Americans and 80% of Democrats want an immediate ceasefire to protect civilian lives in Israel and occupied Palestine. | | | Friend, Numerous media outlets including the Washington Post , and humanitarian groups such as Amnesty International, are reporting on the Israeli military’s illegal use of white phosphorus on civilian populations.1,2 This is a war crime and President Biden must condemn these actions immediately. White phosphorus, when used against people, burns skin down to the bone and reignites internally, destroying organs. This incendiary weapon is literally melting children’s faces in Gaza. In recent weeks, Israel’s government has also illegally dropped white phosphorus bombs on civilians in Lebanon. | Each year, the United States provides billions of dollars of aid to the Israeli military, without any restrictions on how the money is used. On top of this, the U.S. House recently authorized an additional $14 billion U.S. taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military without conditions. We cannot let our tax dollars fund this horrific genocide of Palestinians, which has already killed more than 11,000 people―the majority of whom are children. A new poll from Reuters shows that nearly 70% of Americans across the political spectrum want an immediate ceasefire.3 Only a handful of members of Congress are listening to their constituents and demanding a ceasefire, but pressure is building to end the violence. This past week alone: Dozens of rabbis joined me in DC to support our Ceasefire Now Resolution. Thousands of Jewish peace advocates risked arrest in civil disobedience actions for a ceasefire in Chicago, Oakland, Boston, LA, and DC. More than 500 officials in Biden’s administration sent the President a letter demanding a ceasefire. Palestinians and human rights organizations sued President Biden for unconditionally supporting the Israeli government’s genocidal actions. And, just yesterday, Americans across the country rallied, marched, and held sit-ins in a National Day of Action for Palestine. We see the human rights violations the U.S. government is enabling, and we are saying: No more! Together, we will keep building a world with freedom, safety, dignity, and equality for everyone. In solidarity, Rashida 1 2 3 * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Here’s the situation: The Pennsylvania Senate passed a bill last month that would censor books and make it harder for students to exercise their freedom to read.
This bill is nothing short of a book ban, and it’s a clear attack on freedom of speech. Worse, this bill is just another assault by the national right-wing book-banning movement that even wants to designate classic works of literature as “explicit” material!
I’ve joined folks across PA to protest local book bans before. And as your Attorney General, I’ll fight to stop book bans so our students have the freedom to read and equal opportunities to learn and achieve.

subject: Tell Mike Johnson: Hands OFF Social Security and Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cartwright for Congress
body:
Speaker Mike Johnson and House Republicans are actively pushing to gut Social Security and Medicare.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73596001/439016763/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTUyNzFlNC0zMzg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sP_-5aBu7CPw3fs1IpJvemNMv0wSKE5PSZLJI-7F_RQ=&emci=a3c7bce2-8485-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=f95271e4-3386-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=23311593) | Peter,

We’re facing a significant threat to the lifeline that MILLIONS of Americans rely on: Speaker Mike Johnson and House Republicans are actively pushing to gut Social Security and Medicare.

For years, Mike Johnson has made cutting Social Security and Medicare his “number one priority.” One of his _very first_ moves as speaker was to promise to create a so-called “Debt Commission” to solve what he claims is the “greatest threat to our national security.” **Our seniors’ social safety net is NOT our greatest national security threat.**

We can’t stand idly by and watch Johnson threaten to dismantle the safety nets that countless families depend on for their livelihood. [**Join us in DEMANDING that Speaker Mike Johnson and House Republicans STOP their assault on Social Security and Medicare by signing our petition today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73596004/439016764/1685360359?ms=em23_231117_ssmed_esrv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&refcode=em23_231117_ssmed_esrv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&source=em23_231117_ssmed_esrv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231117_ssmed_esrv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=wBsAr7UEy6U+PvgyrIzdD0L4lITUubxnoFOopnEqiWtSYX9+namnuAbEfxo1XrmvZG3rmD/EVje/sMU2qcgXQgiOFqZlqljV4htsgLYEuSn4FkidzrbSkibgnkzzXVtZysHdMN/6aFilEpiRgU00TNUxVobxt7zPJ0X7GP7TktE=&refcode2=f95271e4-3386-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTUyNzFlNC0zMzg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sP_-5aBu7CPw3fs1IpJvemNMv0wSKE5PSZLJI-7F_RQ=&emci=a3c7bce2-8485-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=f95271e4-3386-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=23311593) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73596007/439016765/1685360359?ms=em23_231117_ssmed_esrv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&refcode=em23_231117_ssmed_esrv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&source=em23_231117_ssmed_esrv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231117_ssmed_esrv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=wBsAr7UEy6U+PvgyrIzdD0L4lITUubxnoFOopnEqiWtSYX9+namnuAbEfxo1XrmvZG3rmD/EVje/sMU2qcgXQgiOFqZlqljV4htsgLYEuSn4FkidzrbSkibgnkzzXVtZysHdMN/6aFilEpiRgU00TNUxVobxt7zPJ0X7GP7TktE=&refcode2=f95271e4-3386-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTUyNzFlNC0zMzg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sP_-5aBu7CPw3fs1IpJvemNMv0wSKE5PSZLJI-7F_RQ=&emci=a3c7bce2-8485-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=f95271e4-3386-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=23311593)

Mike Johnson and his extremist allies have even called Medicare and Social Security an “existential threat” to our way of life. The leader of the House GOP wants to cut over **$750 BILLION** from Social Security and over **$1.9 TRILLION** from Medicare over the next decade. **If Mike Johnson is successful, our seniors could lose vital benefits and financial security for good.**

Social Security and Medicare aren’t just numbers on a balance sheet – they represent the promise of security and dignity that we made to our seniors. **We can’t let the House GOP end these programs as we know them. Our seniors deserve better, and we won’t let them be left behind.**

[**Peter, will you join us in calling for Mike Johnson and House Republicans to STOP their assault on Social Security and Medicare today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73596009/439016766/1685360359?ms=em23_231117_ssmed_esrv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&refcode=em23_231117_ssmed_esrv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&source=em23_231117_ssmed_esrv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231117_ssmed_esrv_gq_act_pet_tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=wBsAr7UEy6U+PvgyrIzdD0L4lITUubxnoFOopnEqiWtSYX9+namnuAbEfxo1XrmvZG3rmD/EVje/sMU2qcgXQgiOFqZlqljV4htsgLYEuSn4FkidzrbSkibgnkzzXVtZysHdMN/6aFilEpiRgU00TNUxVobxt7zPJ0X7GP7TktE=&refcode2=f95271e4-3386-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTUyNzFlNC0zMzg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sP_-5aBu7CPw3fs1IpJvemNMv0wSKE5PSZLJI-7F_RQ=&emci=a3c7bce2-8485-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=f95271e4-3386-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=23311593)

clean_body: Speaker Mike Johnson and House Republicans are actively pushing to gut Social Security and Medicare. | Peter, We’re facing a significant threat to the lifeline that MILLIONS of Americans rely on: Speaker Mike Johnson and House Republicans are actively pushing to gut Social Security and Medicare. For years, Mike Johnson has made cutting Social Security and Medicare his “number one priority.” One of his very first moves as speaker was to promise to create a so-called “Debt Commission” to solve what he claims is the “greatest threat to our national security.” Our seniors’ social safety net is NOT our greatest national security threat. We can’t stand idly by and watch Johnson threaten to dismantle the safety nets that countless families depend on for their livelihood. | Mike Johnson and his extremist allies have even called Medicare and Social Security an “existential threat” to our way of life. The leader of the House GOP wants to cut over $750 BILLION from Social Security and over $1.9 TRILLION from Medicare over the next decade. If Mike Johnson is successful, our seniors could lose vital benefits and financial security for good. Social Security and Medicare aren’t just numbers on a balance sheet – they represent the promise of security and dignity that we made to our seniors. We can’t let the House GOP end these programs as we know them. Our seniors deserve better, and we won’t let them be left behind. Thank you, Team Cartwright Last year, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. He's gearing up for another tough re-election, and he needs your support to keep PA-08 blue. Rush a donation right away to help Matt protect his seat. | = | "Facebook" "Twitter" "Twitter" | Paid for by Cartwright for Congress | Cartwright For Congress PO Box 414 Scranton, PA 18501 United States Click here to from the Cartwright for Congress.

Can we rely on you in the next fifteen minutes? | | Peter - I am all in for President Trump. I endorse him wholeheartedly, and believe to my core that we have to make Biden a one-term president. Under President Trump, we built the greatest economy in U.S. history, took concrete steps to secure our southern border, projected strength abroad, and fought back against the radical Left EVERY DAY – no matter what they threw at us. President Trump made America great again, and I know we can do it once more. It would mean so much to both President Trump and me if we could depend on your support today in our mission to save America. For America, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. Would you take a moment to complete my today? Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input. | SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want you to know the truth
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3f3930b7845f4559b2506cd6024da9c2&_e=NOvrnh3vCuyySr52VjXG6L5QiLk1-mU22LtAziopCqS-8uRhUC4yHoDsNqqR0MZMf7FrwsTcAPtozF_d76YZkZl5pV3F7DHU7-VRPnes_LIQ5AI9XpCGSfFNJwKHQ5zUXsZ8L1MdJtv1hAUEji_3FErGyP-W06tFdgBc-JSaFhkdeMx3hbJXhUGvmGDwLCLQwDqE_GeAaz9n9y4HJE8prZo6rL7UUOCutCk1mvdVMgg5cH6pn-iM3hJuEX79Wl-arAG_O7g-YSix44j4w62DzgzU5vZVqvnMFYZMjBM4r81hW4EhRTcpGZiR6OW4A5KTtEkjQUd3oeZ8iKpW4N9Idk5uJQWBi7z-gDF33qD2Xo6IxzjjIQGyYNP0q7Je4oyyUr9_REQzBXDygyn4KDjV2L9C0iNFL-1jUDp341qzVpIsXDi3sJpCSzdiyAbhA7dL5GMj1nGGYGRXdvEzM7jO4ayJ4G-rRmcbsLr1cHZe8wtGvNPrjm-hU3fwIuHQ4AcHsH0M_Vhh2shjNc6Hsqx11J-cUQzuaa8owSp_t1-cQfLM-B-RrTejySHj-Pf34Y_P)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3f3930b7845f4559b2506cd6024da9c2&_e=NOvrnh3vCuyySr52VjXG6L5QiLk1-mU22LtAziopCqS-8uRhUC4yHoDsNqqR0MZMf7FrwsTcAPtozF_d76YZkZl5pV3F7DHU7-VRPnes_LIQ5AI9XpCGSfFNJwKHQ5zUXsZ8L1MdJtv1hAUEji_3FErGyP-W06tFdgBc-JSaFhkdeMx3hbJXhUGvmGDwLCLQwDqE_GeAaz9n9y4HJE8prZo6rL7UUOCutCk1mvdVMgg5cH6pn-iM3hJuEX79Wl-arAG_O7g-YSix44j4w62DzgzU5vZVqvnMFYZMjBM4r81hW4EhRTcpGZiR6OW4A5KTtEkjQUd3oeZ8iKpW4N9Idk5uJQWBi7z-gDF33qD2Xo6IxzjjIQGyYNP0q7Je4oyyUr9_REQzBXDygyn4KDjV2L9C0iNFL-1jUDp341qzVpKCQxdUMYIDvLu-O39-ADGM9wPruGK336pr8QycLed4VlmI6KFw_7dFStMOhI5QOMNYL7QISGl7DEoFm0WMkLlfGiuxuWrtlaNcYdRhjGXCT_bfUqSIet7lYRv9CQnCwtq1jAa7Y1jCdy42r9_UIXoj "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3f3930b7845f4559b2506cd6024da9c2&_e=NOvrnh3vCuyySr52VjXG6L5QiLk1-mU22LtAziopCqS-8uRhUC4yHoDsNqqR0MZMf7FrwsTcAPtozF_d76YZkZl5pV3F7DHU7-VRPnes_LIQ5AI9XpCGSfFNJwKHQ5zUXsZ8L1MdJtv1hAUEji_3FErGyP-W06tFdgBc-JSaFhkdeMx3hbJXhUGvmGDwLCLQwDqE_GeAaz9n9y4HJE8prZo6rL7UUOCutCk1mvdVMgg5cH6pn-iM3hJuEX79Wl-arAG_O7g-YSix44j4w62DzgzU5vZVqvnMFYZMjBM4r81hW4EhRTcpGZiR6OW4A5KTtEkjQUd3oeZ8iKpW4N9Idk5uJQWBi7z-gDF33qD2Xo6IxzjjIQGyYNP0q7Je4oyyUr9_REQzBXDygyn4KDjV2L9C0iNFL-1jUDp341qzVpJMq_n_brxJlZkm1BPexA0nrZRbMgPNhg2DiE5QpUS2o7GY0NzRY6Zq-gTTb4rZVCjIR-LwheQOpHmrRLxAV2EQFIi539qUNQAF4ideDlaIUQe0NO2xeNLoicVSFxJ49ycSC6McRfCdYF-mntZzW5GP)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3f3930b7845f4559b2506cd6024da9c2&_e=NOvrnh3vCuyySr52VjXG6L5QiLk1-mU22LtAziopCqS-8uRhUC4yHoDsNqqR0MZMf7FrwsTcAPtozF_d76YZkZl5pV3F7DHU7-VRPnes_LIQ5AI9XpCGSfFNJwKHQ5zUXsZ8L1MdJtv1hAUEji_3FErGyP-W06tFdgBc-JSaFhkdeMx3hbJXhUGvmGDwLCLQwDqE_GeAaz9n9y4HJE8prZo6rL7UUOCutCk1mvdVMgg5cH6pn-iM3hJuEX79Wl-arAG_O7g-YSix44j4w62DzgzU5vZVqvnMFYZMjBM4r81hW4EhRTcpGZiR6OW4A5KTtEkjQUd3oeZ8iKpW4N9Idk5uJQWBi7z-gDF33qD2Xo6IxzjjIQGyYNP0q7Je4oyyUr9_REQzBXDygyn4KDjV2L9C0iNFL-1jUDp341qzVpKTcl2gHCzl9VwBoMBXF9Mn9MQXvdDg_wPXHo6GXNuYo1gQH4ZudDIDgBxnTGBdWRt6b2MR6ZU-VbtbFMtC33As6sY_Ohdd2fF9RfBpkicRXuD-mHp30NMrOauKVOZMr8MO9wJ65Y7nj-8FtDaWui7U)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!>>](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3f3930b7845f4559b2506cd6024da9c2&_e=NOvrnh3vCuyySr52VjXG6L5QiLk1-mU22LtAziopCqS-8uRhUC4yHoDsNqqR0MZMf7FrwsTcAPtozF_d76YZkZl5pV3F7DHU7-VRPnes_LIQ5AI9XpCGSfFNJwKHQ5zUXsZ8L1MdJtv1hAUEji_3FErGyP-W06tFdgBc-JSaFhkdeMx3hbJXhUGvmGDwLCLQwDqE_GeAaz9n9y4HJE8prZo6rL7UUOCutCk1mvdVMgg5cH6pn-iM3hJuEX79Wl-arAG_O7g-YSix44j4w62DzgzU5vZVqvnMFYZMjBM4r81hW4EhRTcpGZiR6OW4A5KTtEkjQUd3oeZ8iKpW4N9Idk5uJQWBi7z-gDF33qD2Xo6IxzjjIQGyYNP0q7Je4oyyUr9_REQzBXDygyn4KDjV2L9C0iNFL-1jUDp341qzVpIAcZJpM3S8oUruJ6C3PYodVjhsa6_mgxe-SETnET7bADCRILn9uEvSG8oMkHstk34BNtEkXn8_IN_4fyFXdhNzTVvH1XDKXSj0MVouWdZo1YMnKhViFr-c2KZ56w4G_pb6BpGX90-jAs8txkFEFYWy "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: | | | | | | Friend, Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future. Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>" Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the of OUR movement?" | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, "I need your help – starting right now. " Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. Our mailing address is: 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492

name: Brett Cross
subject: I’m fighting for Roland — because Roland fought for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas
body:
You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=WCzMF5B%2FAH2PA03TrfD0SMPbsf1miwUJ%2BYGXt%2Fdcsn9oFL%2BOqeeEoiFPHM8i%2Fd6KBY9wRKptm1ig15H1jZdUCo%2BatEBRi0529eUFp87%2BtBprGybbVpcywu%2B%2BzyFbonSp7LiDh5HTCqxghy%2FAChLAu3lQeIE4zoJbm0pcoI1IyBzc6t1i01OGKbCH8yATMuUUqmRpO44Hjd4EVrGUW1lnDJPZeK4nalsMofvKyEhePsPzMQSA9CLv6nI7%2FA07lrjnINzW432iLBox8rAb3rqRVGOgnkSqQCVNNQRtkUhlh1jjPdL%2FYKI%2F%2FbVN9k8eTUbl3ZDIlsI%2FgQGTtmPn%2BPdfb1qCwubaVFESUSh0iFk%2BsCeTWepAiSPvu%2BMh0dk%2Bk6UTba0K6l3WW%2FW2n8MkXmxUv9qmYJdQNAqsNMvrF1y8DMaOVnC83aBwFAGDRIA18Ox0 .
secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25 [secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25]
Peter,
My son, Uzi, was my greatest inspiration.
He always wanted to put a smile on your face. He’d go out of his way to make you smile and laugh — to make you forget your pain.
Since I lost Uzi, it’s hard to forget the pain. There are no good days anymore.
On May 24, 2022, Uzi died at Robb Elementary School. He was one of the 21 people who lost their lives in Uvalde, Texas on that horrifying day — forever fracturing my community and my family.
There’s no doubt that the days since Uzi’s death have been the hardest of my life.
But they would have been harder without Roland Gutierrez standing at my side, fighting to do everything in his power to end gun violence in Texas.
That’s why I’m supporting Roland in his campaign to defeat Ted Cruz and become Texas’s next U.S. Senator. I’d be grateful if you could join me in supporting Roland with a contribution of $10, $15, or whatever you can spare. >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
When no one else had our back, Roland did.
When powerful men wanted the world to look away, Roland kept the spotlight on my community and the pain that Texas’s loose gun laws caused.
Meanwhile, the only things Ted Cruz had to offer were lip-service, gaslighting, and silence.
Ted Cruz wasn’t brave enough to meet with families like mine, because he knows his refusal to help get the guns off our streets is killing our children.
But as long as I’ve got a breath in my body, I’ll be fighting for our kids and every other kid out there who’s forced to live under this gun violence epidemic.
And I’ll be fighting for Roland, too — because he fought for us.
So please, can you join me in supporting Roland’s campaign today with a contribution of $10 or more? There’s so much at stake in this election, but I know we have what it takes to win if we stand together. >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=50]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Thank you,
Brett Cross

name: Mark Meckler, Convention of States Action
subject: No wonder we’re $32 trillion in debt!
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I need not remind you that the federal government is 32 trillion dollars in debt. Really, that means our children and grandchildren are 32 trillion in debt — Washington has zero interest in paying off their financial obligations; they’re simply planning on passing them down to future generations.
I can imagine you’re sick of it — that’s why we need you to sign this important petition now.
| | | [ **Join the Fight TODAY!** ](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJxckTGPnDAQhX-N6UB4DJgtKHLhKKJcc4quSGON7VnOe7Yh2GS19-sjLpsoSjPFm6en-d5gWL073wYmHxjAq7OJATDxiQHMLz8v-zO8P-Xy6RReysdL-FofW_jMAPJtpb_We0pFAZ0_VDkWdtBtb7pTQQOXdS1AtiCL16FtmzMZqIVutEYuoelqIfipsZpkA7xwA9QgOOc9l5y3okKL587Ivtdo2_OpY00dbhhocwbjinlzS66WbS788Jrzmj5umhhMZklV3I2nPa04U6rMEhhMHqN1cWYw6WWztJVX9L68YspUAhPTnoMKZN0emBjvSN0hpmXfDDEx_lNNNF7d8e8ug2FFN0cmxt8Y5TGUWZLyLmW1Uczold4wWhXpqsyy3tQF30ilXV_IZKVVwPVP3BIzxczEGI0vm7cxpG_pmR4ZdCp6Z5kY_xM_vijGHxgfpvfvX_piG-x6dd671EnW1POBdHTxKwAA__-SX6VE)

| | Thirty-two trillion (that’s twelve zeroes) is an incomprehensible number for most Americans, but when you see how Washington manages its money, well... it’s not hard to see how they wrecked the country so badly. For example, when Biden took office, his administration immediately ended the border wall project. Ever since, even as the nation suffered a terrible border crisis, the Department of Defense has sat on 20,822 unused border wall panels. Adding insult to injury, storing the materials costs $160,000 every single month. It should be clear to you that our federal government is hopelessly broken. Holding your breath waiting for Congress to tackle the debt is useless. In fact, the more we wait for Washington to fix itself, the worse the problem gets. **[That’s why I’m urging you, right now, to sign the Convention of States petition for an Article V convention -– the only viable solution to federal overreach and reckless spending.](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJxckTGPnDAQhX_N0LHCY8BQUOTCUZxykS7FFWmswTasN7Yh2GS19-sjLpsoumaKN09P870hvzo73ToQD4B4tjoCIvBPgDi__rrs3_DtOeXPrX_NHy_-S3Fs8TMgpttq_lnvKSfjybpDFX2mu7FqVN1mpmOiKDiKCkV27nRZj6Ys65ExoaqqbMRUT9QSqxpRNEWZ2Q4L5IyxhgnGKn4iTVOtRNOMpKupraEs_I282ayisFLa7JJOyzZnrjuntMb3mwbAQS3xFHblzB5Xmk08qcUDDo6CtmEGHMZl02bLr-RcfqWYTI7Ahz156Y22uwfe35HqQ4zLvikDvP-vmqCcvOPfXYr8SnYOwPs_GPkxpFqidDYmuZmQyMlxo6BlMFeplvUmL_TDyLiPF6OSHKWn9W_cEpIJCXgflMtbk16eHr_6lwmwlsFZDbz_IL5_kfc_KTwMb9-fmmzr9Hq1ztlYCyiL-UA6uvgdAAD__2pUpO8)** Calling an Article V convention is about so much more than just balancing the Feds’ outrageous budget. name: Team Williams
subject: Hey, Mike Johnson: How long until the next potential shutdown?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter, at the very last minute, our government was able to evade a catastrophic shutdown. **Petty games and brinkmanship are no way to govern.**

Throwing tantrums might be the norm at our local kindergarten, but as elected officials, no one should be putting their own interests over the American people. If we let Mike Johnson and the GOP continue leading, they'll continue sinking our country into a state of crisis. **They've already done it three times since they took the majority in January.**

**We need bold leaders in Congress with the courage to stand up to powerful interests in Washington to save lives; not imperiling the functions of government playing political games.**

This campaign is about taking action. The gun violence epidemic, the unjust American healthcare system, reproductive freedom, the climate crisis, our democracy; these issues demand leaders within a House majority that is ready to serve.

**Together, we can take back the House majority and create life-saving change. Brian is the best candidate to lead TX-32, but he can’t win without your support.[Will you make a contribution of $5 or any amount to help keep me in this
