clean_body: | | Peter, at the very last minute, our government was able to evade a catastrophic shutdown. Petty games and brinkmanship are no way to govern. Throwing tantrums might be the norm at our local kindergarten, but as elected officials, no one should be putting their own interests over the American people. If we let Mike Johnson and the GOP continue leading, they'll continue sinking our country into a state of crisis. They've already done it three times since they took the majority in January. We need bold leaders in Congress with the courage to stand up to powerful interests in Washington to save lives; not imperiling the functions of government playing political games. This campaign is about taking action. The gun violence epidemic, the unjust American healthcare system, reproductive freedom, the climate crisis, our democracy; these issues demand leaders within a House majority that is ready to serve. Together, we can take back the House majority and create life-saving change. Brian is the best candidate to lead TX-32, but he can’t win without your support.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Williams = | | Click to unsubscribe from our email list. name: John Padora
subject: My Thanksgiving traditions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Thanksgiving is right around the corner! I love Thanksgiving. It’s easily one of my favorite holidays. Something about spending time with loved ones surrounded by great food and drinks, celebrating the things we’re most thankful for just can’t be beaten.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=779195b8ebc74dcbb89a20be18a2a3a1&_e=-RxiOi_UHPXtETGEYXzIh_UlC7e5ELTI6Qjuf_0_TyqDK2x-1tcjwDAtw7UPa3-hgZucw_uiKkWho6Aw4HGq05SiyiwuIFg0iz1PPCCH52FT3Q_il7qYRgyi8BFOkWFHfjC72BG1xloYe58rkOyaMLT0SyMvCyBjErw5j-X-2460MERkDbDE6MtBJHkd_3rCjS7JMWfAhwBlXBwNT49jGiGjmnVM3RPvJZVnaMcJ4aWC1kFj9wJWgFKQb0Z9aJ-mP-9wj7wwoRdmMizNUqLghuMOA8hAoXLfI1zD-QSQZm2g70DNEylX-EKoZ6BRyIYFF-xGMUZoPWTfyziFIAWoSnDUf__OmIL5v9cjjLgAm3nTW8XHRhzZ08TFnoo9e_y8GADN_xMfgpcZAgwPDuNdDw%3D%3D) Folks, Thanksgiving is right around the corner! I _love_ Thanksgiving. It’s easily one of my favorite holidays. Something about spending time with loved ones surrounded by great food and drinks, celebrating the things we’re most thankful for just can’t be beaten. [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=779195b8ebc74dcbb89a20be18a2a3a1&_e=-RxiOi_UHPXtETGEYXzIh_UlC7e5ELTI6Qjuf_0_TyqDK2x-1tcjwDAtw7UPa3-hgZucw_uiKkWho6Aw4HGq05SiyiwuIFg0iz1PPCCH52FT3Q_il7qYRgyi8BFOkWFHfjC72BG1xloYe58rkOyaMLT0SyMvCyBjErw5j-X-2460MERkDbDE6MtBJHkd_3rCjS7JMWfAhwBlXBwNT49jGiGjmnVM3RPvJZVnaMcJ4aWC1kFj9wJWgFKQb0Z9aJ-mKwvTPQZi3DcJ1oc4ILU1uk0Li_Sht3-XQ6gyWoEEFwrkqIUVnglKf5vOAtkT3wdYZfqnpWiX6k-x1LAldD4LxfwCmP7ydv21ZdgFDVHP5Rew4XsvemIcwYGpuOTuUy2NR5Esb4RKK2AH8oFNP4T-zQ%3D%3D) Growing up, we used to have the biggest Thanksgiving meals because all my cousins, aunts, and uncles would get together for one big party. It was easily more than forty people, if you can believe that! It’s a little bit different now, but my family has built our own new traditions. The day before Thanksgiving, we normally go for a family hike to the Wyoming border just to see the sights and take in the world around us. It’s something special we do together, and it’s always something I look forward to. I’m running for Congress to bring about a better future for my family and for our state and community. [**So, I hope you’ll take a moment today to help me get one step closer to Washington by making a donation of any amount you can to my campaign.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=779195b8ebc74dcbb89a20be18a2a3a1&_e=-RxiOi_UHPXtETGEYXzIh_UlC7e5ELTI6Qjuf_0_TyqDK2x-1tcjwDAtw7UPa3-hgZucw_uiKkWho6Aw4HGq05SiyiwuIFg0iz1PPCCH52FT3Q_il7qYRgyi8BFOkWFHfjC72BG1xloYe58rkOyaMLT0SyMvCyBjErw5j-X-2460MERkDbDE6MtBJHkd_3rCjS7JMWfAhwBlXBwNT49jGiGjmnVM3RPvJZVnaMcJ4aWC1kFj9wJWgFKQb0Z9aJ-m6RuVqA1K6o44pYfIBdAzHJxuBZZMc4lSNe9RC3j8Lh3plt9jiP5IOFOizhQpN7kFQV7hSEFHHBxV79BQwhb21pcY6fZ6zs6Jp323a4IHKALrNFRIMVKZ7wRFObGWcVlr6Q34L2-zGmvSWmCMqUy5hA%3D%3D) I’m thankful for you, friend. – John **My story is not unique.** I was born and raised in Pennsylvania in rural, blue-collar, and old coal mining communities. I'm a proud husband and father to three amazing children. I witnessed firsthand how both major political parties have neglected rural communities and left behind working families. I'm running to build a movement and a government that works for working families. [**Join me.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=779195b8ebc74dcbb89a20be18a2a3a1&_e=-RxiOi_UHPXtETGEYXzIh2EU8jzZnWkxRt5-fiHDYSTqUxJo6e8mx6X1id2aoLpS1vuXZQO45VA2jvytWwQFxX_LzwJUAqv3MizGd7IGLRkWoPyxvSZ2Hqq_GoskyN0ZCBh4QSANlwwU4HCuD54NxEs4EE70O9Ay96S6FWz3gHBm5foRSsKhzMDcPuuzUuXCSSPodxZfgoQt5AOKNSjJpw%3D%3D) [DONATE MONTHLY](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=779195b8ebc74dcbb89a20be18a2a3a1&_e=-RxiOi_UHPXtETGEYXzIh_UlC7e5ELTI6Qjuf_0_Tyq_bXt8vdFCLFX2M7uc15cjyreWpeEePN_7Xmwx5a7Rw6TNKHJIFUkPWvj-N5J0EOjfbJPitj0PWi-LNm3WYOamq9puxC6t92BUO1A8q6oVhjWBzLJQyxuLtzUP222gmG4LywtBcsVySDRAvLC3UuyPv8VRok4ZQOICQUjb3FGUBg2Z3_7XF_X2eJjPlQw8ZtTwgTJo-3AI-VPqrTCst0ywPr_YikBz0Aq-I6iaZ5QxP3K2uJhPW_R5eksglDfRvuwU9nxh89JaAwokqQz23504KEdOjSr6VEc8-hH2up-W5M_FKO5XfmkdYS9KOzvG1JaEiG7SrMG6RKHj3k3a2VOVxOks9uFZaOLG0ZY0FxRKAXR8NhNiBz6anhlmrF_5LYT4arBqPaewpXKaLlcyTz_S) Paid for by Padora for Colorado

---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). Don't want to receive these emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_s=779195b8ebc74dcbb89a20be18a2a3a1&_t=yS4vomB9cAXUeezY1CZ3JdN2zBsxu4l5PAHC7AviMcnYn-QBYMbvHP6R0QB0-QQsi-zBKgKZDcM8SYBI-0LfTn1GdVUqulyg68CzHFYgoYE%3D)

John Padora , 1267 Wild Basin Road, Severance, CO 80550

subject: DACA by the numbers
body:
I’ll break it down: | | | Peter, let me share a few numbers: **66.** That’s how many days it’s been since Judge Hanen’s most recent decision against DACA. As a result, that’s also the number of days Congress and President Biden have left DACA recipients and undocumented youth waiting in limbo. **Over 2.5 million.** That’s how many undocumented people were eligible for DACA but never got to participate in the program due to Judge Hanen shutting it down for new applicants. **$10.** That’s the contribution we’re asking you to give to help keep pressure on Congress and President Biden for permanent protections for ALL undocumented youth and communities. DACA was never enough on its own — _your $10 will help us fight for more._ **Can we count on you to chip in $10 today and contribute to UWDA’s work securing permanent protections for ALL undocumented people?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8CyraxqLLfAsc7Mu4MEH22nEZGSLCSm9HgCsMIZhMTf4OmbP_5y574S9SSjBPhsgsXMYyiu3aNAjWWUBGmq8-UAfwW8ohSokUt1zO1mk2UPlUigFjVFYAlv6sFysjED1wjHKBzpDbQWp0SNxBBvpJNJEzOMoBP9Kuisg8HsDFFCJOGO-0LGSSmhwiJD2JuEWfpd-wzdIw2UxxE0ORhBgKpdOQ7sxNZbbp07Cyd4tAn2cPH2z7BQNxJtiIXjZWUdoSjD0YfGUeJyFrK1NwUEemxKTKDw9tv5nJ2UmYyF-gDTxdC5DlWwCmn4VNrJ5POh-FgUr7jsvwBc_fd-I78PIJexIJg5F3_sAM3CL3hShhAUs/41e/DPSUFcpnSl6CrIFJOfGxTw/h0/HrTQ-_81DpIUf3s9gkir0IxLRhUcBA85Pom4nYsiTNg)

subject: BIDEN SETS UP SECRET COURT
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN COX FOR CONGRESS, INC
body:
Send me to Congress and I'll shut down the secret courts. | | | |
---
| | |
# Biden Sets Up Secret Court.
I pledge to work with Congress to end this unconstitutional "court" and need your much-needed support to join with conservatives in opposing the uniparty.
---
| [ ](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=7fa65fa697&e=5bb5efcda7)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=d64ee1608f&e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $1776.00](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=3d64e49d65&e=5bb5efcda7 "CONTRIBUTE $1776.00")
---
| Friends,
I just completed two radio interviews in the last 24 hours and am urgently writing to tell of a new Biden Administration unconstitutional overreach into our privacy and personal lives.

Earlier this week his administration under the DOJ announced a new secret court, jointly established with the European Union Data Privacy Network. This on the heels of a massive FBI complex to be built in Maryland - larger than the DOD Pentagon headquarters! As an administrative agency, this "court" will not have the full protections of a constitutional Article III due process court. It's a cover up to the illegal actions of government agents who have violated our laws and rights.

And with Biden and Blinken welcoming Dictator Xi to San Francisco this week, this US-EU connected-court underscores that world powers could very easily surveil every part of our lives, control our money and require "social credit" totalitarianism like they do in China at this moment.

This is not a time to be summer patriots. I need your help now. We must stand together and expose and stop this darkness. In the Maryland Legislature I proved that I could expose and stop the digital surveillance bill being put in my committee by a Chinese company, which wanted to obtain the facial recognition of our children in schools.

I've hired an experienced campaign team that includes veterans of some of Congress' best and brightest for liberty. People who have successfully worked for great public servants like Jim Jordan, Scott Perry, Rand Paul and many others.

Now I need your help to send me to Congress to stand with the conservative leadership in bringing accountability and the full power of Congressional authority upon each rogue official and agency of the federal government, and ensure that we focus on stopping corruption, securing our borders, and lowering costs and inflation here, rather than sending billions of our tax dollars overseas.

We have data showing that this race is more than winnable next fall \- it is in play even now, making this the moment we must raise the funds to compete. Don't let the Democrats out-raise us.

I need to raise a war chest for our freedom. Every dollar counts. [Please help me](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=17444caef8&e=5bb5efcda7) carry the fight forward for our liberty.

Thank you,

---
|

| | Marjorie Taylor Greene seems to think her entire job in Congress is impeaching people and amplifying her social media presence.

So far, MTG has attempted to launch sham impeachments of both President Biden and Department of Homeland Security Secretary Mayorkas. Meanwhile, she refuses to pass bills that help her constituents, and she shows up unprepared to committee hearings.

**_Marjorie Taylor Greene is not doing her job, and we need to remove her from her committees so someone else can do that job for her._**

[**_The only way to stop MTG is to flip control of Congress. If we can flip control of Congress, Democrats will have the power to remove her from positions of power on critical committees! Pitch in to help us flip the House!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73599608/439023432/-1313339816?refcode=20231118.1_MTGU_11Z&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjViNDVhOS0zNzg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjCzO9UNdu9igDuvyxB4ds3siSvICMnT9HDu-S1AisY=)

If MTG refuses to do the job, we need to fire her.

Thank you for your support,

GA Dems

Marjorie Taylor Greene is not doing her job, and we need to remove her from her committees so someone else can do that job for her. = If MTG refuses to do the job, we need to fire her. Thank you for your support, GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. This might be the shortest email you ready today, Peter.

National disgrace **Adam Schiff** wants to level up his career as a politician, so he's running for U.S. Senate in California.

**I'm the leading conservative Republican running to defeat Adam Schiff** , keep him out of the Senate, and end his political career.

[**If you'd love nothing more than to hold Schiff accountable and humiliate him at the ballot box, will you support my campaign with a donation of ANY amount you can give today?**](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=3d837bcee4d9427b8780449e9faa7b5f&_e=H8VcJG84JAUyOxpLgKSMEysd9A1yHrEr0uTcza8wco3f06v7ODSKxXcLo2SWCH-IrWf8Bvdw_vk7OmAZhA2B5fbQNmCkiH6cpI0JF-fdO6n_24Q4FO8UdZqznOvKq3HXOqn7o5Gecuq4lTc0QQiAeELqs1sF4K0ym_uYAzRIVH2xsO4ztFvZI9oitWbCGzIhHirQpmuOGxN_e75Yrs7zYtlpctUr9xAP-YSegZpJCixUrnF80L-YhFwIqId6WbQuL8y8abd44Vcq5nuRgl7RCK1TV_kT8xVkvSR8sEsuPiVK17kWKVlp0dyl0SMQ0DlMmCVZ9vhBU4WiZ50WdseUdpzM2clPAiYJPnlnV9aTlzwHQwgzliqRDrbOwT8jPf6SDQGganz1DNt7w6gRcUTryw%3D%3D)

# ABOUT ERIC EARLY
---
Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Combating the climate crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
We need to be doing more to combat the climate crisis.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73600376/439026597/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2VkZTUzMC0zYTg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tis8sMu9Ha8XOpnse5cOpRjw48GFjY97LppD-yUE6kw=&emci=272617b1-8285-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=0cede530-3a86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=7731215)
---

| | The new national climate assessment has been released, and it tells a damning story. Because we're not doing nearly enough to slash our use of fossil fuels and cut greenhouse gas emissions, we're seeing devastating climate impacts all across the country. We're on track for 2023 to be the hottest year on record, and, in the US, 2023 has already had more billion-dollar natural disasters than in any other year. This year, we saw ocean temperatures over 100 degrees off the Florida coast, the tragedy of historic Lahaina burning to the ground in Maui, and July 4th being the hottest day in human history. **We can't wait to take bold action to combat the climate crisis.** While Republicans continue to deny climate change even exists and rake in contributions from Big Oil, here's what I've been doing recently to fight the climate crisis:
* Introduced the _Stop Arctic Ocean Drilling Act_ to end reckless, exploitative oil and gas exploration that damages fragile Arctic ecosystems and contributes to rising temperatures
* Introduced the _Break Free From Plastic Pollution Act_ to reduce our use of plastics and make corporate plastic polluters pay for poisoning our bodies and the environment
* Opposed the MVP and GTN Xpress pipelines and am continuously calling for a ban on any new fossil gas projects, including the CP2 LNG export facility
* Demanded the FTC investigate the effect of Big Oil mergers on gas prices, the economy, and our environment

It's past time to end our reliance on dirty energy. **Future generations can't afford for us to sit back and do nothing.** I'll be keeping up the fight, and I'm asking you to join me by electing climate champions who will always put people and planet over profits. body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
This week, the claws came out among House Republicans — and it looks like Kevin McCarthy was feelin’ pretty feisty.

In a totally classy, super congressional manner of airing out his grievances, Kevin gave Rep. Tim Burchett a “clean shot to the kidneys” while the Tennessee rep was talking to a reporter.

Maybe the cat’s just got our tongue here, but there’s gotta be a name for guys who hit people when their backs are turned... right? 🐱🙄

After nearly 2 months of public humiliation, Kevin deserves to kick back with his own kind this holiday season. We’re officially extending our Kevin McCatnip cat toy sale through the end of this month, so be sure to get yours before we run out! subject: I know what it's like to lose

| | | [](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=de15e866420b490fb9eefdc549cc365f&_e=KOermQViCDb9ICvUmgYHnyc8Za7nGlzswHKKHmi9Ef0e7elKcSo5nVrAkhF4cr6io21udHzA9kOIsM-aJxGhtDcLU8j3q6q6CGUAYsLIV-M2W0CGZ3WBAddh7fc73lnwcPWrb7Uv_QTS7gEjHWCOR76hDpksLsLksxxyTDQT2AfeN7t-_oF4VxmtPj6Vc9Vz8_IV12MUZktJELWLFUHaQb5ZpgegW0hzf78rzF1_DwP5AVD5IQew0ud7j4wtKM1YFBl6M4rBc6dchrzG3pRbpWP7K9jgwdMQYDvA4o1kte0KEtlq0PqnkxixvQ99gXNYcnt975Nggmxli8irMNPSfknJ-ONCVEQRDLlDXfQGZeE%3D)

Fellow American,

I know what it’s like to lose a campaign. In 2018, I had to call my Democrat challenger to concede the election. It was absolutely devastating to know that the community I love would be represented by a far-left woke Democrat. **_But I didn’t give up._** I did everything I could to get this seat back - and with the help of grassroots patriots like you, **we did it!** Even though we won, I always keep that last loss in the back of my mind because I want to make sure it never happens again. **Now, Democrats are spending MILLIONS to take this seat back, and I need my team just like I did after that first loss.** **[Will you pitch in now to help me defend one of the most vulnerable districts from the radical Left?](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=de15e866420b490fb9eefdc549cc365f&_e=KOermQViCDb9ICvUmgYHnyc8Za7nGlzswHKKHmi9Ef0e7elKcSo5nVrAkhF4cr6io21udHzA9kOIsM-aJxGhtDcLU8j3q6q6CGUAYsLIV-M2W0CGZ3WBAddh7fc73lnwcPWrb7Uv_QTS7gEjHWCOR76hDpksLsLksxxyTDQT2AfeN7t-_oF4VxmtPj6Vc9Vz8_IV12MUZktJELWLFUHaQR3ngQtj7VgDn8lSHVFwPXkYiIG5yj1gONUIdVcLxBiXHIR6kG3e5WCEXGMgTzZ4K43dmsMWnD2rwIq_wlZr-RssS_EiiJ32o6xLGUTPv_bk4Ah6dGFEaFyZpcKzb9VZS6SRnqE2XckBmbOoguBNh0U%3D)**

| | If we don’t keep up with our fundraising goals, we might be facing another loss next November, Fellow American. The Left has already pledged to spend MILLIONS in Florida, and a good chunk of that will be aimed right at this district. **_If we lose this seat, we could lose the ENTIRE HOUSE - and I know you don’t want that on our conscience._** **[Pitch in NOW so we can defend this seat and WIN next November!](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=de15e866420b490fb9eefdc549cc365f&_e=KOermQViCDb9ICvUmgYHnyc8Za7nGlzswHKKHmi9Ef0e7elKcSo5nVrAkhF4cr6io21udHzA9kOIsM-aJxGhtDcLU8j3q6q6CGUAYsLIV-M2W0CGZ3WBAddh7fc73lnwcPWrb7Uv_QTS7gEjHWCOR76hDpksLsLksxxyTDQT2AfeN7t-_oF4VxmtPj6Vc9Vz8_IV12MUZktJELWLFUHaQR5BTnSD28IowRtUbti7fbyGMpCZeJCnOI1EG9sDbqUhZHKm_WMuXi37sNy28DKkywo2F-Tu6XBuw4bcNRMYb0kY-yHfFVR1NEWO_L5ZTkjem-wN-yWNIrO3dNH7xDuql1TakGj7FvgSeZF_qUAOD2o%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, I know what it’s like to lose a campaign. In 2018, I had to call my Democrat challenger to concede the election. It was absolutely devastating to know that the community I love would be represented by a far-left woke Democrat. But I didn’t give up. I did everything I could to get this seat back - and with the help of grassroots patriots like you, we did it! Even though we won, I always keep that last loss in the back of my mind because I want to make sure it never happens again. Now, Democrats are spending MILLIONS to take this seat back, and I need my team just like I did after that first loss. | | | | | | If we don’t keep up with our fundraising goals, we might be facing another loss next November, Fellow American. The Left has already pledged to spend MILLIONS in Florida, and a good chunk of that will be aimed right at this district. If we lose this seat, we could lose the ENTIRE HOUSE - and I know you don’t want that on our conscience. | | | | | | Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar | | | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6a4d57b88b70fbe3230eb8ac40b3ea5aa2f603fcdd679be6120ebca7d97097ad0a551be5700ce5c5a68deaebe2c0a0afbc6ae96599791cd9a4561b2589f9ba6d

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: Team Nikki
subject: Re: Nikki’s fight for veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Hi team — We wanted to take a moment to make sure you saw Nikki’s message last week about her work to fight on behalf of veterans in Congress. As the granddaughter of two World War II veterans and a member of the House Committee on Veterans’ Affairs, the fight to ensure those who’ve served receive the critical care, support, and resources they deserve is deeply personal to Nikki, which is why she’ll never stop advocating for their needs. As she continues her fight to pass critical legislation like the _Veterans in STEM Expansion Act_ , we need to show Nikki’s colleagues in Congress that she has a groundswell of support from our grassroots movement. **[Please take a look at Nikki’s message below and then add your name to her petition to show your support for her efforts to secure veterans the support they deserve>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73600942/439028786/-972212288?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231118_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWJjZTk2Ni0zYzg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2rd-4xUeibTB4x7HdRfgSM9wiKCVGADqqIDL3FVagoQ=&emci=36e6dc5f-3c86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=febce966-3c86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387)** | [SUPPORT OUR VETERANS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73600943/439028787/1208961780?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231118_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWJjZTk2Ni0zYzg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2rd-4xUeibTB4x7HdRfgSM9wiKCVGADqqIDL3FVagoQ=&emci=36e6dc5f-3c86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=febce966-3c86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387)
---
We appreciate everything you do to support Nikki’s fight.
— Team Nikki

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Nikki Budzinski
Date: Saturday, November 11, 2023
Subject: Happy Veterans Day, friends.
Friends,
On Veterans Day, we acknowledge the sacrifices of our soldiers and veterans. To those of you who have served, are currently serving, or have a family member or loved one in the armed forces, I want to take a moment to say**thank you.**
As the granddaughter of two World War II veterans and a member of the House Committee on Veterans’ Affairs, I am personally committed to ensuring veterans have access to the benefits they’ve earned after putting their lives on the line for our country.
From introducing legislation to help veterans overcome financial obstacles and find good-paying jobs in STEM fields, to supporting female veterans who experience unique challenges after returning home — I’m working day in and day out in Congress to improve the lives of the dedicated people who have served our country.
**[I hope you’ll join me in honoring veterans today and every day by signing on to show your support for my work to build a future where those who have served receive the critical care, support, and resources they deserve.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73600944/439028788/-972212288?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231118_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWJjZTk2Ni0zYzg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2rd-4xUeibTB4x7HdRfgSM9wiKCVGADqqIDL3FVagoQ=&emci=36e6dc5f-3c86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=febce966-3c86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387)**

As the granddaughter of two World War II veterans and a member of the House Committee on Veterans’ Affairs, the fight to ensure those who’ve served receive the critical care, support, and resources they deserve is deeply personal to Nikki, which is why she’ll never stop advocating for their needs. As she continues her fight to pass critical legislation like the Veterans in STEM Expansion Act , we need to show Nikki’s colleagues in Congress that she has a groundswell of support from our grassroots movement. | We appreciate everything you do to support Nikki’s fight. — Team Nikki \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Nikki Budzinski Date: Saturday, November 11, 2023 Subject: Happy Veterans Day, friends. Friends, On Veterans Day, we acknowledge the sacrifices of our soldiers and veterans. To those of you who have served, are currently serving, or have a family member or loved one in the armed forces, I want to take a moment to saythank you. From introducing legislation to help veterans overcome financial obstacles and find good-paying jobs in STEM fields, to supporting female veterans who experience unique challenges after returning home — I’m working day in and day out in Congress to improve the lives of the dedicated people who have served our country. name: Sam Brown
subject: My soul was saved that day
body:
It started in 2008, while serving in Afghanistan, when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle. | |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_s=f49f39aa69fc43d3b054c371fd51c3e3&_t=dZKFmAHQKxanlrbVdPwKCEzgvjMZXNNZpL2FuCPW-ncRa8kgGlScuyh0y7wCA38HiaEEyd1AZsFOiswzKtQnB0q4ARGEjbbI224c_PXzdng%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_s=f49f39aa69fc43d3b054c371fd51c3e3&_t=dZKFmAHQKxanlrbVdPwKCEzgvjMZXNNZpL2FuCPW-ncRa8kgGlScuyh0y7wCA38HiaEEyd1AZsFOiswzKtQnB0q4ARGEjbbI224c_PXzdng%3D)

|
Friend,

It started in 2008, while serving in Afghanistan, when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle.

I was certain my time on this earth was over.

Until I faintly heard the words "I've got you" from my fellow soldier as the flames on my body were extinguished.

That experience taught me this: Service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable.

But it didn't take a near-death experience for me to know with every fiber of my being that serving this country was all in accordance with God's plan for me.

**[That's why I'm counting on your help in my campaign for U.S. Senate.](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=f49f39aa69fc43d3b054c371fd51c3e3&_e=felG3eHqEhs4bmOFkJATb-9YCG8gvKR3wHfh-Xw_EAfDFe92LHTEfHWZIkGGphq1xJaQHBe11nF7Y7N37raWzqQeMRtD_XP1Nx3XC4eyto4yZcZ8h0Ds6Gyb494iLbMor6px-hmJSDJin3_TbcDeHkF3tvmfBQJoUl51qs6b4lmY8mkVqOzz2B-5K53NTVo6ia3RW-MI0QRhfh-jNZ1MHl2HxmDaaooUdbWdeFnC4MvYMmFSYAQ63awvTaFNogi8e5x3WPcOkUZvFcgSrcHX1yaYIOvtoWEzDTiY55OqR6KphIywkcVT075cUkVkJpUZLVRpaRagGFGJdOZnrordag%3D%3D "That’s why I’m counting on your help in my campaign for U.S. Senate. ")**

I don't have decades of political experience under my belt.

I don't have wealthy coastal elites bankrolling my campaign.

But what I do have is a love for this country that is unmatched and the understanding that we can't afford to let our nation slip away any further than it already has.

**[Today, my heart is filled with a passion to save this country before we lose it forever. And I know yours is too, Friend!](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=f49f39aa69fc43d3b054c371fd51c3e3&_e=felG3eHqEhs4bmOFkJATb-9YCG8gvKR3wHfh-Xw_EAfDFe92LHTEfHWZIkGGphq1xJaQHBe11nF7Y7N37raWzqQeMRtD_XP1Nx3XC4eyto4yZcZ8h0Ds6Gyb494iLbMor6px-hmJSDJin3_TbcDeHkF3tvmfBQJoUl51qs6b4lmY8mkVqOzz2B-5K53NTVo6dI7QMH9nk3d0UVv9uWx6xCp8HFTg4C60OIzbiWmwH5qhwvT5jumraPj4-3v9T2V09Shf1xxMqEFZi0eCI0iSHMKIpLhq1_kP9HZtUt2_rRo8B2YRKaMwXuDTKREKawjm4byk5gHfViZdU-qBXatv9w%3D%3D "Today, my heart is filled with a passion to save this country before we lose it forever. And I know yours is too, Friend!")**

I always knew it wouldn't be easy.

The radical left is targeting my race because they know I won't play their games. They've already raised $30+ MILLION to try to end my campaign..

Since that day in 2008, I've met the woman of my dreams. I've had 3 beautiful children. I started a business working to get veterans the critical medications they need every day. And my dedication to making this country better for my family and every American has never been stronger.

That's why when everything is on the line, I'll never stop fighting for you.

**[It's truly up to us to ensure our children and grandchildren inherit a patriotic, safe and sane country.](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=f49f39aa69fc43d3b054c371fd51c3e3&_e=felG3eHqEhs4bmOFkJATb-9YCG8gvKR3wHfh-Xw_EAfDFe92LHTEfHWZIkGGphq1xJaQHBe11nF7Y7N37raWzqQeMRtD_XP1Nx3XC4eyto4yZcZ8h0Ds6Gyb494iLbMor6px-hmJSDJin3_TbcDeHkF3tvmfBQJoUl51qs6b4lmY8mkVqOzz2B-5K53NTVo6-rSi0tQ0Z6gRRMmACPu5K1A1uEnm3brPFceHklAE5_vP1YdN9p4PGJfCC9utA7GdRCmn4t_I_C05OoXE4q8um2FrS9qpyUXFOpvbzymuzdeY_wxzagcnWZ22zbgEIrPfTUf8YGRjO_pM51d_bmtupg%3D%3D "It’s truly up to us to ensure our children and grandchildren inherit a patriotic, safe and sane country. ")**

So from one fighter to another, would you take 2 minutes to support a conservative combat veteran get to Washington?

---
| | [SUPPORT SAM](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=f49f39aa69fc43d3b054c371fd51c3e3&_e=felG3eHqEhs4bmOFkJATb-9YCG8gvKR3wHfh-Xw_EAfDFe92LHTEfHWZIkGGphq1xJaQHBe11nF7Y7N37raWzqQeMRtD_XP1Nx3XC4eyto4yZcZ8h0Ds6Gyb494iLbMor6px-hmJSDJin3_TbcDeHkF3tvmfBQJoUl51qs6b4lmY8mkVqOzz2B-5K53NTVo6rbJuRxPb6x0r7o41i36vE4DMTsYWtOwAXBQgvMqVWYm2jK1Qo434ML4WbHfzT4puqs91SkL5J44_gHfeJHlEqKsKhs9CARQpy88MLJ_0C6As6ifrWWulgwpKsWiDwAWm1R49zoWi2wWedU3X5Y-hjw%3D%3D)

Duty First,

CPT Sam Brown, USA, Ret.

name: Indiana Dems
subject: A direct choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|

Peter, This November, Hoosiers once again looked across state lines and saw their neighbors making their voice heard directly at the ballot on important issues. This year it was Ohioans on choice and cannabis. Last year it was Kentuckians, Illinoisans, and Michiganders on reproductive freedoms and collective bargaining. It’s time for it to be Hoosiers. **[Hoosiers deserve citizen-led ballot initiatives — like our neighbors. If you agree, please consider chipping in today to help Democrats mobilize on this message in 2024 and beyond.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73601354/439030228/405560545?refcode=231118Direct&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzA0ZDNmOC0zYzg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YTasbWagvtbDWyQyY4xJ1xjBQR4wQAMF77HcvaBySvY=)** Legislators should want to hear from the voters on these issues — and get a direct public opinion at the ballot. _**[We’re the party that wants to empower Hoosiers and extend them this direct right. With your support, we’ll make sure Hoosiers know that in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73601357/439030230/405560545?refcode=231118Direct&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzA0ZDNmOC0zYzg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YTasbWagvtbDWyQyY4xJ1xjBQR4wQAMF77HcvaBySvY=)**_ Thanks,

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Are you ready to do your part?

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2311-q4-wn?refcode=231118-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2311-q4-wn?refcode=231118-email]
Peter,
Last month, new electoral maps went into effect here in North Carolina.
North Carolina Republicans took a fair map of 7 Republican and 7 Democratic Congressional seats and turned it into 10 Republicans, 3 Democrats, and one toss-up. The Congressional map basically ensures that the GOP stays in power in North Carolina for years to come.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2311-q4-wn?refcode=231118-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2311-q4-wn?refcode=231118-email]
I want to be clear where I stand: Voters should choose their elected officials, not the other way around. I won this race in 2022 because North Carolina voters had a chance to have their voices heard and pick the candidate with the best ideas.
Now, the NC GOP has drawn the districts in such a way that Republicans have the upper hand - no matter what the voters believe.
I’ll always fight against partisan gerrymandering to make sure every single North Carolina voter has a voice in our elections. But I need to hear from you on this:
Will you join my team and me in the fight for fair maps?
Yes - I’m in! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2311-q4-wn-poll?refcode=231118-email-yes]
No - I support the maps [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2311-q4-wn-poll?refcode=231118-email-no]
Unsure - I’d like to learn more [https://twitter.com/wileynickel/status/1718713267982303571]
Thanks!
Wiley

clean_body: [] Peter, Last month, new electoral maps went into effect here in North Carolina. North Carolina Republicans took a fair map of 7 Republican and 7 Democratic Congressional seats and turned it into 10 Republicans, 3 Democrats, and one toss-up. The Congressional map basically ensures that the GOP stays in power in North Carolina for years to come. [] I want to be clear where I stand: Voters should choose their elected officials, not the other way around. I won this race in 2022 because North Carolina voters had a chance to have their voices heard and pick the candidate with the best ideas. Now, the NC GOP has drawn the districts in such a way that Republicans have the upper hand - no matter what the voters believe. I’ll always fight against partisan gerrymandering to make sure every single North Carolina voter has a voice in our elections. But I need to hear from you on this: Will you join my team and me in the fight for fair maps? Yes - I’m in! [] No - I support the maps [] Unsure - I’d like to learn more [] Thanks! Wiley Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today! | | Patriot,

---
The first vote of the 2024 election will be cast in Iowa in less than 2 months.
---
_That’s why I’m in Iowa today to ensure that we secure a MASSIVE VICTORY on the very first day of voting in the entire 2024 election._

---
Our victory will send a powerful message to Crooked Joe and his radical left-wing accomplices that their vicious acts of Election Interference completely and totally backfired.

---
It will also send a message to the cowardly RINOs, who have either outright _defended_ these witch hunts or have become complicit by choosing to remain silent as the federal government engaged in its greatest injustice in history.
---
Polls show that we’re DOMINATING the entire Republican field in Iowa (...and _**_ALL_**_ of the primary states).

---
It turns out that cowards aren’t popular with the American people!

---

subject: They really just hate democracy
body:
| |

When you think you know better than everyone else, your arrogance trumps everything. | [View in browser](https://dagoyy.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjY4ODM3OSxcImxcIjoxMDUyMDU5NDUwNjczNzQwNzcsXCJyXCI6MTA1MjA2MDM3NjMxNDY5MDk5fSIsInMiOiJhNDdhYjE4YjU2ODgyMTg2In0)

|
---
Friend, Only a few weeks ago, voters in my state of Ohio voted 56-43% to enshrine protections for abortion rights into the state Constitution.

This incredible result shows a robust majority of Ohioans support basic abortion access and rights—including reasonable limits to abortion and regulation, akin to what existed before _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned by the Supreme Court.

You may not be aware, however, that the Ohio GOP and the anti-choice zealots pulling the strings behind all of the Republicans’ machinations around Issue 1 have publicly refused to accept a resounding defeat of their unpopular agenda. Their answer? **Boldly undermine the clear will of the vast majority of Ohio voters:**

|
---
| [ ](https://dagoyy.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjY4ODM3OSxcImxcIjoxMDUyMDU5NDUwNzk5NTY5OTQsXCJyXCI6MTA1MjA2MDM3NjMxNDY5MDk5fSIsInMiOiJkMjQyZjVmZDBkOGE5YzEzIn0)
---
|
---
The message they are sending to voters is as clear as the message voters sent to them on Election Day: **_We do not respect your voice. We know better than you. And because we hate democracy, we will not honor the majority’s will._**
The stakes of our political disagreements and the fights we wage to win elections have never been higher. There are far too many politicians on the right who have infiltrated the Republican Party and rotted it from the inside out. **Extremists on the other side have made their intent plain to voters** —**but they’ve also made it that much easier for us to make our case to a winning coalition of voters.**
Folks in my district care about the results of elections, and they care about their leaders respecting the will of the people. I need your help to make sure they see the stakes of this election and know that we can fight back together—[Can I count on your support to make sure every single voter knows that my opponent and his cronies want to invalidate their votes, and we can beat them this election?](https://dagoyy.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjY4ODM3OSxcImxcIjoxMDUyMDU5NDUwODQxNTEzMDAsXCJyXCI6MTA1MjA2MDM3NjMxNDY5MDk5fSIsInMiOiJhYTcyN2NkNjg5MjVjNWRkIn0)

This incredible result shows a robust majority of Ohioans support basic abortion access and rights—including reasonable limits to abortion and regulation, akin to what existed before Roe v. You may not be aware, however, that the Ohio GOP and the anti-choice zealots pulling the strings behind all of the Republicans’ machinations around Issue 1 have publicly refused to accept a resounding defeat of their unpopular agenda. Their answer? Boldly undermine the clear will of the vast majority of Ohio voters: | | | The message they are sending to voters is as clear as the message voters sent to them on Election Day: We do not respect your voice. We know better than you. And because we hate democracy, we will not honor the majority’s will. The stakes of our political disagreements and the fights we wage to win elections have never been higher. There are far too many politicians on the right who have infiltrated the Republican Party and rotted it from the inside out. Extremists on the other side have made their intent plain to voters —but they’ve also made it that much easier for us to make our case to a winning coalition of voters. Folks in my district care about the results of elections, and they care about their leaders respecting the will of the people. I need your help to make sure they see the stakes of this election and know that we can fight back together— | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Donate or | These anti-democratic and anti-American jokers simply have to be defeated, over and over again, until they are thrown out of power and can do no more damage to our society and our government. Thank you for helping us do just that in purple Ohio. Jerrad Christian Veteran, U.S. Navy Democrat for Ohio’s 12th Congressional District | | | | | | | Jerrad Christian Candidate for Congress (OH-12) | | | | | | | To contribute via check, please address to: Jerrad Christian for OH-12 P.O. Box 315, Galena OH 43021 United States of America | | | | You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us.

name: George Whitesides
subject: good & bad news
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73602910/439035863/-233825198?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzE4ZDM5My00Mjg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t5Asq3emPHJwG4M2i-A3fWy5OYMMEQqSne393k9lcUs=)
Peter, I apologize for reaching out on the weekend -- but I need to lay out the stakes of our race.
We have received a lot of good news in this race:
✅**Our far-right opponent Mike Garcia is losing popularity in the district, fast.** His extreme views on everything from supporting a nationwide abortion ban to cutting critical benefits for seniors caused his approval rating to sink by 9% in the last month.

✅ **Political experts agree that the tide is turning in CA-27.** Our race is rated a “toss up” and a key to the fate of the House majority. Flipping this district blue and winning the majority for Democrats would help give the people of this district the real leadership they need.
But, Mike Garcia and the national GOP won’t go down that easily:
❌ **Fox News has already attacked our campaign with smears and lies.** The number of attacks on our movement -- from Republican groups, representatives, and more -- will only increase as we move closer to 2024.

❌**Super PACs including those associated with GOP leaders like Kevin McCarthy are openly investing millions of dollars into toss up races like ours.**

**[As you can see, the stakes could not be any higher. I’m committed to winning this seat and moving CA-27 forward, but I need your support today to get it done. Can I count on you to chip in $3 or anything you can afford toward our campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73602911/439035864/-233825198?refcode=em-11.18.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzE4ZDM5My00Mjg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t5Asq3emPHJwG4M2i-A3fWy5OYMMEQqSne393k9lcUs=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__ | ****[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73602912/439035865/-233825198?refcode=em-11.18.23-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzE4ZDM5My00Mjg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t5Asq3emPHJwG4M2i-A3fWy5OYMMEQqSne393k9lcUs=)**** | ****[$35](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73602913/439035866/-233825198?refcode=em-11.18.23-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzE4ZDM5My00Mjg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t5Asq3emPHJwG4M2i-A3fWy5OYMMEQqSne393k9lcUs=)****

clean_body: | = Peter, I apologize for reaching out on the weekend -- but I need to lay out the stakes of our race. We have received a lot of good news in this race: ✅Our far-right opponent Mike Garcia is losing popularity in the district, fast. His extreme views on everything from supporting a nationwide abortion ban to cutting critical benefits for seniors caused his approval rating to sink by 9% in the last month. ✅ Political experts agree that the tide is turning in CA-27. Our race is rated a “toss up” and a key to the fate of the House majority. Flipping this district blue and winning the majority for Democrats would help give the people of this district the real leadership they need. But, Mike Garcia and the national GOP won’t go down that easily: ❌ Fox News has already attacked our campaign with smears and lies. The number of attacks on our movement -- from Republican groups, representatives, and more -- will only increase as we move closer to 2024. ❌Super PACs including those associated with GOP leaders like Kevin McCarthy are openly investing millions of dollars into toss up races like ours. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, George =** | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: Team Evers
subject: making investments throughout Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek, Tony is
asking for your help. We know Republicans are getting ready to spend big
in Wisconsin next year.

With a marquee Senate contest and razor-thin race for the presidency, we
have to make sure Wisconsin stays blue in 2024.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2196?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231118_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_mmfr.1.2&t=1001&akid=6487%2E1827488%2EqVbGlq ]Can you help Tony and Wisconsin Democrats throughout our state make
early investments to win in 2024 by chipping in today?

— Begin Forwarded Message —

Derek,

Now that we’re less than a year out from the 2024 presidential election,
it’s time to really get to work.

Polls have shown that it’ll be a close race in every swing state,
including Wisconsin, and we need to do everything we can to make sure
Donald Trump or whoever the Republicans nominate doesn’t win our state and
the presidency with it.

But we know Republicans have their sights set on Wisconsin. That’s why
they hosted their first presidential debate here over the summer, and why
they’re coming back to host their convention in Milwaukee next year.

It’s simple: If we’re going to hold the White House next year, we need to
keep Wisconsin blue.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2196?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231118_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_mmfr.1.2&t=1002&akid=6487%2E1827488%2EqVbGlq ]Can you help us make early investments across our state so we can block

clean_body: This is an important moment for us to hear what's on your mind. | | | With so much happening in the world right now, we want to know where you stand, Peter. We want to hear your thoughts on President Biden’s performance, as well as Democrats in Congress. We want to know which issues are most important to you and which candidates you are most excited about. And we want to know how you plan to throw down in the 2024 election. The Working Families Party is your party, which is why it’s critical to hear from as many members as possible about the issues and candidates you care about the most. Will you spare a few minutes to fill out our member survey? You can start by answering the first question right here: 1\. On a scale of 1 (strongly disapprove) to 5 (strongly approve), how would you rate the performance of President Joe Biden? From the 2024 presidential election, to Republican dysfunction in Congress, to the fight for reproductive freedom, to the humanitarian catastrophe in Gaza — so much is on the line right now and in the months ahead. Which is why your participation in surveys like this one is essential to helping us identify our priorities for the electoral cycle and our organizing work. Your input is essential to our success, Peter, which is why we read every one of your answers — yes, every single one. In solidarity, WFP Digital Team Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Mayor Sepi Shyne
subject: Asking personally
body:
Hi friend,
I have to tell you, fundraising is my least favorite part of the campaign trail.
My passion is showing up for our rights and our communities — standing with workers striking for fair pay and benefits, supporting our LGBTQ+ community at local events and with legislative priorities, and governing for the people who have been underrepresented and unheard in our district and across the country.
But we've reached the midpoint of the month, and that means there's another fundraising goal we have to reach to keep our movement for workers, LGBTQ+ rights, civil rights, affordable housing, mental healthcare, and all our progressive efforts going strong.
**We're hard at work for our communities, but to continue our mission in Congress, we must get our message out to voters. To reach hearts and minds about our mission for progress, we must meet every critical fundraising benchmark.**
So I'm asking personally today, friend, will you chip in just $5 or any amount that works for you? We're halfway to our mid-month goal, but we need your help to reach it.
**> >>[secure.actblue.com/donate/shyne](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73603145/439036676/-1233768706?refcode=231118_ss_mm_l1&ms=231118_ss_mm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWFiOGEyZDUtNDM4Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5aHXh7q0KskRl1V-0T7T0EJ2sZREnEJK9u7K1X_cjwI=)**
Thank you so much, friend. When we stand together, we're unstoppable.
With gratitude,
Mayor Sepi Shyne
#WomanLifeFreedom

Sepi Shyne For Congress
8149 Santa Monica Blvd
#280
West Hollywood, CA 90046
United States

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Defeating Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
I’m Bob Lorinser, a Democrat running for Congress in rural Michigan. We are up against a Trump sycophant, Rep. Jack Bergman and I need your help defeating Trumpism and standing strong against the radical Right.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Bergman%20Trump.png]
My opponent blindly follows Trump's doctrine, votes against our district and with the so-called “Freedom Caucus” 90% of the time. He denied the election results, voted against certifying the presidency, and violated his oath to the US Constitution.
Your generosity helps me defeat him and Trump. [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
The Trump administration's policies have taken a toll on our families, our economy, our community, and our health. We cannot allow another Trump presidency. As a fervent supporter and endorser, Rep. Jack Bergman needs to be defeated, too.
In the last election cycle against Bergman, my campaign was able to move the needle for Democrats by 5 points, calculating redistricting.
Democrats must compete hard in rural America. We’re not just a "red district," but a district filled with voters who are eager for change. I just need to reach them.
The best way to defeat Trump nationally is to turn districts like ours blue. We were once solid blue, and to change the tide, our path to victory involves being champion for everyday hardworking families.
This is where we need your help. Your contribution, whether $5, $50, or $500, will directly support my grassroots campaign. It helps me purchase ads, fund events, travel, outreach, and mobilize a massive ground game with my experienced field team.
T alking to voters one-on-one is crucial, and we're ready to go.
I’m committed to fighting for a healthcare system that works for everyone, for an economy that serves all, not just the wealthy, and for a society that is inclusive, diverse, and just.
Friend help me make a difference and alter the course of our nation's history.
Very Respectfully,
-Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or send a check to:
"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: an alarming statistic on anti-Semitism:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
| Hey team, I sent you an email last week about my CNN interview on the rise of anti-semitism since the October 7th Hamas attack on Israel.

**Even since I sent you that email, more and more anti-semitic attacks have occurred — on college campuses, in restaurants, and everywhere we should feel safe.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73603152/439036743/-349209756?amount=5&refcode=JMFC_20231117_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWRlOGExOC00NDg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h2MLuSlCEdGMIZz1fB_sMnY2vxUyWel85fwBFcC0_7A=) I’ve been extremely vocal about the rise in anti-semitism, even before the brutal attack on Israel — and voices against anti-semitism are important now more than ever.

[**I’m keeping my promise to fight antisemitism in Congress — but I need your help. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Fantastic opportunities for young conservatives!
body:
| | |
---
Are there any young conservatives in your life or does someone you know have kids or grandkids? If so, I have a couple of really great opportunities for you to share with them! You could also post about them on social media or email them out to your network. **The first opportunity is a Leadership Institute (LI) Youth Leadership School.** The list of states below are the locations of their upcoming, in-person trainings. They also have tons of [online](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) and [on-demand](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2NTYyJmlkPVQxN1VOVHNmWkp0d2tTeVRUQyJ9/gbrnno1X8wreo1XfHH46kg) trainings. From LI:
---
| | _This elite training teaches young conservatives to be influential activists for candidates and causes of their choice. The Leadership Institute's Youth Leadership School (YLS) is a two-day, comprehensive campaign activism training that provides the tools to be an effective youth leader for candidates and causes of their choice. This "bootcamp of politics" is an essential training for anyone who wants to be active in the political process._
---
| | **DC Area**
* * [**Virginia**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-Yg)

**South**
* * [**Alabama**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
* [**Florida**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
* [**Georgia**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._qk8HCNJDA)
* [**Mississippi**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-CamzQcqaauXkwTYhvigg)
* [**South Carolina**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._8YwJlHUHQ)

---
| **West**
* * [**California**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
* [**Colorado**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)

**Midwest**
* * [**Minnesota**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
* [**Missouri**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._RbCzLFw)
* [**North Dakota**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._LVhfMNTNALyiSvPaw)

---
| | They have a limited number of scholarships available, including flight scholarships,so be sure to check it out! **The second opportunity is a scholarship opportunity from The Foundation for the Restoration of America (FFROA).** American citizens 16 and up can apply for up to $10,000 in scholarships by completing Constitution Courses. FFROA is awarding a minimum of $100,000 in scholarship funds in 2023. The next deadline is December 31, 2023. For more details, requirements, and an FAQ, [**see their website.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-bT0Lq9se43Ml_JgyGnh4A) Please share these opportunities widely! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin
---
| | |
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjpudWxsLCJycSI6IjAyLWIyMzMyMi00Yzg1Yjg5MzI2YmU0ZDIzOTYzYTk4Y2M0MDU5YTAyNCIsInBoIjpudWxsLCJtIjpmYWxzZSwidWkiOiIxNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8_bWlkPTQ2NTYyJmlkPVQxN1VOVHNmWkp0d2tTeVRUQyJ9/SD05Rj0qTL9f45rZZ9L7CA)
---
|

name: James Carville
subject: Pennsylvania is as competitive as ever
body:
I had to reach out ASAP.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73603348/439037537/-1222011784?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk921-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjRjNDBhYy00NDg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xOQPlQhzMYl-Wz1k_VL1-ic0sKwkTrFLDxYCFCltIQ0=)
Hey Derek, it’s Carville.

I’ll tell you right now: we’ve gotta get serious about Pennsylvania’s Senate race.

David McCormick — a mega-millionaire hedge fund guy who can spend HUGE sums of his own money and self-fund this race — is trying to flip PA’s Senate seat red.

So the biggest mistake grassroots Democrats can make right now is to sit by and think that re-electing Bob Casey is a shoo-in.

As someone who’s spent nearly half a century electing Democrats and winning tough elections across the country, I’m telling ya — this is gonna be a close one, and we gotta act now.
**Please, Derek, will you split a donation of $5 or more between Bob Casey and Chrissy Houlahan? We CANNOT take Pennsylvania for granted.**
| | [Contribute $5 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73603350/439037538/-1222011784?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk921-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjRjNDBhYy00NDg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xOQPlQhzMYl-Wz1k_VL1-ic0sKwkTrFLDxYCFCltIQ0=)
---
The fact is, Derek, if we don’t rally for Bob RIGHT NOW, we’re toast. That’s how serious Mitch McConnell and his cronies are about winning this race.

**National Republicans are getting ready to spend potentially more than EVER in the Keystone State!!!**

I’ll take it one step further — if we want to win, I think we need to see a LOT more grassroots donations than we have since McCormick launched his campaign.

**Act now to shore up our strength in Pennsylvania. Split $5 or any amount between Chrissy Houlahan and Bob Casey’s campaign to defend our Senate majority.**
| | [Contribute $5 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73603351/439037539/-1222011784?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk921-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjRjNDBhYy00NDg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xOQPlQhzMYl-Wz1k_VL1-ic0sKwkTrFLDxYCFCltIQ0=)
---
Thanks as always,

James Carville
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333
United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73603352/439037540/-1727112621?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjRjNDBhYy00NDg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xOQPlQhzMYl-Wz1k_VL1-ic0sKwkTrFLDxYCFCltIQ0=&emci=24e8bfa1-cb83-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=d24c40ac-4486-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=21278485). name: Will Rollins
subject: being gay was still considered a crime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend,

Like many, my partner Paolo and I came of age at a time when being gay was still considered a crime in many states.

I often reflect back to when I was 17 years old in the wake of 9/11. I had a deep sense of duty to serve the country, but policies like “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell” discouraged me from joining the military.

Thanks to the brave LGBTQ+ Americans who came before me and had the courage to come out, I eventually got the chance to work openly in law enforcement and counterterrorism. [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57190?t=6&akid=11794%2E878179%2EHsFYwo) _Paolo and I recently at Palm Springs Pride._ Despite the strides we've taken toward equality, the recent election of Speaker Mike Johnson proves the GOP is hell-bent on turning back the clock on LGBTQ+ rights.

Johnson’s record reads like something out of an anti-LGBTQ+ hate group’s wish list. Aside from voting against marriage equality just last year, he:

\- Is on record supporting the _criminalization_ of sexual acts between consenting LGBTQ+ adults,

\- Previously worked with an organization that pushed so-called conversion therapy,

\- Claimed that a ‘homosexual agenda’ will destroy society and likened being LGBTQ+ to pedophilia and bestiality. _Really._

The fact that the Speaker of the House doesn’t respect Paolo's and my right to love is shocking -- especially in 2023. And the fact that Ken Calvert and the entire Republican Party handed him the Speaker’s gavel is even more horrifying.

We can send a clear message that rejects Johnson’s hateful agenda by turning the House blue next year. That starts by flipping CA-41.

[**Can you please split $10, or whatever you can afford, between the Voter Protection Project and our campaign to help us flip CA-41, defeat Ken Calvert, and restore decency to Congress?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57190?t=7&akid=11794%2E878179%2EHsFYwo) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Will Rollins and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57191?t=8&akid=11794%2E878179%2EHsFYwo)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57194?t=11&akid=11794%2E878179%2EHsFYwo)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57190?t=12&akid=11794%2E878179%2EHsFYwo)
Thank you,

Will Rollins
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11794%2E878179%2EHsFYwo). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11794%2E878179%2EHsFYwo).**

_**Fellow American - I am all in for President Trump.**_

I endorse him wholeheartedly, and believe to my core that we have to make Biden a one-term president.

[**DONATE TO SPEAKER JOHNSON & PRESIDENT TRUMP ➞**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6631b944256f4465a111afa470b98678&_e=W7FA-Iv9weboEH-u09RMTEyHYlM2Blv4-PsLv4DBaL7N4C06Hiy7wRS5xJ-w_np5WghWtuTxWLkVkrDdJs-WAZ0ctQ5lyiQgyM1CyisTmKPlw9Z-d8MCiLVFbuUa9ZppwfmPHxMVb_ZmlAVgVTVHR5g5ON9tZyTJorkgMwl2q1niqKJcwH17ZpF5uoJSxZd9n3DGWLvct4d1XFgUcuHJfzxYYUbYpvZuSJtQQSI5iY3NrGCtL3fWDbbHmg6MxuqkwDV2HZhFgjUPPglhO3VVLmPb2X3cAnpHq92DE_BhqG_VeZNy1oKYHX6wzRvEcipEH-ApldI0enTqDMI4vnyjFYTa4atdSrDuHcBg9NMBnoaIOBCU_zDSMYKx--OcP_fi)
Under President Trump, we built the greatest economy in U.S. history, took concrete steps to secure our southern border, projected strength abroad, and fought back against the radical Left EVERY DAY – **no matter what they threw at us.**

President Trump made America great again, _and I know we can do it once more._

[**But it will take an army of conservative warriors stepping forward in this fight.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6631b944256f4465a111afa470b98678&_e=W7FA-Iv9weboEH-u09RMTEyHYlM2Blv4-PsLv4DBaL7N4C06Hiy7wRS5xJ-w_np5WghWtuTxWLkVkrDdJs-WAZ0ctQ5lyiQgyM1CyisTmKPlw9Z-d8MCiLVFbuUa9ZppwfmPHxMVb_ZmlAVgVTVHR5g5ON9tZyTJorkgMwl2q1niqKJcwH17ZpF5uoJSxZd9n3DGWLvct4d1XFgUcuHJfzxYYUbYpvZuSJtQQSI5iY2-Ed40GeuKLkOi5OGNJ3KovXMe59w6-l46BzSHCa6J6EcedqPMcAMkc-6oZPtMhoHVpEBRDIjIPB-ahOKpiG0LSjC1Q77qGS9wo9ljNWRkbwV2eaKsy9OuXhk1T_tCBv8hQi7xlm7veOMl2PO8yAhE)

[**Democrats are going to call on every big-Liberal donor to keep President Trump OUT of the arena,_and we are going to need to have the resources to respond._**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6631b944256f4465a111afa470b98678&_e=W7FA-Iv9weboEH-u09RMTEyHYlM2Blv4-PsLv4DBaL7N4C06Hiy7wRS5xJ-w_np5WghWtuTxWLkVkrDdJs-WAZ0ctQ5lyiQgyM1CyisTmKPlw9Z-d8MCiLVFbuUa9ZppwfmPHxMVb_ZmlAVgVTVHR5g5ON9tZyTJorkgMwl2q1niqKJcwH17ZpF5uoJSxZd9n3DGWLvct4d1XFgUcuHJfzxYYUbYpvZuSJtQQSI5iY13p98XL5xZrAqRPedLIBJNbA3Ux5WYUf33IqOQOeSsCSyHsXr_cNjUKzE_P7IIGJeYOHHrm_JbJk07SxQwIkuvzvsf-zWHc01UQ3VfVnH3ranZ--FSoSA9OMK0lKyNiVClwTATelRTB7TvAcXfcgG0)

It would mean so much to both President Trump and me if we could depend on your support today in our mission to save America. Friend,
I’m taking a quick break from a door knock in support of our DFL candidate Bianca Virnig to share an update about what’s at stake in the upcoming special election.
On Tuesday, December 5th, voters in House District 52B will head to the polls, and extreme MAGA Republicans would love nothing more than to score an upset victory and claim momentum ahead of 2024. If we want to protect our House DFL majority and the DFL trifecta, we can’t let that happen.
To help our DFL candidate win this special election, our team has set a goal to raise $5,000 this weekend to cover costs like printing campaign literature for door knocks, sending direct mail to turn out likely voters, and feeding hungry volunteers who are powering this grassroots campaign. Will you help us reach this important goal by making a donation today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-email2023?refcode=111823PCR]
Using Minnesota’s Political Contribution Re fund, you can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and have it refunded to you by the state. Can I count on you to make your refundable donation and help us hit our fundraising goal?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-email2023?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=111823PCR]
Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-email2023?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=111823PCR]
Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-email2023?express_lane_other=true&refcode=111823PCR]
Thank you, friend. I’ve got to get back to the door knock, but I really appreciate your support of the House DFL. I’m excited to work with you to win this special election.
Adam Kopel
Campaign Director
Minnesota House DFL

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: There are less than 2 months until the Iowa caucus on January 15th. This caucus isn’t about the fake media narratives or the Super PAC puppet-driven campaigns – it’s about who the voters want to lead an American revival. | | Fellow American, This campaign is for the underdogs. On the campaign trail, I’ve talked to the parents who want a better future for their children, to the disenfranchised voters who believe Washington DC forgot them, and to the youngest voting generation who want to be inspired by their government, not fear it. I’m running this race for you. There are less than 2 months until the Iowa caucus on January 15th. This caucus isn’t about the fake media narratives or the Super PAC puppet-driven campaigns – it’s about who the voters want to lead an American revival. I’m relying on the grassroots to put us exactly where we need to be to go the distance. Thank you, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. subject: re: Henry Cuellar

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Infamous Democrat-In-Name-Only Rep. Henry Cuellar reportedly told House
Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries that the Democratic Party should NOT
defend the Squad against AIPAC’s attacks.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231118.J_Xb1W&refcode=em20231118-31922&t=1001&akid=31922%2E1203867%2EzV86b7 ]Tweet from Alex Sammon

This is the same man who voted with Donald Trump’s agenda 70% of the time
and then relied on the Democratic Party to save his seat when faced with a
progressive primary challenger in 2020 and 2022. The hypocrisy is
astounding.

With this news and the continued silence from party leadership who have
close ties to AIPAC, it goes to show that we cannot simply rely on the
Democratic establishment to protect progressive incumbents like Rashida
Tlaib, Summer Lee, Jamaal Bowman, or Cori Bush from these
Republican-funded attacks.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231118.J_Xb1W&refcode=em20231118-31922&amount=3&t=1002&akid=31922%2E1203867%2EzV86b7 ]That’s why Justice Democrats is gearing up NOW to do everything in our
power to re-elect the Squad and defend our progressive, diverse,
working-class bloc of candidates in Congress next year. Fund our fight
with a grassroots contribution of $3 or more today →

We won’t sit idly by while a group funded by Donald Trump’s megadonors
pours $100 million into attacks against our candidates. Thanks for
anything you can contribute to fuel our work.

— Justice Democrats

this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in

using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=31922%2E1203867%2EzV86b7 ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
