name: Katie Porter
subject: A quick story about how I ended up in your inbox
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I’m writing this as my kids fight over who is monopolizing the bathroom.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=33293%2E3422442%2EgWQCbp)
I’m a single mom of three loosely-supervised children here in Irvine. Before running for office, I was a law professor and consumer protection attorney who worked to hold Wall Street accountable.
After the election of Trump, I decided to run for Congress against a Republican incumbent. **I ran as a progressive in a purple district** —proudly supporting Medicare for All and bold action on climate change. We won, and I headed to Congress with a tool from my teaching days—a whiteboard (I really do carry one in my purse).
That whiteboard helped me find my voice in Congress. It helped us expose the incompetence of Trump Administration officials. It allowed me to show the math behind corporate greed and skyrocketing profits to hold CEOs accountable. **Those whiteboard moments translated to real wins—passing legislation to lower drug costs, raise rates on polluters, and address inflation.**
In January, I announced I’m running for the U.S. Senate. I’m running because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them, taking on the challenges of tomorrow. **Big corporations and the politicians they fund have rigged the rules against working people, making it hard to get ahead.** I’m running to stand up to corruption and shake up the status quo.
Polls have shown us with a very narrow lead in this race. **But during the last three fundraising quarters another candidate has outraised us—thanks to large donations from wealthy donors.** Roughly a third of voters remain undecided, so catching up financially and being able to reach those undecided voters is critical.
We can only win this race with the support of grassroots donors like you. That’s not just a talking point, it’s true. **Our average donation is $25, and I’m the only candidate in this race rejecting federal lobbyist money.**
**[Can you make your first donation of $5 before midnight tonight to help us make up the gap between me and my opponents?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231118?refcode=EMAN23_1_RSD_20231118_V1_F&refcode2=33293_3422442_gWQCbp&akid=33293%2E3422442%2EgWQCbp)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231118?refcode=EMAN23_1_RSD_20231118_V1_F&refcode2=33293_3422442_gWQCbp&akid=33293%2E3422442%2EgWQCbp)
Thank you SO much for considering.
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN23_1_RSD_20231118_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=33293_3422442_gWQCbp&akid=33293%2E3422442%2EgWQCbp)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=33293%2E3422442%2EgWQCbp)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=33293%2E3422442%2EgWQCbp)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73604889/439043607/1072501871?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzA3NTE2MGUtNGQ4Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YejmaFzKegwaralYIH7_TuV4cO-UE5p-H-tGZn2MI6E=)

Friend,

As our team starts gearing up for election season, we’re pushing relentlessly to build the grassroots network that we need to win in 2024.

We’ve built a team of supporters that span all parts of our district, from different walks of life, and a spectrum of political backgrounds. We’ve won support from labor unions, advocacy groups, small businesses, friends, and neighbors alike.

**But we’re still missing our most important endorsement:_Yours._** | [5,000 ENDORSEMENTS NEEDED: ENDORSE DR. RUIZ TODAY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73604890/439043608/-1993200485?refcode=RRFC_20231118_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzA3NTE2MGUtNGQ4Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YejmaFzKegwaralYIH7_TuV4cO-UE5p-H-tGZn2MI6E=&emci=5a797eab-6685-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=c075160e-4d86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=4131986)
---

name: Mike Rogers
subject: The time I met a Russian General
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
Meeting the 6’9 and 400lb Russian| | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=2701e4ab64f24f3b86cfe1b6309de035&_e=N185PF4BaDgvIOO8T5ySWCEXjS_v_lg_KTfZa3AE-9BtJqktkJohSNfRQkcNUpNW1vMpHPGMCPJBMtCvuwasydXwRHn9UFij2cJRNiH3onxAqA38mYN0XXB8iQ_qviSVTMoVYA8MgSGEre4wh5aGg3fFjgXC31OL2jLstH5ssscWge3JzrQWolRRJ-df448LJVCB1j6SUkc_TPA8JGY539xoZhZYoc9OKxFFBChHSmBCsSKZfzO3MzRijJzmTeCrYLahjFuGI3b7D_e_vG2EL70ATd4Nm6jYg2od_wlk6Np6LJdx5DyHW5BlJGhZC2yYPuQrtfq3APrxreubX97w843eR0WYoa-CpwMZ02tIRbpB70R5DwQQtLw7ELv3YzEFFSIRRaiP3uERpQwQ4TbBERENh-WsIM23HwjZ8GhirsE%3D)
---
Friend, There I stood — eye to eye with the biggest man I’d ever seen.

His uniform was decorated with Russian military medals. But it wasn’t the fact that he was bigger than most NFL linebackers that stuck in my memory, nor was it the array of accolades on his lapel. **_It’s what he said about America that keeps me up at night to this day._** I, along with a few of my colleagues, had been sent on a diplomatic mission to Russia. After our meeting a Russian General, the BIGGEST man I’d ever seen, pulled me aside and asked me to speak privately with him. I agreed. As he took me to a private library, all I could think was “I think I've seen this movie before...” We made small talk for a moment... But then he told me something I'll never forget. He said: "Mike, it's good to see America finally admit she’s a nation in decline. We've been there before." This conversation happened after President Obama’s utter failure as a foreign policy leader. He appeased our enemies and weakened our military. He aided our enemies and scorned our allies. He made it so our adversaries no longer respect or fear the U.S. **And now, Joe Biden is carrying on Obama’s legacy of weakness and is once again working to undermine America’s strength and greatness. ** I'm Mike Rogers, a veteran and former Federal Law Enforcement Officer. I’m not afraid to say it: I love our troops, I ALWAYS stand up for our flag, and I will fight to my last breath to restore America’s greatness. **[But I need your help to do it.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=2701e4ab64f24f3b86cfe1b6309de035&_e=N185PF4BaDgvIOO8T5ySWCEXjS_v_lg_KTfZa3AE-9BtJqktkJohSNfRQkcNUpNW1vMpHPGMCPJBMtCvuwasydXwRHn9UFij2cJRNiH3onxAqA38mYN0XXB8iQ_qviSVTMoVYA8MgSGEre4wh5aGg3fFjgXC31OL2jLstH5ssscWge3JzrQWolRRJ-df448LJVCB1j6SUkc_TPA8JGY539xoZhZYoc9OKxFFBChHSmBCsSKZfzO3MzRijJzmTeCrYLahjFuGI3b7D_e_vG2ELzM_A-7H3pD_fMjuzZF8Ppj9UbaBgolf4-hE8QVgL1_nhG-pXp0IyZGuRMvuHgg1gW7-4q2YCPYIgyhLY0GWdu2NppwmEf7vfuKf5WoBtiQ-elraYS8N4VOjMIrejEslYaM1dVf25aM8K6AUJjz2h4U%3D)** Fname, in 2014 I left the political world. I thought it was my time to settle down and focus on my friends and family. But this much has become clear — my tour of service isn’t over yet, my country needs me and it’s my responsibility to stand up. **[That’s why today, I’m asking you with the humble heart of a soldier and a law enforcement officer, would you take just one minute out of your busy day to support a conservative veteran?](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=2701e4ab64f24f3b86cfe1b6309de035&_e=N185PF4BaDgvIOO8T5ySWCEXjS_v_lg_KTfZa3AE-9BtJqktkJohSNfRQkcNUpNW1vMpHPGMCPJBMtCvuwasydXwRHn9UFij2cJRNiH3onxAqA38mYN0XXB8iQ_qviSVTMoVYA8MgSGEre4wh5aGg3fFjgXC31OL2jLstH5ssscWge3JzrQWolRRJ-df448LJVCB1j6SUkc_TPA8JGY539xoZhZYoc9OKxFFBChHSmBCsSKZfzO3MzRijJzmTeCrYLahjFuGI3b7D_e_vG2ELzt-jIS590p8XZU1YPOPrxA03lW_-tPDhm_h3PISC_dWeg5rVZF3qjMWBumqPdwyz5rvHGS8v6Vx3yCyDCTLodOsgHAah5ObGRiJPuc7jut__QEX4HXovtALkqp25BBf89390XGHm6RQkbHRAAHCfPk%3D)** Chuck Schumer and the entire Democratic machine already have a war chest of over $30 million to spend to defeat me as I run for U.S. Senate in Michigan. Anything you could spare will go a long way to helping me defeat my far-left opponent, and end Schumer’s reign over the Senate. **[Can I count on you?](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=2701e4ab64f24f3b86cfe1b6309de035&_e=N185PF4BaDgvIOO8T5ySWCEXjS_v_lg_KTfZa3AE-9BtJqktkJohSNfRQkcNUpNW1vMpHPGMCPJBMtCvuwasydXwRHn9UFij2cJRNiH3onxAqA38mYN0XXB8iQ_qviSVTMoVYA8MgSGEre4wh5aGg3fFjgXC31OL2jLstH5ssscWge3JzrQWolRRJ-df448LJVCB1j6SUkc_TPA8JGY539xoZhZYoc9OKxFFBChHSmBCsSKZfzO3MzRijJzmTeCrYLahjFuGI3b7D_e_vG2EL0FNBSyFS_enB5X5vqbuYDLt0UVxEKb49VPwIqzCWBdm2rb6SY7k2MI8tvFIWPbXHllP24lPepnc68g9f6F6c_7sW3r1PxX_BgsxYas-gLEqLQj1r-C1ap_ywz6jvU-1e7sAu5g68aCc85wWcKL9cns%3D)** Sincerely, Mike Rogers

I'm the daughter of a construction worker who worked long hours to make ends meet. Growing up in a trailer just off a dirt road, I never thought I would be the first in my family to go to college or become a law professor, _let alone run for Congress._

Through hard work, strong public school teachers, student loans, and scholarships, I was able to make my way. _That's the future I want for all Iowans, Peter, and it's that mission I kept top of mind when making the decision to run for Congress._

The reality is that too many Iowa families have been put second. **My opponent Mariannette Miller-Meeks has put the Republican Party over our families.** Time and time again, she's abandoned the best interests of her constituents to stand with divisive figures like Jim Jordan and Mike Johnson, voting against affordable drugs, good-paying jobs in Iowa, and abortion access.

I'm running for Congress because farmers, small-business owners, moms and dads – _Iowans just like me_ – deserve dignity and a seat at the table.**When I'm in Congress, I will put Iowans first.** I will fight to make sure working people get a fair share of the wealth they create.

[**It's going to be a tough fight ahead, but I know with your help I can flip this district and play a part in taking the House back for Democrats. With so much at stake, I have to ask you again: Will you become a Founding Donor with a $10 gift split between EMILYs List and my campaign?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73605191/439044778/637934301?refcode=20231118_HHBohannan_v1s1&sourceid=1052357&refcode2=WTEFHK40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmU5OTQ3OS00ZDg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w5oFaqNxnGImhMT5AGTxuH4pdHUP5LXKtM0d6hNahys=)

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: With gratitude for your support…looking a year ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Our campaign relies on the generosity and support of individual donors.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_fundraiser_1_4&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, As Thanksgiving approaches I want you to know how grateful I am for your support. It has been the fuel that has brought us so far. Now we need to reach voters across the country to get on the ballot in every state. This is an enormous challenge – but with your help I’m confident that we can achieve anything, including getting me elected President. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/ballot-access-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_fundraiser_1_4&n=2 "Ballot access video") We've been building our organization from the ground up with people like you who are ready to be part of the change we need. I’m looking forward to the campaign trail ahead where we’ll have the chance to take our message to voters across the country. **I’m asking you to commit to help keep our progress going with a[donation of $5 today.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_fundraiser_1_4&n=3) ** Every dollar you give brings us one step closer to the White House – a**nd every dollar matters.** **Please donate whatever you can.** | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_fundraiser_1_4&n=4 "Give $5 ->") [Give $5 ->](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving_fundraiser_1_4&n=4)

body:
Hey Peter, it's John.
**The GOP’s road to winning back the Senate runs right through PA.** In 2022, I had one of the toughest Senate races in the country — and now, CNN ranks PA the #4 most likely Senate seat to flip next year. 😱
That means my friend Bob Casey could be facing hundreds of million$ from Mitch McConnell and the GOP’s shadiest billionaires spent to take him down.
I know this team has Bob’s back, just how the people of Pennsylvania had mine in 2022. I don’t need to tell you that the stakes are high. I think everyone reading this knows how *crucial* defending PA’s Senate seat is.
What I CAN tell you is how to have a *direct* impact on Bob’s chances of winning.

name: Our Revolution
subject: Join Barbara Lee, call for a ceasefire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Rep. Barbara Lee is the only candidate for U.S. Senate in California calling for a ceasefire in Gaza.

She’s the most progressive candidate in the race, and we need her voice in the Senate more than ever.

Barbara stood alone as the sole vote against a blank check for war in Afghanistan. She received hate mail and threats for her courageous stand, but was vindicated by history. Now she’s the lone candidate in this Senate race demanding a ceasefire and she needs us by her side.

We need leaders like Barbara Lee who stand up for peace over war. Will you add your name to stand with Barbara Lee and show that our progressive movement has her back? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12488?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231118_PT_leeceasefire_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_leeceasefire&t=1011&akid=4919%2E5885482%2E6mhBUU)

ADD YOUR NAME (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12488?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231118_PT_leeceasefire_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_leeceasefire&t=1012&akid=4919%2E5885482%2E6mhBUU)

While 66% of Americans (and 80% of Democrats!) support a ceasefire in Gaza, only 4% of our Congress members have called for one. Lawmakers’ choices should reflect the will of the people they represent, especially on an issue as consequential as war.

When we have a Peace Candidate like Barbara Lee, it’s critical that we support them.

Peter Willis, add your name to show you stand with Barbara Lee and show her that our Progressive movement has her back! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12488?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231118_PT_leeceasefire_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_leeceasefire&t=1013&akid=4919%2E5885482%2E6mhBUU)

When we organize, we win!

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis, Rep. Barbara Lee is the only candidate for U.S. Senate in California calling for a ceasefire in Gaza. She’s the most progressive candidate in the race, and we need her voice in the Senate more than ever. Barbara stood alone as the sole vote against a blank check for war in Afghanistan. She received hate mail and threats for her courageous stand, but was vindicated by history. Now she’s the lone candidate in this Senate race demanding a ceasefire and she needs us by her side. We need leaders like Barbara Lee who stand up for peace over war. Will you add your name to stand with Barbara Lee and show that our progressive movement has her back? () ADD YOUR NAME () While 66% of Americans (and 80% of Democrats!) support a ceasefire in Gaza, only 4% of our Congress members have called for one. Lawmakers’ choices should reflect the will of the people they represent, especially on an issue as consequential as war. When we have a Peace Candidate like Barbara Lee, it’s critical that we support them. Peter Willis, add your name to show you stand with Barbara Lee and show her that our Progressive movement has her back! () When we organize, we win! name: Adam Frisch
subject: my decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
After the 2022 election, I had a hard decision to make.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73606421/439048728/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTk1M2RiMC01Mjg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZ6J2fI9uBnii9HoBvKlbS0Qxcj9QMkAezdvSMpdiBM=&emci=7443c156-5186-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=49953db0-5286-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73606422/439048729/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTk1M2RiMC01Mjg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZ6J2fI9uBnii9HoBvKlbS0Qxcj9QMkAezdvSMpdiBM=&emci=7443c156-5186-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=49953db0-5286-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
After the 2022 election, I had a hard decision to make.
When I ran against Lauren Boebert last year, I knew we could win. No one believed me – not the Democratic party, not the Republican party, and certainly none of the political pundits.
Ultimately, though, after the recount, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country.
We were outspent heavily by Boebert and her allies. And the attacks and the vicious lies they told about me were really hard on my family – especially my two teenage children.
After we came so close to winning, everyone expected me to run against Boebert again in 2024. It seemed like a no-brainer. But it wasn’t an easy decision to put my family through what I knew was going to be an even nastier race than the last.
I spent a lot of time reaching out to supporters and donors like you, listening and getting their advice. And everyone promised me: They’d have my back. So I took a leap of faith.
Now, Lauren Boebert’s Super PACs are already attacking me, and the smear campaign is beginning. I need your help if I’m going to have the resources it takes to win.
I made the decision to run again because I knew I could count on people like you to help me take on Boebert, so it would mean so much to me if you could chip in to my campaign today:
[**Please, will you give $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before midnight tonight – to help me hit my next fundraising goal and defeat Lauren Boebert? We can kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress in 2024, but I need your help now to do it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73606423/439048730/1610638071?refcode=em20231118pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=49953db0-5286-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTk1M2RiMC01Mjg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZ6J2fI9uBnii9HoBvKlbS0Qxcj9QMkAezdvSMpdiBM=)

clean_body: After the 2022 election, I had a hard decision to make. Hello, After the 2022 election, I had a hard decision to make. When I ran against Lauren Boebert last year, I knew we could win. No one believed me – not the Democratic party, not the Republican party, and certainly none of the political pundits. Ultimately, though, after the recount, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. We were outspent heavily by Boebert and her allies. And the attacks and the vicious lies they told about me were really hard on my family – especially my two teenage children. After we came so close to winning, everyone expected me to run against Boebert again in 2024. It seemed like a no-brainer. But it wasn’t an easy decision to put my family through what I knew was going to be an even nastier race than the last. I spent a lot of time reaching out to supporters and donors like you, listening and getting their advice. And everyone promised me: They’d have my back. So I took a leap of faith. Now, Lauren Boebert’s Super PACs are already attacking me, and the smear campaign is beginning. I need your help if I’m going to have the resources it takes to win. I made the decision to run again because I knew I could count on people like you to help me take on Boebert, so it would mean so much to me if you could chip in to my campaign today: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Donald Trump can’t hide from this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
The fact is that voters support abortion access. Period.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1822%2E4032634%2E5MRtFr)
---
I want to make this abundantly clear: There is no acceptable middle road or compromise when it comes to abortion rights. The vast majority of Americans agree that the government shouldn’t interfere with people’s personal decisions on abortion. The GOP and anti-abortion extremists know this, so they worked for years to force their unpopular agenda through the courts — and away from the ballot box. But now that they’ve gotten their wish and overturned Roe v. Wade, voters have been fighting back. In election after election ever since — in Kansas, in Michigan, in Ohio, and in Virginia — they keep reminding anti-abortion extremists how out of touch they really are. Now the GOP can try to soften and message test their anti-abortion stances all they want ahead of the 2024 election, but the fact is that voters support abortion access. Period. And their current frontrunner for president, Donald Trump, can’t hide from his extreme anti-abortion record:
* He appointed anti-choice Supreme Court justices who overturned Roe v. Wade
* He’s boasted about being the president who “got rid of Roe v. Wade”
* He supports a national ban
* He said there has to be "some form of punishment" for women who get abortions

**I won’t stop calling out the GOP’s extremism and fighting for the right to an abortion nationwide. That means electing pro-abortion Democrats and ending the filibuster so we can codify Roe v. Wade into federal law. That means reversing right-wing takeover of our Supreme Court by working to expand and rebalance it. And that means supporting local candidates and ballot measures that will defend abortion rights at the state level.** [**If you’re with me, please pitch in $28 so we can keep growing our pro-abortion movement ahead of the 2024 election. We’ve got to campaign against MAGA Republicans' out-of-touch extremism in order to prevent their plans for a national ban.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/982?amount=28&t=8&akid=1822%2E4032634%2E5MRtFr)

---

As Nampa's Senator, my commitment has always been to grassroots support. Here's a clear look at where our campaign stands:
**My Total Campaign Donations as of 11/18/23** :
1. Unique Donors: 51
2. Composition: 47 individuals, 3 companies, and 1 PAC.
3. Individual Donor Support: a remarkable 92.16%
4. Support from Other Entities: only 7.84%

**This shows that my campaign is firmly rooted in the community, powered by the people.**
Now, let's compare this with my opponent, Jeff Agenbroad, whose approach as a long-time politician is quite different:
**My opponent, Jeff Agenbroad's Total Campaign Donations as of 11/18/23:**
1. Unique Donors: 110
2. Composition: Just 17 individuals. The majority? 93 corporations, PACs, and other organizations.
3. Individual Donor Support: Only 15.45%
4. Corporate/Organizational Support: An overwhelming majority of 84.55%

Jeff's campaign clearly leans heavily on corporate interests.
_**Can such a campaign truly represent the "man of the people"?**_
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e0a37cff-ea1b-4dd2-8677-23ac94773e69?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **The distinction is stark and telling...**
While I stand with and for the people, backed predominantly by individual supporters, Jeff's campaign seems to mirror a NASCAR racecar, emblazoned with a plethora of corporate logos. The list includes prominent names such as Anheuser Busch, AT&T, and Johnson and Johnson, along with a host of other corporate giants.
In this race, you're choosing between a campaign built on the support of everyday people versus one bolstered by deep corporate pockets.
Nampa deserves a Senator whose allegiance is to its residents, **not to a roster of corporate donors** :
1. Anheuser Busch

Can I be honest with you, Peter?

I hate sending emails like this. That's why I won't beg you to donate ahead of tonight's crucial midnight deadline, but I _will_ lay out the facts: **My potential GOP opponent – Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate – outraised me in the first week of his campaign launch. And shortly after, a shady billionaire poured $2 million into the race to help flip this seat red.** McConnell and his allies flooded Nevada's last Senate race with over a staggering $55 million (only to come up less than a percentage point short of winning). And with TIME reporting that Nevada could deliver everything from the Senate to the White House to Republicans in 2024, we need all the support we can get if we're going to fend off their attacks. But our midnight fundraising deadline is just hours away, and we're on track to fall short of our $20,000 goal. | Folks, Gov. Newsom recently proposed a historic amendment to the Constitution in an effort to combat the gun violence plaguing the nation. [_**The amendment will permanently enshrine the four broadly supported gun safety principles into the U.S. Constitution:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73607134/439051554/1365865067?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTdjZTU1ZC01Yjg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4YnAAL1-nSLbnB81K6iauA6bVPAwnD0p68xk9BvCCeA=&emci=42d7617f-5786-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=0e7ce55d-5b86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=560478) **→** Raising the federal minimum age to purchase a gun from 18 to 21; **→** Mandating universal background checks to prevent dangerous individuals from purchasing a gun; **→** Creating a mandatory waiting period for all gun purchases; **→** And banning the sale of assault weapons. [**Gun proponents like the NRA have called Gov. Newsom’s plan “unhinged” - but there’s nothing more unhinged than the needless death our country faces every day thanks to the weapons of war on our streets. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73607135/439051555/1365865067?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTdjZTU1ZC01Yjg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4YnAAL1-nSLbnB81K6iauA6bVPAwnD0p68xk9BvCCeA=&emci=42d7617f-5786-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=0e7ce55d-5b86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=560478) **_We want to know what top Democrats like you think, so we’re launching an urgent poll. body:
will you join our movement?

| Peter, for the past couple years, I have championed legislation in Congress to **institute a 4-day workweek for American workers.**

_I’m so proud to say that President Barack Obama has joined our call:_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73607235/439051945/313024476?refcode=MTFC_20231118_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDU0ZmI2Yi01Yzg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pr278rusToMEfxqOXOtbB08ZpG_rQsWvdrLBYYQ4o0k=&emci=014ece33-8985-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5454fb6b-5c86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=18839602) [**Americans deserve to feel the benefits that automation and AI has brought us. If you’re with me and support my work, will you sign on to demand a 4-day workweek now? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73607236/439051946/313024476?refcode=MTFC_20231118_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDU0ZmI2Yi01Yzg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pr278rusToMEfxqOXOtbB08ZpG_rQsWvdrLBYYQ4o0k=&emci=014ece33-8985-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5454fb6b-5c86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=18839602) | [1,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: SIGN ON TO DEMAND A 4-DAY WORKWEEK »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73607237/439051947/313024476?refcode=MTFC_20231118_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDU0ZmI2Yi01Yzg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pr278rusToMEfxqOXOtbB08ZpG_rQsWvdrLBYYQ4o0k=&emci=014ece33-8985-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5454fb6b-5c86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=18839602)

Automation and AI have sent American productivity skyrocketing. And yet,_American workers continue to work the same grueling shifts with little increase in wages._

Americans deserve to live full lives that aren’t consumed by labor.

**Thankfully, momentum for my 4-day workweek legislation is skyrocketing.**

****[**Peter, this is a critical moment and I need your help. Will you add your name to show your support for a 4-day workweek and help me revolutionize American labor? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73607238/439051948/313024476?refcode=MTFC_20231118_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDU0ZmI2Yi01Yzg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pr278rusToMEfxqOXOtbB08ZpG_rQsWvdrLBYYQ4o0k=&emci=014ece33-8985-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5454fb6b-5c86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=18839602)****
[1,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: SIGN ON TO DEMAND A 4-DAY WORKWEEK »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73607239/439051949/313024476?refcode=MTFC_20231118_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDU0ZmI2Yi01Yzg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pr278rusToMEfxqOXOtbB08ZpG_rQsWvdrLBYYQ4o0k=&emci=014ece33-8985-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5454fb6b-5c86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=18839602)

\-- Mark

We’re in this race for the long haul. But it’s going to be tough.
With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), Montanans deserve someone who will crack down on the special interests and corruption in Washington, not play political games and cut backroom deals. We need to fight to lower costs for hardworking families, create good-paying union jobs, and ensure rural communities have what they need, like reliable internet and hospitals within driving distance.
Folks, I’m not a career politician. I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. **I still farm the same land my grandparents homesteaded 100 years ago, and I try every day to do what’s right for the people of Montana and across the country.**
Because of that, I don’t have much patience for the fancy billionaires and shady super PACs a lot of other politicians rely on. Instead, I depend on grassroots supporters like you.
That’s why I’m so grateful you even opened this email. Emails like this one make up a big part of our budget. $5 here and $10 there goes a long way in a campaign like ours.
**So, here’s the part where I ask:** **[_Can you make a split contribution of $17.77 (our average online donation) today to Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and my campaign to meet our weekly goals and hold our Senate majority? | | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/an-escalating-uprising-demands-human?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Most of my posts focus on [various](https://substack.com/redirect/ec82887b-ff5d-4e9f-9c54-e75b9ebbfdba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [dimensions](https://substack.com/redirect/876e3f36-854a-4a58-ad00-d5233eb71c13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of [corruption](https://substack.com/redirect/0f767443-a94b-4937-a17c-ff998c1c3583?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but I'm always excited to highlight creative grassroots [efforts](https://substack.com/redirect/bc6fbac6-329b-4fef-953b-99d04ed6a9a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to challenge it. This week, examples have emerged from Washington DC to San Francisco, as Americans who care about international human rights have come together to declare dissent from the murderous genocide that continues to unfold in Gaza with critical support from both Netanyahu and Biden.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8599aa60-1a58-417b-9888-1f4432696157?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
To the extent these events have drawn public attention, they have done in isolation. Yet these mobilizations and direct actions have been organized to address common issues and concerns, inviting observation not in isolation, but rather as a whole greater than the sum of its parts.
### **A global consensus**
A global consensus has emerged favoring international human rights, reflected in grassroots actions that concerned communities have organized in [hundreds of cities](https://substack.com/redirect/d3f71a57-4c8b-4621-b3db-5c642fb073ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) across the world.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/812ace9e-315a-4d15-b5a6-d3a4f5fe8d00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [Reuters](https://substack.com/redirect/8757ddba-a05e-461a-8ac3-37db6c2c9e55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
America & Israel continue to violate international law with impunity, enabled by their [longstanding refusal](https://substack.com/redirect/0fe3362f-5ffd-420e-992d-ac21e9cafdd4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to accept the jurisdiction of international bodies like the International Criminal Court.
Responding to the complicity shared by Tel Aviv and Washington, voices have risen in dissent across every part of the United States.
Want to stay informed about bipartisan corruption? Corporate journalists indulge it routinely, but you can work around their bias with a free subscription. Paid subscriptions expand my work.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..azEuNd7-UNcTzCOJcbUOiRR4M6d0agDRAy-p-0tAwmE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=138971841)
### **From the East ...**
In the nation's capital, activists [marched](https://substack.com/redirect/c624a0a6-d313-42b3-9718-cb676fdbb0b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by the [hundreds](https://substack.com/redirect/1997b13e-57c5-46a8-9a83-16b6177f8dcb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of thousands on November 4. Over 250 organizations came together to plan the event, which was the country's largest gathering ever among pro-Palestinian voices. One organizer, Layan Fuleihan from The People's Forum, [said](https://substack.com/redirect/b83ff24b-4e07-41f7-9d4a-5b53697dde1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "[It] felt like this was...a turning point in the struggle for Palestine."
Events appear to be proving her right.
This week, 150 more [blockaded](https://substack.com/redirect/fe733ebc-3978-41d7-8eae-734162a51420?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the headquarters of the Democratic National Committee, highlighting the unfortunate--and also revealing--fact that neither of the corporate political parties in Washington supports international human rights, or the global consensus favoring a long overdue cease-fire. The DNC's role [reinforcing](https://substack.com/redirect/ec82887b-ff5d-4e9f-9c54-e75b9ebbfdba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the Republican position effectively [disenfranchises](https://substack.com/redirect/081a3bc8-e285-4640-a778-20f9e4ed56cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) American voters who support human rights, casting a shadow on Washington's farcical claim to promote democracy abroad--or even to practice it here at home.
Despite organizing a non-violent action, [90 participants were injured by police](https://substack.com/redirect/a73752c3-2fdd-496b-90c0-782a9ec4417b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), offering a further indication of the state of what passes for "democracy" in our country. The Guardian reports that:
> [V]olunteers were pepper-sprayed, kicked, pulled by the hair and dragged down flights of stairs by officers in riot gear, who they accused of ignoring longstanding protocols for non-violent protest by failing to issue dispersal notices or engage with the rally's specially designated police liaison representative.
In New York City, residents took action this week in a [variety](https://substack.com/redirect/0619b5c6-9da1-4cf1-ade4-048bdc68fc96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of ways. Highlighting the [complicity](https://substack.com/redirect/2e02fa9a-7450-4da5-8847-b8062e23b26a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of mass media institutions in preventable violence, activists protested at the Fox News HQ, recognizing the particular role played by that network. It has promoted lies justifying preventable violence for decades, from [false](https://substack.com/redirect/e7d0230b-ca3e-4ec0-9de7-5d23067f1274?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) claims about weapons of mass destruction in Iraq, to [false](https://substack.com/redirect/ef149a0e-5b7c-4008-815b-417accbde7d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) claims about beheaded babies in the wake of the October 7 attacks that shocked the oblivious Israeli defense establishment. New Yorkers have also recently taken action at the similarly biased _New York Times_ , [shutting it down](https://substack.com/redirect/9c929612-4e2f-4647-b58e-e3d2a06ac626?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) earlier this month.
Grassroots direct actions in New York City this week also acknowledged the crucial intersection between militarism and capitalism. New Yorkers also [blocked](https://substack.com/redirect/7c0adcec-f05f-410d-9b6a-79d71ec70034?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the entrance of BNY Mellon, a financial institution that helps finance Israeli weapons, as well as another bank that funds the Tel Aviv campus of New York University.
### **... to the West**
Across the continent, activists are the San Francisco Bay Area have also demonstrated visible solidarity. (At least some participating organizations did so performatively, despite [unfortunate hypocrisy](https://substack.com/redirect/876e3f36-854a-4a58-ad00-d5233eb71c13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) enabling militarism, but I'll save those intra-movement reflections for a future post.)
Earlier this month, activists locked themselves to a military transport ship, the Cape Orlando, successfully delaying it from leaving the Port of Oakland. The ship was poised to deliver weapons and supplies to Israel, and after eventually leaving the Port of Oakland, was soon [blocked and delayed again](https://substack.com/redirect/eb478cc9-d4fe-4d54-a0f5-78909c65e6b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by activists in the Seattle area mobilizing at the Port of Tacoma.
This week, the Bay Area mobilized again. Over 80 participants were arrested this Thursday for [blocking the bay bridge](https://substack.com/redirect/bee8b6f4-6a4e-4f23-b75c-3fc3b33a73f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which connects the city of San Francisco to Oakland and the rest of the bay area and [carries](https://substack.com/redirect/c94f75a4-b0a6-4812-be71-990effeb17db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) roughly a quarter million vehicles every day.
Did this post offer any information that was new to you? Help inform your friends by sharing it with them.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=138971841&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4OTcxODQxLCJpYXQiOjE3MDAzNDUyNjMsImV4cCI6MTcwMjkzNzI2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vHKZoU_r1I8qkc7TW6rmw3U_D4ZleU8P9tSTpkjjKRE)
In a car-centered transportation network, these kinds of actions can carry particular influence because they force an oblivious public to share the cost of its unfortunate ignorance. There's no guarantee that a person's inconvenience will ever translate to them learning what they might have previously overlooked, but blocking actions at least deny the option of casual complicity, and force public discussion impeded by [propaganda-masquerading-as-news](https://substack.com/redirect/497ebe6f-b4e4-4155-8494-6d777972e509?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
This week, President Biden [visited](https://substack.com/redirect/2d81ea0d-7ec8-4a48-b8b1-66e9671c46f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) San Francisco to meet with his Chinese counterpart, Xi Jinping, at the Asia Pacific Economic Cooperation (Apec) forum. APEC is the latest among a [series](https://substack.com/redirect/a418a8cf-ceec-4216-8c69-5f58b033afc9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of international trade agreements that would extend a neoliberal economic model already [discredited](https://substack.com/redirect/a8c900fd-9c11-4875-b614-5c6910ac27c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in 2008 that has subverted [environmental](https://substack.com/redirect/046b8fe6-c169-43b8-ba9e-fdf02d7b84e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [labor](https://substack.com/redirect/9859889c-9f54-4a3f-a580-aad134afbe58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) protections to the vagaries of international markets and a rapacious global thirst for consumption.
Thankfully, thousands of Bay Area residents turned out to try [shutting down](https://substack.com/redirect/2cbec335-d5f7-46a5-9d97-0fcc97ebf13b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the summit. Organizations including the [No to APEC Coalition](https://substack.com/redirect/66ca2a73-d46f-4555-b2dd-e388720d3e0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [Rising Tide North America](https://substack.com/redirect/4bbcade6-e2b7-4c42-a8d2-18c05941a60e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) organized direct action including the bay bridge blockade, as well as actions at summit sites across downtown San Francisco. Speaking on behalf of the No to APEC Coalition, spokesperson Rhonda Ramiro [said](https://substack.com/redirect/2cbec335-d5f7-46a5-9d97-0fcc97ebf13b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "Those steel barriers are there to protect the 1% so they can cut more deals to make the wealthy wealthier. We're trying to make it a bit inconvenient for the attendees and hard for them to do business as usual."
Given how destructive business as usual has become, any organized disruption represents a service to the public, and to the future.
Paid subscribers can access stories and videos from grassroots actions in over two dozen other cities around the U.S. challenging militarism at this critical point in world history.
Current events offer [plenty of reasons](https://substack.com/redirect/6dce52cc-4b97-44df-a87c-36c9419da124?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for despair, particularly if one looks for them. But in the stalwart actions of our neighbors, we can find inspiration, as well as prolific public demonstrations of [once universal commitments](https://substack.com/redirect/156448ba-6720-4608-b898-f496f818e0c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that many of us still share...

But I’ve got to say, I’ve been really feeling the love out on the campaign trail. [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRFcwsSCtnhr_3rbhkdT3xDXBIiyfufBMTz2ggX1HWa8flNIsahCekYw36PKzqDO27B2Mv96lCbTj9BVUtGX03uvNdqP_huZSJqla6Lbi4xuuJFs8Y9CvmgOztz4RF9iYhFSu28w9_ef8tbPVMauFSkKCtFZX3wVUuTXU3IInPMBUgMrDBjNc3Mekq2lsYa_U7N-ZcmC5BNlySpPwmYwROl3CG9KWNcHmRfrfT-1jci4GITXfAXg7n_bka3Boe1_p3zWOD0y0BgZf7caDb0SfT-JkTAfa5FJNHIKeNj8vze6GmaZ_6qX_C_ilmgvl3eoOsGmsNtJFXTR9dNMNQY7EPQvqm7OeoE0ZPxw7jAxs6Eu4utqBzSI2S_Kvrf9UbBoSk0itBIVxwdXtxPBDLzVSWHEn5oZQal9c0EsLpegRFnos/41e/fpGTY3aKSCqmKj05akEVvw/h1/ujlMw7YR-P10Zd2fn8s9guznmHivynnchiGIbr8m7K8) Since day one, this campaign has been about Marylanders and their families, and if I’ve said it once, I’ve said it a hundred times:

The best part of campaigning is meeting folks and talking to them about the issues that matter most to them, their families, and their pocketbooks.

It’s times like these that I feel especially blessed, Peter, and knowing I’ve got your support is a huge part of that.

I’d love it if we could make November even bigger, which is why I’m asking for your help right now: **[Would you please consider chipping a split donation of $25 (or whatever you can) between my campaign and The Collective PAC before midnight to help my team ramp up our outreach efforts so I can talk to even more Marylanders?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRFcwsSCtnhr_3rbhkdT3xDXBIiyfufBMTz2ggX1HWa8flNIsahCekYw36PKzqDO27B2Mv96lCbTj9BVUtGX03uvNdqP_huZSJqla6Lbi4xuuJFs8Y9CvmgOztz4RF9iYhFSu28w9_ef8tbPVMauFSkKCtFZX3wVUuTXU3IInPMBWM3jM_em72vnzNXL9yDZ6iQRn68avWIeMLceXbTN-Pgmdj6OMdLqmYMiwq0JNYAMUZuty8fiGTigh4NTt_ZroZNfrO75SU19WDBwTRb1NmsiolTADc9z5ad7u2B49aDVgoMtq5-rDLv3N_tTVH3FXFAY93uGfx6koh7wcBnekoLqv8r00M8PyLjRMz8asYbcYkvrJrRQnPbzFJtBm2OG2oF8BTWMDWu6yBl4e_Sfy9pLe-jMGa1EJfRu7SfVUG9WY/41e/fpGTY3aKSCqmKj05akEVvw/h2/ozgl9X7DytX8gjIfLJXbJoNPFQAfUq8u2KactqDz5MI)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Angela Alsobrooks and The Collective PAC.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, it really has been a rollercoaster since we launched this campaign for the U.S. Senate. But I’ve got to say, I’ve been really feeling the love out on the campaign trail. Since day one, this campaign has been about Marylanders and their families, and if I’ve said it once, I’ve said it a hundred times: The best part of campaigning is meeting folks and talking to them about the issues that matter most to them, their families, and their pocketbooks. It’s times like these that I feel especially blessed, Peter, and knowing I’ve got your support is a huge part of that. I’d love it if we could make November even bigger, which is why I’m asking for your help right now: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Angela Alsobrooks and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you! —Angela The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. The work to secure four more years in the White House begins now. | | |
---
Peter, imagine for a second that it’s Election Day. Think about the feeling you will get knowing that you did everything in your power to reelect Joe and Kamala. You’ll be watching results from across the country come in, knowing that every donation you made, every call you made, every person you told about President Biden’s plan to finish the job -- was all worth it. That’s why we’re reaching out today. Elections aren’t decided overnight. They take work -- teamwork. Work that starts right now. Thankfully, we have the best team around. **It will be your investment, your energy, and your faith that secures four more years in the White House for President Biden.** [**So, we have to ask: Will you chip in for the first time today to make sure that Joe and Kamala can keep fighting for progress? Think about the feeling you will get knowing that you did everything in your power to reelect Joe and Kamala. You’ll be watching results from across the country come in, knowing that every donation you made, every call you made, every person you told about President Biden’s plan to finish the job -- was all worth it. That’s why we’re reaching out today. Elections aren’t decided overnight. They take work -- teamwork. Work that starts right now. Thankfully, we have the best team around. name: James Carville
subject: I’m raging (re: Nevada)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73607981/439054429/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTBmOGUyMy02Mjg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v7ZfyNi93KcHIJRcwXOtPKBHBmRY639OCIetMdgVfww=&emci=fb594a6b-2f86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=8e0f8e23-6286-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, it’s James Carville, and I’m raging at the newest development out of Nevada: **A shady MAGA billionaire just poured $2 MILLION into this race to try and flip Nevada red.**

**I’m not going to mince words, Peter – national Republicans think they can BUY this seat.** Our razor-thin majority is hanging on by a single thread, and there’s no question that Mitch McConnell and his extremist cronies are going to spend every cent they can to take back the Senate.

If you want to defend the Senate, this race should be at the very top of your priorities list – and Jacky Rosen needs our immediate help to fight back against her opponent’s new multi-million dollar warchest.

**She is counting on a surge of grassroots support to counteract the deluge of money flooding into this race. But as of this morning she is falling massively behind her CAN’T-MISS fundraising goal.**

subject: Why I’m supporting Jonathan Nez in Arizona

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73608091/439054887/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTkxMWUxMC02NTg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QMgCfs7cANg2ECAeM97yCb1KJtxzIGlwyyMAL1ALT0s=&emci=24911e10-6586-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=25911e10-6586-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=252045)

Folks — Extremists in the Republican Party have taken over Congress — electing a Speaker of the House who has dismissed the threat of climate change, voted against LGBTQ+ equality and reproductive rights, and tried to overturn the 2020 election results. One of his strongest supporters? Arizona Congressman Eli Crane, who celebrated the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ and supports an abortion ban with _no exceptions_ for rape or incest. Just like Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene, Eli Crane is an extremist Republican who puts political showmanship above making progress. Arizonans deserve better. That’s why I’m proud to support Jonathan Nez, a dedicated and passionate Democrat running in a competitive race to replace Eli Crane in Arizona’s 2nd district and flip the House. Jonathan is the former President of the Navajo Nation and is a proven champion of the values and principles that matter most to workers and families, like creating jobs and protecting our fundamental rights. Jonathan and I share an unwavering commitment to social and economic justice. We envision a more inclusive, equitable America that lifts people up and inspires future generations to reach their potential and realize their dreams. **But to beat extremists like Eli Crane and build on our progress, we need your support.** [**Will you help elect Jonathan Nez and flip the House blue by splitting a $10 or more donation now between our campaigns?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73608092/439054888/630490883?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTkxMWUxMC02NTg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QMgCfs7cANg2ECAeM97yCb1KJtxzIGlwyyMAL1ALT0s=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Jonathan Nez and Martin Heinrich:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73608093/439054889/630490883?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTkxMWUxMC02NTg2LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QMgCfs7cANg2ECAeM97yCb1KJtxzIGlwyyMAL1ALT0s=)

clean_body: Folks — Extremists in the Republican Party have taken over Congress — electing a Speaker of the House who has dismissed the threat of climate change, voted against LGBTQ+ equality and reproductive rights, and tried to overturn the 2020 election results. One of his strongest supporters? Arizona Congressman Eli Crane, who celebrated the overturning of Roe v. Wade and supports an abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest. Just like Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene, Eli Crane is an extremist Republican who puts political showmanship above making progress. Arizonans deserve better. That’s why I’m proud to support Jonathan Nez, a dedicated and passionate Democrat running in a competitive race to replace Eli Crane in Arizona’s 2nd district and flip the House. Jonathan is the former President of the Navajo Nation and is a proven champion of the values and principles that matter most to workers and families, like creating jobs and protecting our fundamental rights. Jonathan and I share an unwavering commitment to social and economic justice. We envision a more inclusive, equitable America that lifts people up and inspires future generations to reach their potential and realize their dreams. name: Kathleen Riebe
subject: It's simple, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Riebe for Congress
body:
My opponent wants to ban abortion and throw doctors in jail. I believe in protecting private healthcare decisions.
|
---

| | Peter, The _Salt Lake Tribune_ this week framed one of the central contrasts – and questions – of this election. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73608746/439057106/-620242489?refcode=2023-11-18-ad-nonop&recurring=&amount=20&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=30fd4da0-6c86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcxNTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzBmZDRkYTAtNmM4Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XcylOExVUuQ20QG56dzrdtl3L9CXGPniPI-ClqEts1Y=) I've made this clear from the start: **A national abortion ban should never become law. Period.** Healthcare is nuanced, personal, and ultimately private. I'm in this race because I know Utahns believe in the right to make their own healthcare decisions free of government intervention. My opponent has been upfront that she'll support national legislation to dictate reproductive healthcare — legislation that would _imprison_ people who seek reproductive care and their doctors. **If you care about preserving freedom, then I need your help to defeat my extreme opponent on Tuesday.** [**Our latest ad highlights the clear choice Utahns are facing in CD-2, and we're counting on grassroots support to help us keep amplifying it for the next 3 days of this race. Will you chip in $20 right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73608747/439057107/-620242489?refcode=2023-11-18-ad-nonop&recurring=&amount=20&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=30fd4da0-6c86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcxNTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzBmZDRkYTAtNmM4Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XcylOExVUuQ20QG56dzrdtl3L9CXGPniPI-ClqEts1Y=) Thank you, _Kathleen_ Forwarded Message | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73608748/439057108/-1487052648?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcxNTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzBmZDRkYTAtNmM4Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XcylOExVUuQ20QG56dzrdtl3L9CXGPniPI-ClqEts1Y=&emci=e5054481-6a86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=30fd4da0-6c86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=8062649)

**Celeste Maloy is too extreme for us.**
We deserve leaders who are working to serve Utahns, not a D.C. insider who is only fighting for her own radical agenda (and one who hasn't lived and voted in the state in YEARS!). And to make sure voters know just how extreme Maloy is, we launched a new ad this week to tell everyone exactly what Maloy believes. [**Check it out, and then chip in $20 to help us amplify it across UT-02 before Election Day.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73608749/439057109/-620242489?refcode=2023-11-18-ad-nonop&recurring=&amount=20&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=30fd4da0-6c86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcxNTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzBmZDRkYTAtNmM4Ni1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XcylOExVUuQ20QG56dzrdtl3L9CXGPniPI-ClqEts1Y=)

But we can't do this without you.

clean_body: My opponent wants to ban abortion and throw doctors in jail. I believe in protecting private healthcare decisions. | | | Peter, The Salt Lake Tribune this week framed one of the central contrasts – and questions – of this election. = I've made this clear from the start: A national abortion ban should never become law. Period. Healthcare is nuanced, personal, and ultimately private. I'm in this race because I know Utahns believe in the right to make their own healthcare decisions free of government intervention. My opponent has been upfront that she'll support national legislation to dictate reproductive healthcare — legislation that would imprison people who seek reproductive care and their doctors. If you care about preserving freedom, then I need your help to defeat my extreme opponent on Tuesday. = Thank you, Kathleen Forwarded Message | Here's the honest truth, Peter: Celeste Maloy is too extreme for us. We deserve leaders who are working to serve Utahns, not a D.C. insider who is only fighting for her own radical agenda (and one who hasn't lived and voted in the state in YEARS!). And to make sure voters know just how extreme Maloy is, we launched a new ad this week to tell everyone exactly what Maloy believes. = = Our elected leaders should be committed to serving Utahns and representing the needs of our communities. But Celeste Maloy is only serving her own extremism. Our grassroots movement is powered by community members across CD-2. Folks in West Valley, Salt Lake, Tooele, St. George, Milford, Kanab, Cedar City, and so many other communities have joined our movement and are fighting to bring better leadership to our state. But we can't do this without you. = Team Riebe Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for and authorized by Riebe for Congress. |
